docs.text: Authors: Yin W et al. | Journal: BMC Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1186/s12866-026-05045-0 TL;DR: VPA1365 調控 V. parahaemolyticus 生物膜形成，助其從高鹽海水環境適應淡水食品 評: 不嘻嘻 — 副溶血弧菌已從海鮮跑進淡水食品，連生物膜調控都搞清楚了，更難對付。

docs.title: Invasion dynamics of the disease vector Aedes japonicus in Spain
docs.text: Authors: Lucati F et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-49121-x TL;DR: 白紋日本斑蚊入侵西班牙並向鄰近區域擴散，具傳播多種蟲媒病毒的潛力 評: 不嘻嘻 — 又一隻外來蚊子在歐洲站穩腳跟，蟲媒傳染病的地圖又要重畫了。

docs.title: Genomic characterization of clinical isolates of carbapenem-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii ST1325-OX carrying bla OXA-259 from Mwanza, Tanzania
docs.text: Authors: Silago V et al. | Journal: JAC Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1093/jacamr/dlag076 TL;DR: 坦尚尼亞分離出攜帶 blaOXA-259 的碳青黴烯抗藥鮑氏不動桿菌，基因組解析其耐藥特性 評: 不嘻嘻 — WHO 優先病原 CRAB 出現在坦尚尼亞，低收入國家的抗藥性問題從來不只是富國的事。

docs.title: The renaissance of Salmonella-based cancer therapy: convergence of AI, synthetic circuits, and TME remodeling
docs.text: Authors: Zhang Z et al. | Journal: Front Immunol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fimmu.2026.1790215 TL;DR: AI 與合成生物學的整合正在克服減毒 Salmonella 癌症免疫治療的歷史障礙 評: 嘻嘻 — 沙門氏菌當抗癌武器，AI 加合成電路設計讓它開始有了真的可能。

docs.title: Environmental resistome of culturable gram-negative bacilli from the Yaque del Norte River: baseline genomic evidence for one health surveillance
docs.text: Authors: Chevalier-Alba MF et al. | Journal: Front Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmicb.2026.1780969 TL;DR: 多明尼加 Yaque del Norte 河水中分離出攜帶多種抗藥基因的革蘭氏陰性桿菌 評: 不嘻嘻 — 河水裡住著 AMR 病原體，One Health 的環境監測不是選修課是必修課。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Molecularly imprinted metal-organic framework-based potentiometric sensor for sensitive detection of torsemide in dietary supplements and milk
docs.text: Authors: Heragy MO et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 04 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149504 TL;DR: 整合分子印跡聚合物與 MIL-101 的電位感測器可靈敏偵測補充品與牛奶中的 torsemide 評: 嘻嘻 — 減肥產品違法添加利尿劑，有了這個感測器就逃不掉了，食安偵探新工具。

docs.title: A corn protein-based copper nanozyme with laccase-mimicking activity for bisphenol A detection and plastic food packaging degradation
docs.text: Authors: Ren Z et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 04 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149503 TL;DR: 玉米蛋白合成的銅奈米酶兼具雙酚 A 偵測與塑膠食品包材降解能力 評: 嘻嘻 — 玉米蛋白造出多功能奈米酶，既能查毒又能分解包材，永續食安工具的好苗子。

docs.title: Potential of vacuum frying on the preparation of carrot crisps and a non-destructive technique for rapid acrylamide detection
docs.text: Authors: Kourimsky T et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 Apr 29 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149459 TL;DR: 真空油炸可將胡蘿蔔脆片的丙烯醯胺含量降低 83-93%，智慧型手機色彩法可快速篩檢 評: 嘻嘻 — 零食丙烯醯胺大幅降低，手機就能篩檢，食安工具越來越親民。

docs.title: Visualizing Fertisphere Dynamics: High-Resolution Chemical Imaging Reveals Distinct Phosphorus Release Patterns of Fast- and Slow-Acting Fertilizers
docs.text: Authors: Li XY et al. | Journal: J Agric Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1021/acs.jafc.5c13696 TL;DR: 高解析化學影像揭示速效與緩效磷肥在土壤中的磷釋放動態機制截然不同 評: 嘻嘻 — 知道磷肥怎麼在土裡釋放，才能精準施肥減少浪費，糧食安全從土開始優化。

docs.title: Morphometric Properties of Olive (Olea europaea) Pits: A Dataset for Cultivar Identification and Analysis
docs.text: Authors: Ben-Dor E et al. | Journal: Sci Data | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1038/s41597-026-07180-9 TL;DR: 建立 18 個橄欖品種的果核形態數據集，可支援考古與現代品種鑑定 評: 嘻嘻 — 用橄欖核形狀鑑定品種，不用 DNA 也能做，考古農業研究的好資料庫。

docs.title: Safety evaluation of the food enzyme glutaminase from the genetically modified Bacillus subtilis strain Glu3-3
docs.text: Authors: Zorn H et al. | Journal: EFSA J | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.2903/j.efsa.2026.10088 TL;DR: EFSA 評估基因改造枯草桿菌生產的麩醯胺酸酶，生產菌株含抗藥基因但酵素本身安全 評: 不嘻嘻 — 酵素本身沒毒，但生產菌株帶著抗藥基因且 DNA 殘留未充分排除，不上不下。

docs.title: The 2024 European Union report on pesticide residues in food
docs.text: Authors: Medina Pastor P et al. | Journal: EFSA J | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.2903/j.efsa.2026.10054 TL;DR: 2024 年歐盟食品農藥殘留監測：不合規率 1.2-3.6%，整體膳食暴露風險低 評: 嘻嘻 — 九萬多個樣品絕大多數合規，農藥膳食風險依然低，歐盟的食安監控穩定。

docs.title: Aquaculture facility-specific microbiota shape the zebrafish gut microbiome
docs.text: Authors: Evens KC et al. | Journal: Anim Microbiome | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1186/s42523-026-00573-6 TL;DR: 循環水產養殖設施的環境微生物群落顯著影響斑馬魚腸道菌相，且各設施差異大 評: 不嘻嘻 — 同批斑馬魚養在不同地方微生物組完全不同，跨機構微生物研究的可重複性又添隱憂。

docs.title: Effects of rinsing processes on the quality and frozen storage stability of sturgeon surimi sol: Physicochemical and structural characteristics
docs.text: Authors: Jiang Q et al. | Journal: J Sci Food Agric | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1002/jsfa.70697 TL;DR: 逆流漂洗法與多次漂洗在鱘魚魚漿品質上相當，但耗水量顯著減少 評: 嘻嘻 — 少用水又不降品質，魚糜加工往永續走，鱘魚副產品也能物盡其用。

docs.title: Assessing climate change effects on streamflow and paddy production in the Bharathapuzha Basin Kerala
docs.text: Authors: Nair GS et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-52356-3 TL;DR: CMIP6 氣候情境預測印度 Bharathapuzha 流域水文改變將衝擊稻米產量 評: 不嘻嘻 — 季風降雨本來就難預測，氣候變遷疊加上去，南亞糧食生產壓力只會越來越大。

docs.title: Transcriptomic and network analysis reveal methionine sulfoxide reductases dependent regulation of flagellar motility in Salmonella Typhimurium
docs.text: Authors: Chawara CK et al. | Journal: Microb Pathog | Date: 2026 May 04 DOI: 10.1016/j.micpath.2026.108522 TL;DR: 甲硫胺酸亞碸還原酶系統缺失顯著下調鼠傷寒沙門氏菌的鞭毛運動與毒力基因表現 評: 不嘻嘻 — 沙門氏菌的氧化壓力應對機制牽著毒力走，研究越細緻，對手越顯得難對付。

docs.title: The QseB/QseC two-component system modulates virulence, motility, and outer membrane vesicles biogenesis in Salmonella enteritidis
docs.text: Authors: Yang J et al. | Journal: Microb Pathog | Date: 2026 May 05 DOI: 10.1016/j.micpath.2026.108530 TL;DR: QseB/QseC 雙成分系統調控腸炎沙門氏菌的運動力、生物膜與外膜囊泡生成 評: 不嘻嘻 — 沙門氏菌的感應系統連外膜囊泡都在管，毒力調控網絡複雜得讓人頭疼。

docs.title: Microbial Quality Assessment of Farmers' Market Food Products in Central Virginia During the COVID-19 Pandemic
docs.text: Authors: Kim C et al. | Journal: Int J Food Sci | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1155/ijfo/1807052 TL;DR: COVID-19 期間維吉尼亞農夫市集食品中仍可檢出 Campylobacter、大腸桿菌、李斯特菌與沙門氏菌 評: 不嘻嘻 — 戴著口罩逛市集，買回家的菜裡照樣可能有食源性病原體，口罩擋不住細菌。

docs.title: Alkaline autofermentation of Nostoc muscorum enhances organic acid production and antimicrobial activity against Salmonella enterica and Campylobacter jejuni
docs.text: Authors: Neelakrishnan MK et al. | Journal: Front Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmicb.2026.1830932 TL;DR: 藍綠藻自發酵產生有機酸，對沙門氏菌與彎曲桿菌具抗菌活性，可作為抗生素替代品 評: 嘻嘻 — 藻類自發酵液對抗食源性病原體，動物飼料的天然抗菌替代品又多了一個選項。

docs.title: Core-genome multi-locus sequence types of the IncI1 plasmids identified in Salmonella enterica subsp. enterica serovars Heidelberg and Kentucky from Canadian poultry production are associated with factors related to production, year, and geographical region
docs.text:
Authors: Hetman B et al. | Journal: Can J Microbiol | Date: 2026 Apr 28 DOI: 10.1139/cjm-2026-0003 TL;DR: 加拿大家禽沙門氏菌中 IncI1 質粒的核心基因組分型揭示四個抗藥基因組群 評: 不嘻嘻 — 家禽場沙門氏菌帶著跨物種傳播抗藥性的 IncI1 質粒，持續監測是必要的。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-08)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-05-09
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 0、One Health × 10、Food Security × 10，共 20 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
docs.text: 今日無符合條件的新文章。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
The wild, wild west of plasmids: First insights into comparative genomics of Borrelia burgdorferi sensu lato
docs.text: Authors: Hepner S et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0346097 TL;DR: Borrelia burgdorferi s.l. 86株比較：質體高度可變，鼠類宿主質體數較多 評: 不嘻嘻 — 萊姆螺旋體把基因放在一堆會自由組合的質體裡，難怪一個世紀都搞不定。

docs.title: First Nationwide Assessment of Knowledge, Attitudes, and Practices Related to Tick-borne Diseases among Livestock Farmers in Bangladesh
docs.text: Authors: Ahmed MJ et al. | Journal: Acta Trop | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1016/j.actatropica.2026.108126 TL;DR: 孟加拉451位畜農中僅4.66%對蜱媒疾病知識足夠，21%知會人傳人 評: 不嘻嘻 — 教育落差讓蜱媒病在源頭就破口，光靠藥浴不會贏。

docs.title: Challenges, barriers and opportunities for neglected tropical disease programs of conflict-affected African countries
docs.text: Authors: Harding-Esch EM et al. | Journal: Int Health | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1093/inthealth/ihaf149 TL;DR: 衝突影響非洲NTD計畫面臨進入、社區、永續、財源等多重複合困境 評: 不嘻嘻 — 戰亂裡的被忽略熱帶病再被忽略一次，2030 NTD目標越走越遠。

docs.title: Armadillo meat consumption and Hansen's disease (leprosy): a case-control study in Brazil
docs.text: Authors: Repsold TAR et al. | Journal: Trans R Soc Trop Med Hyg | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1093/trstmh/trag054 TL;DR: 巴西病例對照：食用犰狳肉與痲瘋病風險aOR達16.5，支持人畜共通傳播 評: 不嘻嘻 — 犰狳肉真的會吃出痲瘋，美洲One Health監測該動了。

docs.title: Baylisascaris sp. (Nematoda: Ascaridae) in a Wild Specimen of Procyon cancrivorus (Cuvier, 1798) (Carnivora: Procyonidae) in Paraguay
docs.text: Authors: Vetter JR et al. | Journal: J Wildl Dis | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.7589/JWD-D-25-00184 TL;DR: 巴拉圭首例南美浣熊驗出Baylisascaris樣蟲卵，提示新興人畜共通風險 評: 不嘻嘻 — 浣熊蛔蟲在南美洲也報到，神經型幼蟲移行又多一片地圖。

docs.title: Next-generation sequencing in tick-borne apicomplexan parasites: approaches for Theileria and Babesia, a systematic review
docs.text: Authors: Mukandabvute D et al. | Journal: Trop Anim Health Prod | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1007/s11250-026-05056-z TL;DR: 系統回顧127篇 Theileria/Babesia定序研究，Nanopore直接RNA為新興方向 評: 嘻嘻 — 老牌寄生蟲被新定序技術重新拆解，疫苗靶點地圖逐漸清楚。

docs.title: Assessing antimicrobial resistance in Shiga toxin-producing Escherichia coli O157 isolates from human clinical cases in the United States, 2010-2021
docs.text: Authors: Bhatt T et al. | Journal: Future Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1080/17460913.2026.2671606 TL;DR: 美國STEC O157人類分離株2010-2021年tetracycline與SXT抗藥率持續上升 評: 不嘻嘻 — STEC不該用抗生素治療卻越來越抗藥，源頭顯然不在診間。

docs.title: Molecular detection and characterization of Anaplasma phagocytophilum-related strains and Hepatozoon spp. in domestic cats in eastern Türkiye
docs.text: Authors: Akgul O et al. | Journal: BMC Vet Res | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1186/s12917-026-05542-4 TL;DR: 土耳其東部家貓78.5%驗出Anaplasma phagocytophilum樣株AP-like 1 評: 不嘻嘻 — 家貓帶蜱媒病原比例高得驚人，獸醫該開始把貓也納入監測。

docs.title: Medium- and Large-sized Mammals on the Plateau: An Evolutionary Crucible for Zoonotic Pathogens - Ecological Drivers, Adaptive Evolution, and One Health Control
docs.text: Authors: Tan S et al. | Journal: Microb Ecol | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1007/s00248-026-02772-9 TL;DR: 中國四大高原中大型哺乳類為人畜共通病演化熱區，回顧呼籲One Health整合 評: 嘻嘻 — 高原生態被當作病原演化坩堝來分析，視角夠新鮮。

Seeding food security: Overcoming barriers to quality potato seed adoption among smallholders in Kenya

docs.title: Swedish veterinarians' perspectives on the work with Emergency Animal Diseases: part 2 - Crucial relationships and the position in-between
docs.text: Authors: Gröndal H et al. | Journal: Prev Vet Med | Date: 2026 May 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.prevetmed.2026.106910 TL;DR: 瑞典臨床獸醫處理緊急動物疫病高度仰賴與農民信任關係 評: 嘻嘻 — 證實「關係勞動」也是疫病防治硬實力，量化獸醫圈該認真看。

docs.text: Authors: Miller MR et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100798 TL;DR: 牛奶H5N1 PCR實驗室間比對顯示低濃度檢出能力差異大，方法選擇影響敏感度 評: 不嘻嘻 — 奶裡有H5N1卻有四分之三實驗室在低拷貝量驗不出，食安監測要重練。

docs.title: Mechanistically Informed and Omics-Guided Essential Oil Applications for Food Preservation
docs.text: Authors: Islam Bhuiyan MN et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100806 TL;DR: 精油食品保鮮回顧整合機制學、多體學與AI建模，仍待標準化與真實食品驗證 評: 嘻嘻 — 終於有人把精油從「替代醫學味」拉到組學驗證，乾淨標籤不再憑感覺。

docs.title: Marine Nematodes in Seafood: A Review of Food Safety Concerns, Advanced Detection Techniques, and Mitigation Strategies
docs.text: Authors: Ye X et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026 May 05 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100803 TL;DR: 海產線蟲回顧聚焦Anisakis與Pseudoterranova，HSI與分子檢測為新興工具 評: 不嘻嘻 — 你以為的生魚片風險只是冰山一角，凍得不夠就靠運氣。

docs.title: Rapid and Simultaneous Detection of Five Classical Staphylococcus aureus Enterotoxin Genes via Multiplex Melting Curve Analysis Using Self-Quenching Primers

docs.title: Orobanche cumana KAI2d2 mediates perception of dehydrocostus lactone and strigolactones and is inhibited by triazole ureas
docs.text: Authors: Shahul Hameed UF et al. | Journal: Plant Commun | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.xplc.2026.101889 TL;DR: 列當KAI2d2感知strigolactones與dehydrocostus，三氮唑脲可抑制萌發 評: 嘻嘻 — 寄生雜草終於有針對性開關，向日葵不用陪葬。

docs.title: Real-time analytical insights for disease surveillance and response during the severe drought and food security crisis, Somalia 2022-2023
docs.text: Authors: Polonsky JA et al. | Journal: Confl Health | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1186/s13031-026-00799-w TL;DR: 索馬利亞乾旱期間WHO-SIDE平台以Rt即時估計與情境投影支援疫病監測 評: 嘻嘻 — 在資源最緊的地方做最即時的疫情建模，工具實用就值得擴散。

docs.title: Zaxinone mimics boost growth and productivity of wheat under normal and low-nutrient regimes
docs.text:
Authors: Jalal A et al. | Journal: BMC Plant Biol | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1186/s12870-026-08895-y TL;DR: 仿生長因子MiZax3/5搭配50% NPK，小麥田間產量超越全量施肥8-11% 評: 嘻嘻 — 化肥砍半還能多收一成穀，永續農業終於不只是口號。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-09)

docs.title: Genomic insights into multidrug-resistant bacteria: Emergence of mcr-1.1 in Escherichia coli, blaKPC-2 in Klebsiella pneumoniae and Serratia marcescens from clinical settings

docs.title: Elucidating the regulatory role of the Shine-Dalgarno sequence in structural gene expression of the malolactic enzyme operon using a GFP/mCherry model
docs.text: Authors: Liu Z et al. | Journal: World J Microbiol Biotechnol | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1007/s11274-026-04999-7 TL;DR: SD2 序列在偶聯 operon 顯示架構特異、非線性的轉譯調控 評: 嘻嘻 — 為了釀酒乳酸菌做 SD 序列工程，連葡萄酒風味都能合成生物學化。

docs.title: Evolution and transmission landscape of the staphylococcal msrA gene mediating resistance to 14-membered macrolides and type B streptogramins

Polycationic nanopeptide-fused endolysins for the control of Mannheimia haemolytica

docs.title: Detection challenges of Escherichia coli O157 in raw meat: Diagnostic discordance between VIDAS, qPCR, and culture-based methods

docs.title: Dual-emission carbon dots for sensitive detection of sulfamethoxazole in milk samples
docs.text: Authors: Zou R et al. | Journal: Spectrochim Acta A Mol Biomol Spectrosc | Date: 2026 May 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.saa.2026.128023 TL;DR: N,P-CDs 雙模式螢光磷光探針可偵測牛奶中 sulfamethoxazole 殘留 評: 嘻嘻 — 碳點當奶粉緝凶犬，連磺胺類殘留都別想躲。

docs.title: Cross-species expression of OsDJ-1C from rice enhances tolerance to salinity and drought stress in tomato
docs.text:

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections

Expanding Xpert MTB/RIF Ultra and lateral flow urine lipoarabinomannan testing for diagnosis of tuberculosis among adults living with HIV admitted to hospitals in Tanzania and Mozambique (EXULTANT): a randomised controlled trial
docs.text: Authors: Cossa M et al. | Journal: Lancet Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1016/S1473-3099(26)00133-7 TL;DR: 擴大 Xpert Ultra 與 LF-LAM 對 HIV 住院病人篩檢未提升 TB 確診率，也未降低 8 週死亡（RCT, n=1172）。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 多撒一輪檢驗也救不了 HIV+TB 病人，瓶頸從來不在工具。

docs.title: The curious case of aplastic anemia: a fatal triple co-infection with Aspergillus, Mucorales, and Nocardia
docs.text: Authors: Sadeghi Borkehim S et al. | Journal: BMC Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1186/s12879-026-13190-0 TL;DR: 再生不良性貧血同時感染 Aspergillus、Mucorales、Nocardia 致死案例，持續中性球低下是無解門檻。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 三重感染加上中性球永遠不上來，抗生素只能在旁邊鞠躬。

docs.title: Albumin-corrected anion gap and 28-/90-day mortality in cirrhotic patients with invasive fungal infection: a retrospective cohort study
docs.text: Authors: Yin N et al. | Journal: BMC Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1186/s12879-026-13285-8 TL;DR: 肝硬化合併侵襲性真菌感染者，白蛋白校正陰離子間隙（ACAG≥20）獨立預測 28/90 日死亡（AUC 0.72）。 評: 嘻嘻 — 兩個常規生化就能算死亡風險，再串上 MELD 還能再加分。

docs.title: Pathogenic Mechanisms of Aspergillus lentulus Infection: Induction of Oxidative Stress and Tissue Damage in Galleria mellonella Larvae
docs.text: Authors: Zhang L et al. | Journal: Mycopathologia | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1007/s11046-026-01072-7 TL;DR: A. lentulus 在大蠟蛾幼蟲引發氧化壓力與腸道損傷，毒力低於 fumigatus，揭示 ROS 為潛在治療靶點。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 又一個多重抗藥真菌，下一步只能往「自由基你不要太囂張」這方向打。

docs.title: Cryptococcal meningitis in a patient with VEXAS syndrome: a case report
docs.text: Authors: Lin MC et al. | Journal: BMC Rheumatol | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1186/s41927-026-00648-6 TL;DR: VEXAS 患者長期類固醇加 ruxolitinib 出現 Cryptococcus 腦膜炎案例，呼籲常規抗黴菌篩檢與預防。 評: 不嘻嘻 — VEXAS 本身就難搞，再加 cryptococcus 簡直把感染科考題集滿。

docs.title: Quantitative interpretation models for targeted next-generation sequencing in lower respiratory tract infections: a multicenter prospective study
docs.text: Authors: Jing C et al. | Journal: Respir Res | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1186/s12931-026-03690-7 TL;DR: 下呼吸道感染 tNGS 加 RPKM／copy 量化模型敏感度 82.4%、特異度 85.0%，勝過培養與單純定性判讀。 評: 嘻嘻 — 終於有人幫 NGS 訂「多少 reads 算病原」的閾值，臨床判讀不用再各說各話。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Self-assembled EDIII/NS1 nanoparticle vaccines elicit protective immune responses against Japanese encephalitis virus
docs.text: Authors: Tang C et al. | Journal: Antiviral Res | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.antiviral.2026.106433 TL;DR: 自組裝 mi3-EDIII＋mi3-NS1 奈米顆粒疫苗在小鼠誘發中和抗體與 CD4 T 反應，完整保護 JEV 攻擊。 評: 嘻嘻 — SpyTag/SpyCatcher 把日本腦炎疫苗組裝得更精緻，下一代 flavivirus 疫苗看到一線光。

docs.title: Animal listeriosis in Germany: An update for the current situation over 2 years (2024-2025) and the need for a surveillance system in the animal health sector
docs.text: Authors: Wareth G et al. | Journal: Vet Res | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1186/s13567-026-01755-5 TL;DR: 德國 2024–2025 動物 Listeriosis 通報 341 件 652 隻，集中於牛羊禽，環境到人傳播鏈仍是黑盒子。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 監測十年模式沒變，環境怎麼跑到人身上的，依然不知道。

docs.title: Non-penicillin -susceptible and linezolid-non-susceptible Streptococcus suis clonal complex 233 from humans
docs.text: Authors: Hatrongjit R et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-52331-y TL;DR: 泰國 S. suis CC233 在生豬肉暴發後持續，部分株對 penicillin 中等抗藥且非感受 linezolid。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 連 linezolid 都守不住的 S. suis，加上生肉文化，這是 One Health 模板級災難。

docs.title: Individual activity of forest rodents correlates to pathogen communities
docs.text: Authors: A Eccard J et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-51276-6 TL;DR: 野生齧齒類個性影響病原體分布；活躍者較易帶 Bartonella，大膽者壁蝨感染率較低。 評: 嘻嘻 — 老鼠也有 MBTI 了，疫病模型多了一個有趣的維度。

docs.title: Non-Mastomys rodents harbour ancient Lassa virus lineages within Benin and Nigeria's Guinea savanna belt
docs.text: Authors: Olayemi A et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-51525-8 TL;DR: 貝南／奈及利亞 Guinea 草原帶找到 Mus baoulei 與 Lemniscomys striatus 攜帶古老 Lassa lineage VIII/IX。 評: 不嘻嘻 — Lassa 又多兩種儲存宿主，貝南中部成為新熱區，公衛地圖再畫一次。

docs.title: Worldwide Hotspots and Ecological Drivers of Canine Echinococcus granulosus sensu lato: Space-Time Scan Statistics and Maxent Modelling from a Systematic Evidence Base
docs.text: Authors: Kesik HK et al. | Journal: Acta Trop | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.actatropica.2026.108132 TL;DR: 系統評析定位犬源 E. granulosus s.l. 七大區域熱點（東亞、南美、歐北非、中東），年均溫與海拔為主要驅動因子。 評: 嘻嘻 — 把全球包蟲熱區畫得這麼清楚，公衛資源分配總算有實證地圖。

docs.title: Breaking the culture habit: Complementing culture-based veterinary diagnostics with metagenomic data -A case study of feline and canine skin infections
docs.text: Authors: Ottesen A et al. | Journal: BMC Vet Res | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1186/s12917-026-05476-x TL;DR: 貓犬皮膚感染檢體合用培養與總體基因體，可同時抓病原、抗藥基因與多菌相，輔助 One Health 抗生素管理。 評: 嘻嘻 — 培養只看到冰山，metagenomics 把水底都照出來，獸醫抗生素管理有新工具。

docs.title: The World's Burden of Chronic Respiratory Disease: An Epidemiological Review of Asthma, COPD, Interstitial Lung Disease, and Smoking in the 21st Century
docs.text: Authors: Soriano JB et al. | Journal: Arch Bronconeumol | Date: 2026 Apr 23 DOI: 10.1016/j.arbres.2026.03.013 TL;DR: 21 世紀慢性呼吸疾病（氣喘、COPD、ILD、吸菸）負擔回顧，倡議結合 One Health 與「行星呼吸醫學」框架。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 又一篇 review 喊「我們要 One Health」，沒新數據，框架已熟到要起繭。

docs.title: Benign-by-design chemistry: Reinventing ligand-based drug design at the edge of AI
docs.text: Authors: López-López E et al. | Journal: Drug Discov Today | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.drudis.2026.104691 TL;DR: 倡議將安全性、永續性與多藥理性納入 AI 配體導向藥物設計，跳脫單純追求 potency。 評: 嘻嘻 — AI 終於要學「設計時就少毒少污染」，藥物開發倫理化路線圖。

docs.title: Oral immunization with attenuated Salmonella enterica serovar Enteritidis expressing dual-toxin antigen induces protective immunity against avian necrotic enteritis
docs.text: Authors: Li W et al. | Journal: Vaccine | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128684 TL;DR: 減毒 S. Enteritidis 表達 PlcC＋NetB 雙抗原口服疫苗誘發黏膜／體液／細胞免疫，保護家禽免於壞死性腸炎。 評: 嘻嘻 — 一隻沙門桿菌打兩個敵人，禽類疫苗策略很經濟。

docs.title: Identification and protective efficacy characterization of novel immunogenic antigens for Salmonella Enteritidis vaccines
docs.text: Authors: Zhao Y et al. | Journal: Poult Sci | Date: 2026 May 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.psj.2026.107033 TL;DR: 在禽類找到 SipC（同源 66.7%、異源株 50% 保護）與 TolC，做為次世代廣效 S. Enteritidis 疫苗候選抗原。 評: 嘻嘻 — 找到能跨株保護的抗原，禽場最怕的沙門桿菌可能有新解。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Ultrasensitive and selective detection of metronidazole residues in milk powder using a novel 3D MOF fluorescent sensor
docs.text: Authors: Zhang X et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 05 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149509 TL;DR: 兩種 MOF 螢光探針偵測奶粉中 metronidazole 殘留，偵測極限低至 37 nM，回收率 97–102%。 評: 嘻嘻 — 奶粉裡的甲硝唑都抓得到，食品殘藥檢驗成本可望降。

docs.title: Prevalence, genetic diversity, and drug-resistance of Listeria monocytogenes ST8 in enoki mushrooms: Comparative genomic and phenotypic analysis with meat and clinical ST8 isolates
docs.text: Authors: Lyu J et al. | Journal: Int J Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijfoodmicro.2026.111825 TL;DR: 上海金針菇 L. monocytogenes 污染率 46%，ST8 為優勢型且多重抗藥、對 JEG-3 細胞侵襲性高。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 金針菇變成 Listeria 派對場地，孕婦看到這篇要更小心。

docs.title: A multi-decadal assessment dataset of soil organic matter in the Sanjiang Plain black soil region (1984-2023)
docs.text: Authors: Zhang Y et al. | Journal: Sci Data | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1038/s41597-026-07401-1 TL;DR: 釋出三江平原 1984–2023 黑土層有機質 40 年資料集（R²=0.72），近年部分區域因保育政策回升。 評: 嘻嘻 — 四十年黑土資料開放，農地碳管理研究有實打實的時間序列可用。

docs.title: Tracking pesticide residues: The fate of epoxiconazole and prochloraz from orchard to apple products
docs.text: Authors: Huang L et al. | Journal: J Sci Food Agric | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1002/jsfa.70692 TL;DR: 蘋果加工中清洗加榨汁可去除 80% 以上 epoxiconazole 與 prochloraz 殘留，飲食曝露風險遠低於 100% IEDI。 評: 嘻嘻 — 蘋果汁洗掉八成農藥，加工流程在這題上幫了大忙。

docs.title: Plant-level microbiological food quality and operational food protection indicators in a Taiwanese chilled meat processing plant: A 24-month retrospective study
docs.text: Authors: Chi NC et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100808 TL;DR: 台灣冷藏肉品廠 2019→2020 強化監測後總菌數降 13%、大腸桿菌群降 61%、退貨率同步下滑。 評: 嘻嘻 — 認真做監測就真的有效，台灣冷藏肉廠範例可以推廣。

docs.title: Effect of Salmonella Cluster Detection and Investigation Methods on Outbreak Reporting in the United States 2013-2017
docs.text: Authors: Booth HA et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100809 TL;DR: 美國各州標準化 PFGE 群集偵測與訪談流程使 Salmonella 暴發通報增加 40–155%，FoodCORE／OBNE 放大效果。 評: 嘻嘻 — 系統性監測就是會報得多，公衛投資對食源性疫情有看得見的回報。

docs.title: Phenotypic and Metabolic Diversity of Salmonella Isolates from Agricultural Creek Sediment
docs.text: Authors: Oh S et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100807 TL;DR: 美國中大西洋 Conococheague Creek 沉積物 16 株 Salmonella 表現多樣壓力耐受與血清型，環境儲存庫不可忽視。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 灌溉用河床底泥住著一堆耐酸耐鹼 Salmonella，前端防護要從水源做起。

docs.title: Host Factor Induced Bacterial Extracellular Vesicles Promote Horizontal Gene Transfer in Vibrio cholerae
docs.text:
Authors: Fleischhacker D et al. | Journal: J Extracell Vesicles | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1002/jev2.70301 TL;DR: 膽汁與 mitomycin C 誘導 V. cholerae 釋出富含核酸的細胞外囊泡，在腸道顯著促進抗藥基因水平轉移。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 霍亂弧菌在腸道裡被膽汁一刺激就互相傳抗藥基因，大自然版的 USB。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-11)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-05-12
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 24、One Health × 11、Food Security × 14，共 49 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Impact of introducing RTS,S/AS01E malaria vaccine on mortality in young children in Ghana, Kenya, and Malawi: an observational evaluation of a cluster-randomised implementation programme
docs.text: Authors: Mwapasa V et al. | Journal: Lancet | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1016/S0140-6736(26)00248-5 TL;DR: RTS,S 瘧疾疫苗在迦納、肯亞、馬拉威使兒童死亡率下降 13%，每 8 死可避免 1 例。 評: 嘻嘻 — 疫苗加上 46 個月耐心追蹤，終於拿到死亡率端點，公衛最迷人的時刻。

docs.title: A comprehensive method for quantifying human cytomegalovirus plaque assays
docs.text: Authors: Kelnhofer-Millevolte LE et al. | Journal: Front Cell Infect Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fcimb.2026.1818664 TL;DR: 利用 crystal violet 螢光與 ImageJ 開發 hCMV plaque assay 自動量化流程。 評: 嘻嘻 — 老到不能再老的 plaque assay 終於升級成自動化，技術冷飯炒得很香。

docs.title: Clinical features and prognostic factors of adult systemic chronic active EBV disease: A retrospective analysis in Japan
docs.text: Authors: Fuseya A et al. | Journal: Br J Haematol | Date: 2026 May 10 DOI: 10.1111/bjh.70532 TL;DR: 日本 46 例成人 sCAEBV，3 年存活 43%，未移植者 8 個月內全亡，高 ALT、ferritin 預後最差。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 成人 sCAEBV 不做 allo-HSCT 幾乎沒退路，這個風險模型只是告訴你誰更慘。

docs.title: Secondary Malignancies after Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplantation
docs.text: Authors: Cantó PA et al. | Journal: Transplant Cell Ther | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1016/j.jtct.2026.04.025 TL;DR: HCT 後 4.9% 出現次發癌，PTLD 1 年存活僅 19%，高齡與既往癌症為主要風險。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 救活了之後又長新癌，移植醫療的福報就是有更多時間長腫瘤。

docs.title: Efficacy of low-dose rituximab as preemptive treatment of EBV DNA-emia after allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation
docs.text: Authors: Wang Y et al. | Journal: Transplant Cell Ther | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1016/j.jtct.2026.04.052 ✅ 2026-05-12 TL;DR: 低劑量 rituximab 100–200 mg 治 allo-HSCT 後 EBV DNA-emia 清除率 93.9%，PTLD 比率持平。 評: 嘻嘻 — 用 1/3 劑量達到一樣效果，藥廠想必非常開心（並沒有）。

docs.title: Tuberculosis in the South America's homeless: a systematic review of social determinants, control strategies and health equity
docs.text: Authors: Ramos EM et al. | Journal: Rev Esc Enferm USP | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1590/1980-220X-REEUSP-2025-0222en TL;DR: 南美遊民 TB 治療放棄率 36%，TB-HIV 共感染死亡率提升 3 倍，社會保護缺失是主因。 評: 不嘻嘻 — TB 在 2026 還在用社會結構決定誰會死，醫療只是配角。

docs.title: Invasive mold infections in the pediatric setting: current status and new developments
docs.text: Authors: Warris A et al. | Journal: Expert Rev Anti Infect Ther | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1080/14787210.2026.2672541 TL;DR: 兒童侵襲性黴菌感染回顧：isavuconazole 加入兒科兵器庫，但療效定位仍待研究。 評: 嘻嘻 — 兒科終於不只有 voriconazole 一條路，多一個 triazole 就少一點絕望。

docs.title: Fast-tracking fungal detection: a rapid flow cytometric method for the detection of yeasts in blood cultures
docs.text: Authors: Kopczyk MK et al. | Journal: Front Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmicb.2026.1813126 TL;DR: 流式細胞儀加雙螢光標記 1 小時內偵測血培酵母菌，LOD 2.87×10³ cells/mL。 評: 嘻嘻 — 把幾天才報的血培菌種壓到 1 小時，重症室會非常愛這個工具。

docs.title: Molecular characterization of cytomegalovirus based on glycoprotein B and N among solid organ and hematopoietic stem cell transplant recipients in Jordan
docs.text: Authors: Alathamneh RY et al. | Journal: Iran J Microbiol | Date: 2026 Feb DOI: 10.18502/ijm.v18i1.20937 TL;DR: 約旦 80 例移植 CMV 基因型：KT 以 gN1+gN2 混合型為主，HSCT 以 gB2 占多數。 評: 嘻嘻 — 中東 CMV 基因型流行病學再添一筆，臨床意義要再等十篇 paper。

docs.title: Candiduria in catheterized ICU patients: epidemiology, molecular identification, and antifungal susceptibility
docs.text: Authors: Ahmadi A et al. | Journal: Iran J Microbiol | Date: 2026 Feb DOI: 10.18502/ijm.v18i1.20939 TL;DR: 伊朗 ICU 導尿管 candiduria 35%，C. glabrata 占 51%，症狀者 fluconazole 失敗達 50%。 評: 不嘻嘻 — C. glabrata 已是 ICU 主角，fluconazole 還沒退休但也快了。

docs.title: Clinical profile and outcome of COVID-19 associated mucormycosis in Shiraz, South Iran: a longitudinal study
docs.text: Authors: Kouhi P et al. | Journal: Iran J Microbiol | Date: 2026 Feb DOI: 10.18502/ijm.v18i1.20940 TL;DR: 伊朗 CAM 62 例：住院死亡 40%、1 年 48%，≥60 歲為最強預後因子 (OR 5.47–7.65)。 評: 不嘻嘻 — COVID 結束了，黑黴菌沒退，故事還沒完。

docs.title: Can histopathology predict survival in mucormycosis? A retrospective analysis
docs.text: Authors: Saxena S et al. | Journal: Med J Armed Forces India | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1016/j.mjafi.2025.02.008 TL;DR: 印度 63 例鼻眶 mucormycosis：眶內侵犯預後最差，granuloma 形成者存活較好。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 病理找到一些存活線索，治療端依然血腥（字面意義）。

docs.title: Ten tips on management of BK nephropathy in kidney transplant patients
docs.text: Authors: Geddes CC et al. | Journal: Clin Kidney J | Date: 2026 Apr DOI: 10.1093/ckj/sfag061 TL;DR: BK 腎病管理 10 提示：腎移植切片應做 SV40 染色，目前抗 BK 藥物試驗皆無效。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 寫了 10 條提示，重點是「我們其實沒什麼武器」。

docs.title: Isolated Cerebellar Abscess by Nocardia cyriacigeorgica in an Immunocompetent Patient: A Case Report and Systematic Review
docs.text: Authors: Ocampo-Navia MI et al. | Journal: Asian J Neurosurg | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1055/s-0045-1813712 TL;DR: 免疫正常成人小腦 Nocardia cyriacigeorgica 膿瘍個案，立體定位引流加標靶抗生素治癒。 評: 嘻嘻 — 免疫正常還是被 Nocardia 偷襲，世界果然處處充滿驚喜。

docs.title: Analysis of Cytomegalovirus Infection Affecting the Stomach
docs.text: Authors: Diao Y et al. | Journal: Gastroenterol Res Pract | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1155/grp/4842972 TL;DR: 44 例 CMV 胃炎回顧：54.5% 黏膜潰瘍、27.3% 糜爛，2.3% 進展為胃癌。 評: 不嘻嘻 — CMV 一進胃就讓人想到「下一個是癌嗎」，不能說很安心。

docs.title: Comparative clinical features and outcomes of invasive pulmonary aspergillosis following influenza versus COVID-19: a retrospective cohort study
docs.text: Authors: Zhang R et al. | Journal: Front Med (Lausanne) | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmed.2026.1790007 TL;DR: 中國 CAPA 較 IAPA 14 天死亡風險高 4.92 倍，皮質類固醇與淋巴球低下是 CAPA 特徵。 評: 不嘻嘻 — CAPA 的死神在前 14 天就出手，過了那關才能慢慢談治療。

docs.title: Analytic Considerations for the Evaluation of Tuberculosis Preventative Therapy Effectiveness Among People Living with HIV
docs.text: Authors: Schader LM et al. | Journal: Obs Stud | Date: 2025 DOI: 10.1353/obs.2025.a973070 TL;DR: 多國 PROTECT 研究：以 EHR 評估 PLWH 結核預防治療效果的分析方法學框架。 評: 嘻嘻 — 方法學論文本身不刺激，但能讓 TPT 政策評估不再用估的。

docs.title: Heart Transplant Outcomes in Chemotherapy-Induced vs. Non-Ischemic-Dilated Cardiomyopathy: Pediatric and Adult Recipients in the Ventricular Assist Device Era
docs.text: Authors: Das BB et al. | Journal: Rev Cardiovasc Med | Date: 2026 Apr DOI: 10.31083/RCM48253 TL;DR: 化療誘發心肌病心臟移植：成人存活優於非缺血性 DCM (HR 0.78)，兒科兩組無異。 評: 嘻嘻 — 癌症倖存者換心也能活得好，腫瘤心臟科又拿到一個正向證據。

docs.title: High cytomegalovirus antibody concentrations and lower lung function in persons with HIV who smoke
docs.text: Authors: Christiansen JT et al. | Journal: Ann Am Thorac Soc | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1093/annalsats/aaoag121 TL;DR: HIV 病人高 CMV IgG 與 FEV1 下降相關，吸菸者尤明顯 (-292.8 mL)。 評: 不嘻嘻 — HIV 加 CMV 加吸菸的三重組合，肺果然撐不住。

docs.title: Seroprevalence of Strongyloides stercoralis Among Pediatric Solid Organ Transplant Candidates at a Tertiary Pediatric Medical Center in the United States
docs.text: Authors: Otto W et al. | Journal: Pediatr Transplant | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1111/petr.70334 TL;DR: 美國非流行區兒童移植 Strongyloides 血清陽性 3.4%，風險篩檢漏掉一半個案。 評: 嘻嘻 — 全院普篩才抓得到一半的 Strongyloides，剛好支持普篩派。

docs.title: Real-life experience with maribavir for the treatment of cytomegalovirus infection in solid organ transplant recipients
docs.text: Authors: Boán J et al. | Journal: Enferm Infecc Microbiol Clin (Engl Ed) | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1016/j.eimce.2026.503145 ✅ 2026-05-12 TL;DR: SOT 患者 maribavir 真實世界臨床反應 72%、失敗 26%，已出現雙抗藥 (MBV+GCV) 1 例。 評: 嘻嘻 — MBV 對 ganciclovir 失敗者算救命稻草，但抗藥已悄悄出現。

docs.title: Risk factors for drug-induced liver injury in people with HIV on anti-tuberculosis treatment
docs.text: Authors: Martínez-Ayala P et al. | Journal: Enferm Infecc Microbiol Clin (Engl Ed) | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1016/j.eimce.2026.503041 TL;DR: HIV+TB 121 人 DILI 41%：低 BMI、低 CD4、高 ALT 加 ART 為主因，3 個月死亡 OR 6.4。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 越虛的人越容易被治療打倒，這就是 HIV+TB 共病的殘酷算式。

docs.title: When the host is not healthy: Rethinking tuberculosis drug targets in comorbid conditions
docs.text: Authors: Meskini M et al. | Journal: Tuberculosis (Edinb) | Date: 2026 May 05 DOI: 10.1016/j.tube.2026.102781 TL;DR: 結核藥物應以共病為導向設計：DM、HIV、營養不良改寫宿主代謝，重塑藥物標的策略。 評: 嘻嘻 — 終於有人說「健康宿主模型」其實不太代表真實世界，給研究界一巴掌。

docs.title: Renal mucormycosis caused by Apophysomyces species: case report and literature review
docs.text: Authors: Zhang X et al. | Journal: J Mycol Med | Date: 2026 Apr 30 DOI: 10.1016/j.mycmed.2026.101627 TL;DR: Apophysomyces 腎臟 mucormycosis 個案與文獻：多見於免疫正常者，mNGS 助早期診斷。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 連腎臟都會中招的免疫正常 mucor，已經不知道該怎麼防。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Evaluation of the implementation of the One Health approach in Guinea: Application of the NEOH framework to decentralized One Health platforms
docs.text: Authors: Bongono EF et al. | Journal: One Health | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.onehlt.2026.101428 TL;DR: 幾內亞 8 個區域 One Health 平台成熟度落差大，資訊共享與系統組織最弱。 評: 嘻嘻 — 把 One Health 從口號變成可量化的指標，至少知道哪邊還在睡覺。

docs.title: Beyond the eschar: African tick-bite fever in a returning traveller - a diagnostic and public health consideration in Europe
docs.text: Authors: Bogacka A et al. | Journal: One Health | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.onehlt.2026.101432 TL;DR: 歐洲返國旅客 African tick-bite fever (R. africae) 個案：doxycycline 治癒。 評: 嘻嘻 — 還是 doxycycline 萬能，旅遊醫學每年都要被 R. africae 提醒一次。

docs.title: Comparative genomic surveillance of fluoroquinolone resistance markers across major riverine hotspots by leveraging public metagenomes
docs.text: Authors: Ramesh K et al. | Journal: Int J Antimicrob Agents | Date: 2026 May 08 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijantimicag.2026.107839 TL;DR: 五大河元基因體：qnrS2、qepA2 為最常見 FQR 基因，與金屬抗性基因共選擇。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 河水裡都是 qnr，下次喝水請順便謝謝抗生素濫用大環境。

docs.title: One Health genomic insights into environmental and animal reservoirs of community-associated Clostridioides difficile in Japan
docs.text: Authors: Yoshizawa S et al. | Journal: Appl Environ Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1128/aem.00397-26 TL;DR: 日本 CA-CDI 基因體：土壤 51%、寵物 30% 帶 C. difficile，ST42 株人犬土壤間共享。 評: 嘻嘻 — 公園散步順便帶回 C. difficile 紀念品，遛狗醫師應該特別有感。

docs.title: Diversity of fecal viromes and zoonotic risk assessment in captive wild felids using viral metagenomics
docs.text: Authors: Yin M et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 10 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-52077-7 TL;DR: 圈養虎豹糞便病毒體：18 病毒科，偵測到 VARV 與 FeLV 同源序列，動物園需警惕。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 在虎糞裡撈出類痘病毒序列，動物園公關可能要熬夜了。

docs.title: Characterization of novel macrophage cell lines derived from goat and sheep blood and their susceptibility to ruminant virus infections
docs.text: Authors: Ikeda R et al. | Journal: Microbiol Spectr | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1128/spectrum.03540-25 TL;DR: 建立可永生化山羊與綿羊巨噬細胞株 iGBM 與 iOBM，作為反芻動物病毒研究平台。 評: 嘻嘻 — 反芻動物獸醫終於有自己的細胞株玩具，不用再借豬的。

docs.title: Leptospirosis-associated meningitis in an urban tropical endemic setting in northeastern Brazil: Three New cases and a meta-summary of 176 reported cases
docs.text: Authors: Gadelha Farias LAB et al. | Journal: PLoS Negl Trop Dis | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pntd.0014315 TL;DR: 巴西 leptospirosis 腦膜炎 3 例加文獻 176 例：CSF 淋巴球為主、糖正常、蛋白升高。 評: 嘻嘻 — 想像不到的 leptospirosis 又冒出腦膜炎這一招，巴西 ID 醫師加薪。

docs.title: Three Leishmania species identified in domestic dogs in Tunisia: New insights into canine leishmaniosis
docs.text: Authors: Zribi L et al. | Journal: PLoS Negl Trop Dis | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pntd.0014299 TL;DR: 突尼西亞犬 Leishmania 陽性率 33%，首見 L. tropica，犬可同時宿主三種 Leishmania。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 一隻狗能裝下三種 Leishmania，地中海 vector-borne 控制計畫又難一級。

docs.title: Identification and genetic characterization of a distinct genotype of Puumala orthohantavirus in Hebei Province, China
docs.text: Authors: Cai Y et al. | Journal: PLoS Negl Trop Dis | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pntd.0014250 TL;DR: 中國河北野鼠中發現新型 Puumala orthohantavirus Guyuan 株，與北海道株最相近。 評: 嘻嘻 — 草原野鼠裡又撈出一支新 hantavirus，動物源頭監控組請更新名單。

docs.title: Chimeric virus-like particles of nodavirus displaying human and avian influenza A M2e induce conserved anamnestic protective immunity against human and avian influenza A viruses
docs.text: Authors: Fatimah MNN et al. | Journal: Vet Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 05 DOI: 10.1016/j.vetmic.2026.111054 TL;DR: 嵌合 M2e VLP 疫苗在鼠 100% 抵禦 H1N1/H3N2，雞中加速 H9N2/H5N2 清除。 評: 嘻嘻 — 通用流感疫苗候選又冒出一支，雖然小鼠快有 100 個版本要選。

docs.title: Wild birds as environmental reservoirs of antimicrobial-resistant Salmonella: a global systematic review and meta-analysis
docs.text: Authors: Ntakiyisumba E et al. | Journal: Front Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmicb.2026.1787396 TL;DR: 全球野鳥 Salmonella 盛行 5.77%，亞洲最高 10%，macrolide 抗藥 30%，FQ 逐年上升。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 連野鳥都帶 macrolide 抗藥 Salmonella，環境抗藥壓力已經爆表。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Recent progress in the effects and mechanisms of non-thermal technologies on alleviating food allergy
docs.text: Authors: Ju H et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149530 TL;DR: 非熱加工技術降低食物過敏原性的機制與 AI 整合應用回顧，含多種物理化學方法。 評: 嘻嘻 — 食品加工又想用冷電漿解決過敏問題，理論上很酷，產業端再說。

docs.title: Sustainable Development of Marginal Lands for Food Security: Advances, Ecological Constraints, and Remediation Strategies
docs.text: Authors: Wu C et al. | Journal: J Agric Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1021/acs.jafc.5c13562 TL;DR: 全球 2.7 億公頃邊際土地利用策略回顧：分子育種、智慧農業與工程修復。 評: 嘻嘻 — 「邊際地能變糧倉」是好聽的故事，落地還是看政府跟農夫想不想配合。

docs.title: Scientific opinion on the modification of the terms of authorisation of the preparations of Lactiplantibacillus plantarumCNCM I-3235, Pediococcus acidilacticiCNCM I-3237, Pediococcus pentosaceusNCIMB 12455, Acidipropionibacterium acidipropioniciCNCM I-4661 and Lentilactobacillus hilgardiiCNCM I-4785 as feed additives for all animal species (Danstar Ferment AG)
docs.text: Authors: Villa RE et al. | Journal: EFSA J | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.2903/j.efsa.2026.10076 TL;DR: EFSA 修訂 5 株乳酸菌與丙酸菌飼料添加劑允可條款，新增 DSMZ 編號。 評: 嘻嘻 — 純粹的行政技術修訂，但讀完才發現 EFSA 一年要審多少件這種小事。

docs.title: Postharvest Losses Along the Small-Scale Fish Value Chain in Bangladesh: Perceptions, Determinants and Implications for Food Security
docs.text: Authors: Islam MJ et al. | Journal: Food Sci Nutr | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1002/fsn3.71809 TL;DR: 孟加拉小規模漁業 PHL 農民 10%、貿易商 12%，天氣與處理不當為主因。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 12% 的魚還沒到嘴就壞了，糧食安全要從冷鏈開始補。

docs.title: The Antiglycative Effect and Potential Mechanism of LbGp in BSA-Fru Models and Biscuit
docs.text: Authors: Gong P et al. | Journal: J Food Sci | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1111/1750-3841.71097 TL;DR: 枸杞醣肽 LbGp 在 BSA-Fru 模型與餅乾抑制 AGE 形成，餅乾加 4% LbGp 降 AGE 33.5%。 評: 嘻嘻 — 餅乾配枸杞抗糖化，老中醫看了眼角微笑。

docs.title: Microalgae in Food Science: Applications of Omics Approaches for Functional Ingredients, Safety, and Health
docs.text: Authors: Acharjee MR et al. | Journal: J Food Sci | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1111/1750-3841.71134 TL;DR: 微藻食品 omics 整合回顧：應用於菌株篩選、安全評估、功能性成分開發。 評: 嘻嘻 — 微藻加 omics 是萬用文獻關鍵字組合，下一篇可能就是 LLM 自動產出。

docs.title: Advancing food equity through explainable AI: identifying place-based factors and conditions of food security
docs.text: Authors: Hoglund L et al. | Journal: Front Public Health | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fpubh.2026.1717358 TL;DR: 用 XAI 與 IRL 解析食品安全行為因子：家庭健康、支出與店訪頻率為主驅動。 評: 嘻嘻 — 用 AI 講「貧富決定吃什麼」，技術很潮，結論一點都不新。

docs.title: Brick-and-mortar food retail implementation of a nutrition incentive program using Electronic Benefit Transfer integration in Southern California
docs.text: Authors: Houghtaling B et al. | Journal: Transl Behav Med | Date: 2026 Jan 07 DOI: 10.1093/tbm/ibag020 TL;DR: 加州 SNAP EBT 蔬果獎勵計畫實作評估：零售商整體感受佳，領導與員工存認知落差。 評: 嘻嘻 — 補助蔬果計畫居然真的能落地，雖然員工跟主管像在不同公司。

docs.title: Aflatoxin Biocontrol Using Native Atoxigenic Aspergillus
docs.text: Authors: Ortega-Beltran A et al. | Journal: Annu Rev Phytopathol | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1146/annurev-phyto-011325-114015 TL;DR: 用本土無毒 A. flavus 競爭株生物防治作物 aflatoxin，農民田試可降毒 80%。 評: 嘻嘻 — 用 A. flavus 對抗 A. flavus，黴菌界內鬥變成糧食安全的解法。

docs.title: Self-Assembled Microsphere-Integrated SERS Microneedles for the 3D Mapping of Agrochemicals Penetration in Fresh Produce
docs.text: Authors: Wang Q et al. | Journal: Anal Chem | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1021/acs.analchem.6c00574 TL;DR: SERS 微針加銀奈米線陣列偵測 thiram、TBZ 至 10⁻¹⁰ M，3D 視覺化農藥滲透分布。 評: 嘻嘻 — 蔬菜表面 SERS 微針，農藥殘留偵測進到 3D 地圖時代。

docs.title: Commercial and on-farm microbial bioinputs production systems: challenges, opportunities and current Brazilian regulatory framework
docs.text: Authors: Xavier VL et al. | Journal: Braz J Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1007/s42770-026-01955-3 TL;DR: 巴西自製農場微生物 bioinput 生產系統存 E. coli、Salmonella 等污染風險，需品管。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 農家自製益生菌結果跑出 Salmonella，這算另一種農作物豐收。

docs.title: Antibacterial mechanisms of terpinen-4-ol against Aeromonas hydrophila
docs.text: Authors: Lian K et al. | Journal: Arch Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1007/s00203-026-04944-0 TL;DR: terpinen-4-ol 抑 A. hydrophila MIC 7.56 mM，破膜、抗 biofilm、升 ROS。 評: 嘻嘻 — 茶樹精油把養殖場惡霸 A. hydrophila 修理到爆膜，水產業可以期待。

docs.title: Exploring the antimicrobial potential of plant-based bioactive compounds in meat products: advances in mechanistic insights, pathogen inhibition, and shelf-life extension
docs.text: Authors: Awlqadr FH et al. | Journal: Crit Rev Food Sci Nutr | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1080/10408398.2026.2670727 TL;DR: 植物 bioactive 抗菌物在肉品保鮮回顧：對 Listeria、E. coli、Salmonella 等多種病原皆有效。 評: 嘻嘻 — 又一篇「天然抗菌物拯救肉品」回顧，希望有一天能寫進規範裡。

docs.title: First report of ciprofloxacin-resistant Salmonella Enteritidis isolated from human cases in Morocco
docs.text:
Authors: Elmourabit H et al. | Journal: J Infect Dev Ctries | Date: 2026 Apr 30 DOI: 10.3855/jidc.22350 TL;DR: 摩洛哥首見人類 ciprofloxacin 抗藥 S. Enteritidis：gyrA D87Y 加 mdsA/B efflux。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 摩洛哥也輪到 cipro-R Salmonella 出場，全球 FQR 地圖再補一塊。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-12)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-05-13
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 18、One Health × 10、Food Security × 11，共 39 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Changes in Epidemiology of Candidemia in the United States with a Focus on Candida auris
docs.text: Authors: Pérez MA et al. | Journal: Clin Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1093/cid/ciag312 TL;DR: 美國十年念珠菌血症監測：C. auris 比例上升、30 天死亡率攀至 31.8%，並集中於黑人與腎衰竭族群。 評: 不嘻嘻 — C. auris 悄悄攀升念珠菌血症排行榜，順手把 30 天死亡率一起拉高，真是全能型壞消息。

docs.title: Evaluation of persistence of C. auris colonization
docs.text: Authors: Bavastro M et al. | Journal: Clin Microbiol Infect | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1016/j.cmi.2026.05.003 TL;DR: 離開 C. auris endemic ICU 後，約 6 成病人於 5 個月內 decolonize，但 38% 持續陽性、部分轉成 candidemia。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 三成八的病人 C. auris 就是賴著不走，和我們的抗藥菌問題一樣難以根除。

docs.title: Early antifungal prophylaxis fails to prevent influenza-associated pulmonary aspergillosis in the ICU: a target trial emulation
docs.text: Authors: Li P et al. | Journal: Clin Microbiol Infect | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1016/j.cmi.2026.05.002 TL;DR: ICU 流感病人早期 antifungal prophylaxis 經 IPTW 校正後不降 IAPA，且增加肝毒性，不支持普遍使用。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 抗黴菌預防沒擋住 IAPA，卻成功傷了肝，預防性治療的 C/B 又少了一個支持者。

docs.title: Global surveillance of Candida albicans: MIC distributions, resistance patterns, and temporal trends from the Antimicrobial Testing Leadership and Surveillance program (2015-2024)
docs.text: Authors: Cai G et al. | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1128/aac.01617-25 TL;DR: 41 國十年監測：C. albicans 對 echinocandin、amphotericin B 仍 ≥99% 敏感，但 azole non-wild-type 自 2019 起緩升。 評: 不嘻嘻 — C. albicans 目前還算乖，但 azole MIC 從 2019 起悄悄爬坡，耐藥的未來正在慢慢走來。

docs.title: Clinical impact of potential drug-drug interactions between midostaurin and posaconazole in FLT3-mutated AML
docs.text: Authors: Joisten CS et al. | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1128/aac.01951-25 TL;DR: FLT3-AML 同時用 midostaurin + posaconazole：血中濃度變異大、清除率延遲，DDI 雖少見但需 TDM 輔助劑量決策。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 兩藥同服血中濃度像坐雲霄飛車，個體間變異之大讓 TDM 從建議變成必要。

docs.title: Multicenter retrospective analysis by the Polish Adult Leukemia Group on tuberculosis occurrence and outcomes after hematopoietic cell transplantation
docs.text: Authors: Drozd-Sokołowska J et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-51064-2 TL;DR: 波蘭 HCT 後 TB 罕見（allo 0.171% / auto 0.063%），平均 431 天才發病、皆肺 TB，治療成功率 92.3%。 評: 嘻嘻 — HCT 後 TB 治療成功率 92.3%，在免疫低下病人群中這是個讓人放心的罕見好消息。

docs.title: Prevalence and associated factors of rifampicin resistance pulmonary tuberculosis among HIV-positive patients in Bahir Dar, Northwest, Ethiopia
docs.text: Authors: Abate A et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-50639-3 TL;DR: 衣索比亞 HIV+ 疑似肺 TB 中 rifampicin-resistant 占 10.9%，與婚姻變動、吸菸、舊 TB 治療史相關。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 衣索比亞 HIV+ 患者 rifampicin 抗藥率 10.9%，舊問題、新數字、依然頭痛。

docs.title: Hospitalization and diabetes mellitus as predictors of unfavorable tuberculosis treatment outcomes
docs.text: Authors: Mendonça EB et al. | Journal: BMC Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1186/s12879-026-13343-1 TL;DR: 巴西 TB 隊列：baseline 住院（aOR 3.21）與糖尿病（aOR 3.04）獨立預測治療失敗或死亡，可作風險分層依據。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 糖尿病加上入院就是 TB 預後的紅牌，資源匱乏地區這條路越來越窄。

docs.title: Infections in the first 30-days after CAR-T therapy in Patients Not Receiving Fluoroquinolone Prophylaxis
docs.text: Authors: Reynolds GK et al. | Journal: Transplant Cell Ther | Date: 2026 May 09 - [/] DOI: 10.1016/j.jtct.2026.03.040 TL;DR: 不用 FQ prophylaxis 的 CAR-T 病人，30 天 bacteremia 僅 3.4%、多為非感染性發燒，質疑常規 FQ 必要性。 評: 嘻嘻 — 不開 FQ 預防，CAR-T 後 bacteremia 仍只有 3.4%，少一種抗生素、多一份腸道菌相安全感。

docs.title: Tuberculosis Prevention in Pregnant Women Living with HIV: A Review of the Current Management Strategies and Guidance
docs.text: Authors: Darveau SC et al. | Journal: Infect Drug Resist | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.2147/IDR.S549397 TL;DR: 孕期合併 HIV 的 TPT 文獻回顧：isoniazid 與 rifamycin 似安全有效，但孕婦試驗稀缺、各國指引仍互相矛盾。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 孕婦 HIV 的 TB 預防指引各國各說各話，最需要保護的族群卻擁有最少的試驗資料。

docs.title: Seroepidemiology, clinical correlates, and GRA6-based genotyping of Toxoplasma gondii among immunocompromised patients in northeastern Iran
docs.text: Authors: Mohaghegh MA et al. | Journal: Acta Trop | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1016/j.actatropica.2026.108135 TL;DR: 伊朗東北部 1206 名免疫低下患者：T. gondii IgG 46% 陽性、近期感染 2.9% 集中於 HCT/LT，株型以 Type II 為主。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 免疫低下病人 T. gondii IgG 陽性近半，弓形蟲潛伏感染如影隨形，從不打算休假。

docs.title: International Survey on Screening and Management of Strongyloidiasis in Solid Organ Transplant Patients
docs.text: Authors: Simkins J et al. | Journal: Transpl Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1111/tid.70233 TL;DR: SOT 國際調查：85% 受訪者會篩 Strongyloides，但管理高度分歧、非 ID 醫師對死亡率與傳播認知不足。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 85% 說會篩 Strongyloides，但怎麼篩、陽性怎麼處理？答案落差比盛行率還大。

docs.title: Leveraging Social Risk Factor Screening Infrastructure in Rheumatology Clinics to Respond to Rising Rates of Tuberculosis Among Individuals Experiencing Homelessness
docs.text: Authors: Summit R et al. | Journal: ACR Open Rheumatol | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1002/acr2.90062 TL;DR: 麻州風濕科利用社會風險篩查警示無家風險病人 TB；23 名免疫抑制者中僅 30% 後續完成 T-SPOT 等檢測。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 風濕科 TB 警報啟動，但三成醫師才付諸行動，制度完善但執行力仍是最後一哩路的硬傷。

docs.title: Delayed Anterolateral Thigh Free Flap Reconstruction for Extensive Buccal-Midfacial Necrosis Caused by Invasive Aspergillosis After Pediatric PBSCT: A 7-Year Follow-Up
docs.text: Authors: Lim H et al. | Journal: J Craniofac Surg | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1097/SCS.0000000000012859 TL;DR: 11 歲女童 PBSCT 後侵襲性 Aspergillus 致大範圍面部壞死，ALT 游離皮瓣重建後 7 年仍 CR、功能正常。 評: 嘻嘻 — 11 歲女孩面部大範圍壞死後七年完全緩解功能正常，移植感染科的美好結局真的存在。

docs.title: Aerosolized Pentamidine Is an Effective Prophylaxis for Pneumocystis jiroveci Pneumonia in Adults Undergoing Allogeneic Hematopoietic Cell Transplantation
docs.text: Authors: Song GY et al. | Journal: J Korean Med Sci | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.3346/jkms.2026.41.e81 TL;DR: Allo-HCT 後霧化 pentamidine 與 TMP-SMX 預防 PJP 等效，但不良反應與停藥率顯著較低，可做替代選項。 評: 嘻嘻 — 霧化 pentamidine 預防 PJP 效果等同 TMP-SMX 卻副作用少很多，不耐磺胺的病人有救了。

docs.title: Describing the Utility of Fungal Blood Cultures in Patients Hospitalized at a Large Pediatric Academic Center
docs.text: Authors: Chiusaroli L et al. | Journal: Pediatr Infect Dis J | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1097/INF.0000000000005282 TL;DR: 兒童醫學中心 7 年 540 件 fungal blood culture：僅 1 件多出 routine BC 未測到的菌，臨床效益微乎其微。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 七年 540 件 fungal blood culture 只有一件改變處置，這是診斷管理而非貢獻管理的範例。

docs.title: Long-term clinical outcomes and safety of rituximab in refractory neuropsychiatric systemic lupus erythematosus: a real-world single-center study
docs.text: Authors: Zhao Y et al. | Journal: Clin Rheumatol | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1007/s10067-026-08164-1 TL;DR: 17 例難治性 NPSLE 使用 rituximab：94% 顯著改善、追蹤中位 45 個月無復發，但仍有 COVID-19、PJP+CMV 致死案例。 評: 嘻嘻 — 難治性狼瘡腦病 rituximab 九成有效、無復發；但 PJP + CMV 提醒我們沒有免費的 B 細胞清除。

docs.title: The development of half-sandwich arene ruthenium(II) complexes with antifungal activity against resistant Candida albicans
docs.text: Authors: Wu S et al. | Journal: J Inorg Biochem | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1016/j.jinorgbio.2026.113351 TL;DR: 新合成半夾心 ruthenium(II) Ru-6 對抗藥性 C. albicans 抑制力勝 fluconazole，且與 FLC/AmB 協同、不易誘導抗藥。 評: 嘻嘻 — 釕錯合物 Ru-6 打趴抗藥 Candida 又跟 FLC/AmB 協同，藥化界今天是真的嘻嘻了。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Retail pork markets as underrecognized hubs of tigecycline resistance: Genomic epidemiology of tet(X4)-harboring Escherichia coli and global ST195 dissemination
docs.text: Authors: Chen J et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119086 TL;DR: 廣東零售豬肉市場 23.85% 樣本檢出 tet(X4) E. coli，IncX1 plasmid 主導跨國擴散，加工工具汙染最嚴重。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 零售豬肉攤的加工工具把 tigecycline 抗藥基因傳向全球，從農場到餐桌真是一條龍抗藥服務。

docs.title: Genomic Surveillance of Lassa Virus through In-Country Sequencing, Guinea
docs.text: Authors: Camara J et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.260386 TL;DR: 幾內亞建立本地 Lassa virus 定序，28 條新基因組揭示與賴比瑞亞、獅子山的跨境病毒傳播。 評: 嘻嘻 — 幾內亞自建 Lassa 定序能力揭開跨境傳播，本地監測能量才是長遠公衛的真正解方。

docs.title: Borrelia turicatae in Ticks from Animals in a Public Park, Aguascalientes, Mexico
docs.text: Authors: Vázquez-Guerrero E et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.251925 TL;DR: 墨西哥 Aguascalientes 公園的軟蜱分離出 5 株 B. turicatae，野生動物血清抗體陽性，提示復發熱人類感染風險。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 公園野生動物在傳遞復發熱疏螺旋體，帶小孩去公園前記得確認有無蜱蟲這件事正式變得必要。

docs.title: Herpes Simplex Virus 1 in Trigeminal Ganglia of Trafficked Neotropical Primates, Peru, 2024
docs.text: Authors: Vilchez-Delgado F et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.251408 TL;DR: 秘魯走私新熱帶猴三叉神經節驗出人類 HSV-1 與 Saimiriine αHV-1，提示潛伏感染與跨物種 spillover 風險。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 走私猴子三叉神經節藏著人類 HSV-1，野生動物黑市不只違法，還是跨物種病毒的快速通關道。

docs.title: Genomic Analysis of Sin Nombre Virus Sequences, Northwestern United States, 2023
docs.text: Authors: Rickard G et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.251476 TL;DR: 美國西北部 189 隻齧齒類定序：Sin Nombre 病毒高盛行，並發現 reassortment / co-infection 跡象。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 漢他病毒在美西鼠群高盛行又發現 reassortment，病毒基因交換的速度大概比我們監測快一步。

docs.title: Highly Pathogenic Avian Influenza A(H5N1) Clade 2.3.4.4b Virus and Mass Mortality in Eurasian Cranes, Germany, 2025
docs.text: Authors: Günther A et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.260170 TL;DR: 2025 秋德國歐亞鶴爆發 H5N1 clade 2.3.4.4b 全身性感染，群居覓食棲息加速病毒擴散。 評: 不嘻嘻 — H5N1 讓歐洲鶴群大滅亡，群聚覓食的本能竟成傳播加速器，候鳥季就是禽流感的旅遊旺季。

docs.title: Replication Efficiency of Contemporary Highly Pathogenic Avian Influenza A(H5N1) Virus Isolates in Human Nasal Epithelium Model
docs.text: Authors: Flagg M et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.260053 TL;DR: 當代 H5N1 在人類鼻上皮複製優於歷史株，B3.13 基因型抑制 IFN 反應，提示傳播風險上升。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 當代 H5N1 在人類鼻腔複製更強還壓制 IFN，大流行風險評估的紅燈又多亮了一盞。

docs.title: Retrospective Phylogenetic Analysis of Mayaro Virus, French Guiana, 1996-2024
docs.text: Authors: Lagrave A et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.251435 TL;DR: 法屬圭亞那 1996-2024 Mayaro virus 系統發育：genotype D 子系從巴西傳入並外擴海地、委內瑞拉。 評: 不嘻嘻 — Mayaro 病毒從巴西滲入海地、委內瑞拉，蟲媒傳染病地理界線正隨氣候和旅行悄悄重繪。

docs.title: Zoonotic and Anthroponotic Plasmodium spp. Circulation between Wild Primates and Indigenous Community, Peruvian Amazon, 2007-2020
docs.text: Authors: Ulloa GM et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.251695 TL;DR: 秘魯亞馬遜原住民社區與野生猴：43.3% 人類、51.9% 猴帶 Plasmodium，譜系高度共享支持隱性 zoonotic 庫存。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 人和猴共享 Plasmodium 譜系，消滅亞馬遜瘧疾的計畫大概還要說服野生靈長類也配合。

docs.title: Development and Validation of Real-Time PCR for Detecting Anaplasma bovis-Like Agent in Dermacentor spp. Ticks
docs.text: Authors: Smith RC et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.251750 TL;DR: 開發 A. bovis-like agent real-time PCR，672 隻 Dermacentor 蜱僅 0.1% 陽性，可作為流行病學監測工具。 評: 嘻嘻 — 新 real-time PCR 精準偵測 A. bovis-like agent，蜱媒病原監測工具箱又多了一把好用的鑷子。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Identification of a novel patulin degrading enzyme from Wickerhamomyces anomalus XL1 and its application in apple juice
docs.text: Authors: Zhou F et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 06 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149542 TL;DR: 從 W. anomalus 鑑定到 SDR 酶 WaSDR，可在 24 h 內把蘋果汁中 patulin 完全降解為 ascladiol，無損品質。 評: 嘻嘻 — 酵母菌 SDR 酶 24 小時搞定 patulin、不影響果汁品質，黴菌毒素的生物解毒又多了好幫手。

docs.title: Targeted biofilm inhibition and gene expression to study the synergistic antibacterial mechanism of lauric acid and citral against Listeria monocytogenes
docs.text: Authors: Liu M et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119304 TL;DR: 月桂酸與 citral 協同破壞 L. monocytogenes biofilm 與群體感應，巴氏滅菌牛奶測試亦可抑制汙染。 評: 嘻嘻 — 月桂酸 + citral 雙打 Listeria biofilm 效果顯著，植物來源天然抗菌組合拳越來越有看頭。

docs.title: Across climates and limits: a Brazil-Mediterranean benchmark of aflatoxins in peanuts and peanut butters
docs.text: Authors: De Dea Lindner J et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119299 TL;DR: 巴西與地中海花生對照：地中海樣本部分超 EU 4 µg/kg aflatoxin 限值，Aspergillus Flavi 優勢比總真菌量更預警風險。 評: 不嘻嘻 — EU 限值比巴西嚴五倍，同一包花生合法與否看你在哪個市場，標準不統一是食安的隱形漏洞。

docs.title: Post-sanitation bacterial survival on meat facility environmental surfaces as delineated by biofilm formation
docs.text: Authors: Yang X et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119297 TL;DR: 牛肉加工廠清洗後 46.9% 表面仍殘留 biofilm；地墊、排水溝、牆角 TPC 最高，核心微生物含 E. coli。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 牛肉廠清洗完近半表面仍有 biofilm，乾淨的外表下藏著細菌的秘密基地，肉品衛生防線漏洞不少。

docs.title: Phage tail Fiber-based electrochemical biosensor for rapid detection of Cronobacter spp. in food
docs.text: Authors: Hu H et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119294 TL;DR: 噬菌體尾纖維 TFP08 結合 AuNP/Ni/GO 電化學感測器：30 分鐘偵測嬰兒奶粉中 Cronobacter，LOD 23 CFU/mL。 評: 嘻嘻 — 噬菌體尾纖維電化學感測器 30 分鐘偵測嬰兒奶粉 Cronobacter，快篩工具讓新生兒食安多一道防線。

docs.title: Identification and rational engineering of a novel zearalenone-degrading enzyme from Fonsecaea erecta
docs.text: Authors: Zhang H et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119263 TL;DR: 從 F. erecta 鑑定 zearalenone 降解酶 FeZ12，三點突變 T9V/P127V/G179R 活性提升 3.2 倍、耐熱性顯著改善。 評: 嘻嘻 — 三點突變讓 zearalenone 降解酶活性增 3.2 倍又更耐熱，玉米赤黴烯酮脫毒又多了個靠譜蛋白幫手。

docs.title: Plasma-activated water for sustainable postharvest preservation of fruits and vegetables: mechanistic insights into physiological regulation and stress priming
docs.text: Authors: Zhang T et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119250 TL;DR: 電漿活化水回顧：RONS 同時抗菌、調節抗氧化與 stress priming，建立完整 postharvest 蔬果保鮮機制框架。 評: 嘻嘻 — RONS 同時抗菌又誘發蔬果防禦機制，電漿活化水的 postharvest 保鮮機制框架整理得很有工業轉化潛力。

docs.title: Inhibiting enzymatic browning by inactivating peroxidase and polyphenol oxidase using a novel natural gas-produced catalytic infrared treatment
docs.text: Authors: Liu Y et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119221 TL;DR: 天然氣催化紅外線 300°C 26-65 分鐘可 100% 滅活 PPO/POD，抑制酶促褐變、免電熱蒸汽，能耗大幅降低。 評: 嘻嘻 — 天然氣催化紅外線完全滅活酶促褐變酵素還省水省電，傳統蒸汽殺酶法的強力挑戰者來了。

docs.title: Microplastic biofilms enhance environmental stress, disinfectant, and antibiotic tolerance of Salmonella enterica serovar typhimurium in simulated fresh vegetable processing systems
docs.text: Authors: Zhou T et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119183 TL;DR: 蔬菜處理系統的微塑膠 biofilm 強化 Salmonella Typhimurium 對 UV、乾燥、消毒劑與 ampicillin 的耐受，efflux 基因上調。 評: 不嘻嘻 — 蔬菜洗菜槽微塑膠讓 Salmonella 裹了一層抗藥保護膜，微塑膠問題又添了個令人不安的食安面向。

docs.title: Decoding the molecular 'terroir': Circular RNAs as stable environmental recorders for micro-geographical origin tracing of Pinggu peach
docs.text: Authors: Zhao J et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119181 TL;DR: 北京平谷桃 GI 鑑別：6 條 circRNA panel 之 OPLS-DA 模型對產地辨識準確率 100%，跨年度驗證仍 >97%。 評: 嘻嘻 — 6 條 circRNA 就能 100% 鑑別平谷桃產地，護 GI 認證的分子指紋精準得讓假貨無所遁形。

docs.title: Food safety assessment of last mile delivery as an alternative food distribution system for ready-to-eat multi-ingredient salad bowls
docs.text:
Authors: Vermeersch M et al. | Journal: Int J Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijfoodmicro.2026.111822 TL;DR: 歐洲三市最後一哩 RTE 沙拉外送：微生物品質與零售相當，35 分鐘內 L. monocytogenes 與 B. cereus 增長 <0.5 log。 評: 嘻嘻 — 35 分鐘外送沙拉病原菌增長 <0.5 log，只要冷鏈守住，最後一哩食安風險其實可控。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-13)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-05-14
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 17、One Health × 12、Food Security × 15，共 44 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Tuberculosis incidence trends and risk factors among people living with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV) in Sichuan, China: a retrospective cohort study (2010-2024)
docs.text: Authors: Yuan FS et al. | Journal: BMC Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1186/s12879-026-13499-w TL;DR: 四川 PLHIV 結核發生率 5.09/1000 人年，地區差異大，ART 延遲 >90 天為可介入風險因子。 評: ART 又見老問題，西南偏遠地區 HIV/TB 防治還是難關。

docs.title: Cytomegalovirus Infection and Coronary Artery Disease in Liver Transplant Recipients: Nationwide Study Using Protocolised Cardiac Computed Tomography
docs.text: Authors: Suarez-Zdunek MA et al. | Journal: Int J Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijid.2026.108785 TL;DR: 278 名肝移植受者中 CMV DNAemia 與 cardiac CT 評估之冠狀動脈疾病無顯著關聯。 評: 肝移植朋友的心血管壞消息清單，CMV 終於可以劃掉。

docs.title: Evaluation of the Clinical Characteristics and Survival of Pediatric Patients with Invasive Aspergillosis: A 12-year Retrospective Cohort Study
docs.text: Authors: Karaman A et al. | Journal: Mycopathologia | Date: 2026 May 13 DOI: 10.1007/s11046-026-01078-1 TL;DR: 土耳其 12 年兒童侵襲性 aspergillosis 55 例，30 天死亡率 11%、總死亡率 29%。 評: 兒童侵襲性 aspergillosis 仍是命運難關，新藥還沒見影。

docs.title: CROI 2026: Tuberculosis and Other Infectious Complications in People With HIV
docs.text: Authors: Kerkhoff AD et al. | Journal: Top Antivir Med | Date: 2026 Apr PMID: 42127257 TL;DR: CROI 2026 回顧：HIV 合併瀰漫性 TB 死亡率仍高，1HP 與 3HP 預防成效相當但 1HP 完成率較低。 評: 強化治療、prednisone、linezolid 都救不了重症 TB，CROI 2026 又交白卷。

docs.title: CT Manifestations of HIV-associated Pulmonary Infections and Noninfectious Mimics in the Era of Antiretroviral Therapy
docs.text: Authors: Volin J et al. | Journal: Radiographics | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1148/rg.250056 TL;DR: 以 CD4 為基礎的 CT 影像辨識策略，可協助 ART 時代 HIV 病人肺部感染與 IRIS 的鑑別診斷。 評: ART 時代讀片有 CD4 當羅盤，影像醫師可以開心 pattern 推理。

docs.title: Efficacy and safety of reduced-dose valganciclovir prophylaxis for cytomegalovirus infection after pediatric kidney transplantation
docs.text: Authors: Nakatani R et al. | Journal: Clin Exp Nephrol | Date: 2026 May 13 DOI: 10.1007/s10157-026-02876-z TL;DR: 兒童腎移植減量 valganciclovir CMV 預防：高風險組 4/4 仍感染並頻發嗜中性球低下。 評: 想省 valganciclovir 結果 4/4 高風險仍中標，劑量還是不能省。

docs.title: Is CMV PCR Monitoring Necessary for Hematological Malignancy During Chemotherapy? A Prospective Single-Center Study
docs.text: Authors: Karabulut ZT et al. | Journal: Turk J Haematol | Date: 2026 May 13 DOI: 10.4274/tjh.galenos.2026.05743 TL;DR: 血液腫瘤化療期間 CMV 感染率 9%，每週兩次 PCR 監測能早期發現並啟動先制性治療。 評: 血液腫瘤化療乖乖每週兩次 CMV PCR，早抓早治不嫌煩。

docs.title: Intranodular and perinodular radiomics features based on non-contrast CT to distinguish pulmonary cryptococcosis from lung adenocarcinoma: a two-center study
docs.text: Authors: Deng Y et al. | Journal: Front Oncol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fonc.2026.1750773 TL;DR: 結合結節內與結節周邊放射組學的非顯影 CT 模型可鑑別肺隱球菌病與肺腺癌，測試集 AUC 0.92。 評: Radiomics 連肺隱球菌和肺腺癌都分得開，影像 AI 又收下一城。

docs.title: Virus-driven remodeling of the immune microenvironment and response to immune checkpoint inhibitors: the infection- immunity-cancer crosstalk
docs.text: Authors: Wang G et al. | Journal: Front Immunol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fimmu.2026.1807408 TL;DR: HBV/HCV/HIV/HPV/EBV 感染影響 ICI 反應，需警覺免疫副作用與病毒再活化風險。 評: 打 ICI 還要顧 HBV/HIV/EBV 偷襲，治療方案越來越像迷宮。

docs.title: B-Lymphoblastic Leukemia With Isolated Central Nervous System Relapse Mimicking a Vestibular Schwannoma
docs.text: Authors: Ng JY et al. | Journal: Clin Case Rep | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1002/ccr3.72670 TL;DR: B-ALL 中樞復發影像類似 vestibular schwannoma，併發 dasatinib 相關 CMV 腸炎與細菌性心內膜炎。 評: B-ALL 復發偽裝 schwannoma，順手帶來 CMV 腸炎與細菌性心內膜炎。

docs.title: Pulmonary Cryptococcal Infection Complicating Gefitinib Therapy in a Patient With EGFR L858R-Positive Lung Adenocarcinoma: A Case Report
docs.text: Authors: Wang Y et al. | Journal: Clin Case Rep | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1002/ccr3.72684 TL;DR: gefitinib 治療期間新發肺結節，須將 pulmonary cryptococcosis 納入鑑別。 評: TKI 後新肺結節別急著當惡化，pulmonary cryptococcosis 也來插一腳。

docs.title: Key operational challenges at a programmatic level to achieve optimal use of the GeneXpert platform
docs.text: Authors: Cuella-Martin I et al. | Journal: IJTLD Open | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.5588/ijtldopen.25.0630 TL;DR: 盧安達 53 個 GeneXpert Ultra 站點：55% 樣本延遲 >24 小時、81% 一年內模組故障。 評: GeneXpert 機器再先進，斷網與模組壞掉也只能乾瞪眼。

docs.title: The use of urinary lateral-flow lipoarabinomannan assays for TB diagnosis in children
docs.text: Authors: Sabi I et al. | Journal: IJTLD Open | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.5588/ijtldopen.25.0667 TL;DR: 兒童尿液 FujiLAM 對 TB 敏感度 31%，優於 AlereLAM 的 13.3%，但批次間表現差異需克服。 評: 兒童尿液 LAM 終於比舊版翻倍，雖然批次差異還要再戰。

docs.title: Detection of Nontuberculous Mycobacterial Skin Infection by Next-Generation Sequencing: A Pilot Study
docs.text: Authors: Liu JW et al. | Journal: J Clin Med | Date: 2026 May 03 DOI: 10.3390/jcm15093504 TL;DR: 皮膚 NTM 感染 mNGS 陽性率 95% 顯著優於培養 30%，M. marinum 為最常見病原。 評: mNGS 在皮膚 NTM 完勝培養，魚刺釣到 M. marinum 終於有早期答案。

docs.title: Advances in the Diagnosis of Invasive Pulmonary Mold Infections: Focus on Diagnostic Performance and Cost-Effectiveness of Diagnostic Tests
docs.text: Authors: Papadimatos S et al. | Journal: Diagnostics (Basel) | Date: 2026 May 02 DOI: 10.3390/diagnostics16091384 TL;DR: 侵襲性肺黴菌診斷：mcfDNA NGS 對 Aspergillus 敏感度 <50%，呼氣 VOC 測試前景看好。 評: 肺黴菌診斷又見昂貴 mcfDNA 與不夠準的 VOC，呼氣測試請繼續努力。

docs.title: Targeted Therapy for Systemic Epstein-Barr Virus-Positive T-Cell Lymphoma of Childhood
docs.text: Authors: Holzmann JJ et al. | Journal: J Natl Compr Canc Netw | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.6004/jnccn.2025.7477 TL;DR: 兒童 systemic EBV+ T 細胞淋巴瘤化療失敗後免疫治療達完全緩解，alloSCT 後 3 年無病存活。 評: 兒童 STCLC 化療失敗後免疫治療翻盤，3 年無病存活，精準醫療勝出。

docs.title: Design and feasibility considerations for a phase 3 efficacy trial of the M72/AS01E-4 tuberculosis vaccine
docs.text: Authors: Dagnew AF et al. | Journal: Vaccine | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128690 TL;DR: M72/AS01E-4 結核疫苗 phase 3 鎖定 IGRA+ HIV 陰性族群，1.8 萬人 3.5-4 年達 110 事件。 評: 結核疫苗 phase 3 設計拍板，1.8 萬人 3.5 年見真章，終於有點希望。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Genomic epidemiology of the 2025 mpox epidemic in Sierra Leone
docs.text: Authors: Campbell AKO et al. | Journal: Nat Med | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1038/s41591-026-04385-8 TL;DR: 2025 獅子山 mpox 疫情源自奈及利亞 G.1 譜系，已隱性傳播約 3 個月，實際感染數約為官方通報兩倍。 評: mpox 在獅子山隱性傳了 3 個月才被抓到，監測網又漏勾。

docs.title: Exposure in Horses to Human Tick-Borne Relapsing Fever Agent Borrelia persica, Israel, 2025
docs.text: Authors: Shwartz D et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.251283 TL;DR: 以色列 301 匹馬 Borrelia persica 陽性率 9.96%，蜱媒回歸熱可能形成人-馬-蜱循環。 評: 以色列馬群 Borrelia persica 中招，蜱媒回歸熱多一個新拼圖。

docs.title: Borna Disease Virus 1 as Cause of Fatal Meningoencephalomyelitis in Wild Hedgehogs, Germany, 2022-2025
docs.text: Authors: Michelakaki E et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.3201/eid3205.250952 TL;DR: 德國 15 隻野生刺蝟死於 BoDV-1 腦脊髓炎，處理刺蝟須加強衛生防護以防潛在人畜共通風險。 評: 德國刺蝟集體死於 BoDV-1，下次抱抱刺蝟前請先戴手套。

docs.title: Leptospiral dissemination is restrained by liver macrophages through Clec4d-driven capture via C/EBPβ activation
docs.text: Authors: Chen X et al. | Journal: PLoS Pathog | Date: 2026 May 13 DOI: 10.1371/journal.ppat.1014232 TL;DR: 鼠類肝臟巨噬細胞透過 C/EBPβ-Clec4d 軸捕捉 Leptospira，揭示限制鉤端螺旋體擴散的新機制。 評: 肝臟巨噬細胞用 Clec4d 抓 Leptospira，鉤端螺旋體防治多新標靶。

docs.title: Porcine CD161 promotes Japanese Encephalitis Virus entry: a potential host-directed antiviral target
docs.text: Authors: Li J et al. | Journal: Antiviral Res | Date: 2026 May 09 DOI: 10.1016/j.antiviral.2026.106434 TL;DR: 豬 CD161 為 JEV 入侵宿主細胞的關鍵因子，具宿主導向抗病毒治療潛力。 評: 找到 CD161 是 JEV 進細胞的鑰匙，宿主導向抗病毒治療多一個目標。

docs.title: Characterization of human-animal interactions among pet owners in Mexico from a One Health perspective: A cross-sectional study
docs.text: Authors: Alvarado-Serrano M et al. | Journal: One Health | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.onehlt.2026.101426 TL;DR: 墨西哥 3699 戶寵物飼主 74.7% 親吻寵物、37% 接觸後不洗手，凸顯人寵互動潛藏人畜共通病傳染風險。 評: 74.7% 飼主親狗、37% 不洗手，人寵浪漫順便傳遞病原。

docs.title: Knowledge, attitudes, and practices of local land services staff regarding Japanese encephalitis virus: A one health perspective
docs.text: Authors: White J et al. | Journal: One Health | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.onehlt.2026.101435 TL;DR: 澳洲 NSW 土地服務員工 JEV 接種率僅 18%，職場協助時接種率提升 12 倍，跨部門合作不可或缺。 評: JEV 第一線員工接種率才 18%，職場推一把就 12 倍，何不順手做？

docs.title: Modeling the risk of introducing cyst-infected meat pork into the food chain in Benin
docs.text: Authors: Assogbakpe R et al. | Journal: BMC Public Health | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1186/s12889-026-27612-w TL;DR: 貝南豬肉囊蟲污染進入食物鏈機率達 41%，2020-2023 推估約 8.9 萬份感染豬肉流通，屠宰檢查急需強化。 評: 貝南 41% 病豬肉照樣上桌，囊蟲症又給世界上了一課。

docs.title: Emergence of tet(X4)-positive Klebsiella isolates from aquatic products in Hainan, China
docs.text: Authors: Wang Y et al. | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1128/aac.01618-25 TL;DR: 海南水產分離 14 株 tet(X4)+ Klebsiella，新型 IncFII(pCRY)_v 為主要質體載體。 評: 水產 Klebsiella 帶 tet(X4)，海鮮餐桌再新增一個 AMR 警報。

docs.title: Cellular hnRNP D promotes influenza A virus replication by inhibiting TBK1-IRF3-mediated innate immune response
docs.text: Authors: Xu C et al. | Journal: J Virol | Date: 2026 May 13 DOI: 10.1128/jvi.00257-26 TL;DR: 宿主 hnRNP D 阻斷 TBK1-IRF3-IFN-β 訊號促進 influenza A 複製，為潛在抗病毒標的。 評: 找到 hnRNP D 是 IAV 內神，敲掉它說不定能讓流感少點威風。

docs.title: Disseminated multidrug-resistant Salmonella enterica serovar Dublin infection associated with plasmid-borne CMY-2 gene in a patient with travel to a farm in Mexico
docs.text: Authors: Collins ME et al. | Journal: Eur J Clin Microbiol Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1007/s10096-026-05536-y TL;DR: 赴墨西哥農場後感染 MDR Salmonella Dublin 併胸腹主動脈移植物感染，帶 IncC CMY-2 質體。 評: 去墨西哥農場一趟帶回 MDR Salmonella Dublin 加血管感染，行李太重。

docs.title: Metagenomic Profiling Reveals Extensive Bacterial Diversity in Chicken Manure and Associated Contaminated Wastewater
docs.text: Authors: Zaman S et al. | Journal: Int J Mol Sci | Date: 2026 Apr 23 DOI: 10.3390/ijms27093741 TL;DR: 雞糞與污水巨基因組富含 E. coli、Salmonella、A. baumannii 等病原，凸顯禽糞環境污染風險。 評: 雞糞水裡 E. coli、Salmonella、A. baumannii 全到齊，環境衛生作業寫不完。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Research progress on immunoassays for detecting organic heterocyclic herbicides in food
docs.text: Authors: Cai Z et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149555 TL;DR: 奈米材料與高通量篩選讓食品有機雜環除草劑免疫檢測更靈敏、可攜，並可延伸至環境與生物診斷應用。 評: 奈米材料讓食品除草劑檢測更便宜可攜，把實驗室搬上田邊。

docs.title: Mycelium-based scaffolds for cultured meat production: Characteristics and application trends
docs.text: Authors: Oh YN et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 10 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149578 TL;DR: 蘑菇菌絲體三維多孔支架在培養肉生產上可提升細胞生長、質地與成本競爭力，是有潛力的替代蛋白方案。 評: 蘑菇菌絲當培養肉支架，未來牛排可能是真菌界的傑作。

docs.title: Vpa1463, a DUF1566-domain protein, is indispensable for bile resistance and biofilm formation in Vibrio parahaemolyticus and is required for its adaptation to food-related environments
docs.text: Authors: Chu M et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119147 TL;DR: Vpa1463 為 Vibrio parahaemolyticus 膽鹽耐受與生物膜形成關鍵蛋白，為食品衛生介入標的。 評: 找到 Vpa1463 是 Vibrio parahaemolyticus 的膽鹽軟肋，食品干預多一招。

docs.title: From interactions to applications: the role of microbial communities in shaping the physicochemical, safety, and quality attributes of aquatic products
docs.text: Authors: Sun L et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119126 TL;DR: 水產品多菌種互動透過 EPS、quorum sensing 影響腐敗與致病，精準防控策略正逐步發展。 評: 水產品多菌種互動有 CRISPR、數位孿生來盤算，腐敗防控進入精準時代。

docs.title: Impact of decontamination by plasma-activated fog (PAF) on Listeria monocytogenes mono- and mixed cultures on agar medium and foods
docs.text: Authors: Chieffi D et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119114 TL;DR: 電漿活化霧氣 PAF 可降低 Listeria monocytogenes，培養基 30 秒即有效，萵苣上亦見減量。 評: 電漿活化霧氣 30 秒就把 Listeria 壓下來，萵苣界終於有非熱武器。

docs.title: Insights into Cronobacter sakazakii adaptation to Benzalkonium chloride: virulence assessment and transcriptomics analysis
docs.text: Authors: Niu H et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026 Jul 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119088 TL;DR: Cronobacter sakazakii 暴露亞致死 benzalkonium chloride 後生長減弱但毒力增強。 評: Cronobacter sakazakii 被 BC 修理反而更兇，亞致死劑量真是雙刃刀。

docs.title: Screening and validation of Lacticaseibacillus paracasei F50 as a potential biocontrol agent to inhibit Aspergillus flavus in maize: New insights into biocontrol efficacy and mechanisms
docs.text: Authors: Yang G et al. | Journal: Int J Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijfoodmicro.2026.111845 TL;DR: L. paracasei F50 高接種量在玉米對 Aspergillus flavus 抑制率達 90%，不損玉米品質。 評: Lactobacillus 把 Aspergillus flavus 在玉米上壓下 90%，黃麴毒素拚場勝負分明。

docs.title: Molecular detection of myxosporean parasites in human fecal samples associated with foodborne illness
docs.text: Authors: Kodo Y et al. | Journal: Int J Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 07 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijfoodmicro.2026.111842 TL;DR: 食用生魚相關腹瀉個案糞便 Kudoa/Unicapsula 檢出率 29.2%，4 日內採檢可顯著提升偵測率。 評: 生魚腹瀉患者糞便 Kudoa 檢出率近三成，吃魚出包的偵探有譜了。

docs.title: Deterministic and Probabilistic Assessment of Dietary Exposure to Pesticide Residues in Sweet Italian-Type and Jalapeño Peppers From Türkiye for the Adult Population
docs.text: Authors: Keklik M et al. | Journal: J Agric Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1021/acs.jafc.6c00194 TL;DR: 土耳其甜椒/墨西哥辣椒 15.8%/5.7% 超過 EU MRL，lambda-cyhalothrin 為主要慢性暴露源。 評: 土耳其辣椒 15.8% 過 EU MRL，下次沙拉前先看一眼產地。

docs.title: A 30-m annual distribution dataset of major crops in China from 2001-2024
docs.text: Authors: Fu Y et al. | Journal: Sci Data | Date: 2026 May 11 DOI: 10.1038/s41597-026-07370-5 TL;DR: 中國 2001-2024 年 30 m 解析度多作物資料集 CCD 涵蓋小麥、玉米、稻米、甘蔗，總體準確度達 91%。 評: 中國 30 m 多作物地圖 2001-2024 全收錄，糧食安全研究瞬間升級。

docs.title: Salmonella enterica serovars co-exist sporadically and at low abundance in US mid-Atlantic irrigation ponds
docs.text: Authors: Micallef SA et al. | Journal: J Sci Food Agric | Date: 2026 May 12 DOI: 10.1002/jsfa.70731 TL;DR: 美國中大西洋 21 處灌溉池塘 Salmonella 沉默且稀疏出現、數量偏低，顯示池塘水經處理後可作為灌溉水源。 評: 中大西洋池塘 Salmonella 量低且稀疏，當灌溉水其實沒那麼可怕。

docs.title: Fragaria Indica ethanolic extracts: bioactive compounds identification, ADMET analysis and putative inhibitors of bla-TEM beta-lactamase from foodborne bacterial pathogens
docs.text: Authors: Abdullah K et al. | Journal: Trop Biomed | Date: 2026 Mar 01 DOI: 10.47665/tb.43.1.015 TL;DR: Fragaria indica 葉乙醇萃取對 bla-TEM 產 E. coli、S. flexneri、S. typhi 具抑菌活性。 評: 印度草莓葉萃取對 bla-TEM 大腸桿菌顯威，植物界又貢獻一波抗菌候選。

docs.title: Salmonella in Malaysia: Outbreaks, contamination sources, serovar distribution and antimicrobial resistance patterns
docs.text: Authors: Mhd Jamal S et al. | Journal: Trop Biomed | Date: 2026 Mar 01 DOI: 10.47665/tb.43.1.014 TL;DR: 馬來西亞 Salmonella 回顧：S. Typhimurium、Enteritidis 為主，erythromycin、penicillin 抗藥率高。 評: 馬來西亞 Salmonella 對 erythromycin、penicillin 抗藥率高，老問題沒新答案。

docs.title: Meat-Borne Bacterial Pathogen Detection: Conventional, Molecular and Emerging AI-Based Strategies
docs.text: Authors: Hussain A et al. | Journal: Diagnostics (Basel) | Date: 2026 Apr 30 DOI: 10.3390/diagnostics16091360 TL;DR: AI 整合 CRISPR 與等溫擴增的肉類病原偵測策略回顧，影像辨識與菌量捕捉準確度可達 96-104%。 評: AI + CRISPR 把肉類病原偵測準確度推到 96%，肉品安全搭上 AI 列車。

docs.title: Comparative Biofilmomics of Antimicrobial-Resistant Salmonella: Serovar- and Host-Specific Signatures
docs.text:
Authors: Edison LK et al. | Journal: Animals (Basel) | Date: 2026 Apr 23 DOI: 10.3390/ani16091302 TL;DR: Salmonella 抗藥菌株比較生物膜學整合基因/轉錄/代謝體資料，鎖定高風險譜系以發展針對性介入策略。 評: Salmonella 抗藥菌株生物膜學整合多體學，高風險譜系一網打盡。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-14)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-05-15
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 21、One Health × 10、Food Security × 10，共 41 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Late Cytomegalovirus Infections After Allogeneic Hematopoietic Cell Transplant
docs.text: Authors: Chen GL et al. | Journal: Am J Hematol | Date: 2026 05 13 DOI: 10.1002/ajh.70347 TL;DR: CMV感染風險在移植後Day+180前仍顯著，ptCy可降低CMV風險，letermovir可考慮Day+180後停用。 評: 不嘻嘻：CMV雖然被letermovir壓住了，但它打算撐到最後一刻才認輸。

docs.title: Utility of Repeating Blood Cultures in Candidemia: Insights From 2 Large Clinical Data Repositories
docs.text: Authors: Yoshida H et al. | Journal: Clin Infect Dis | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1093/cid/ciag216 TL;DR: 重複血液培養對candidemia管理的效益分析，兩大電子病歷資料庫結果顯示可指引治療決策。 評: 嘻嘻：反覆抽血本來很煩，但這些培養數據原來真的有救命的價值。

docs.title: Assessing Laboratory Capacity for Diagnosis of Fungal Infections in France: A Multicentre survey within the SINFONI Network
docs.text: Authors: Morio F et al. | Journal: Med Mycol | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1093/mmy/myag050 TL;DR: 評估法國實驗室對侵襲性黴菌感染的診斷量能，部分地區仍存在診斷能力缺口。 評: 不嘻嘻：實驗室說有診斷能力，但現實總比報告骨感一些。

docs.title: Fungal Species Identification in FFPE Tissues: A Comparative Evaluation of Droplet Digital PCR, ITS Sequencing, and Metagenomic Next-Generation Sequencing
docs.text: Authors: Che J et al. | Journal: Med Mycol | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1093/mmy/myag049 TL;DR: 比較FFPE組織中黴菌菌種鑑定方法，分子工具的準確度優於傳統形態學判讀。 評: 嘻嘻：切片靠形態辨認黴菌真的太難，分子生物學終於出手解圍。

docs.title: Non-Candida fungal cholecystitis - an uncommon occurrence even in the right host
docs.text: Authors: Dumais MG et al. | Journal: Eur J Clin Microbiol Infect Dis | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1007/s10096-026-05541-1 TL;DR: 非Candida黴菌引起的膽囊炎極為罕見，綜述現有案例的臨床特徵與治療結果。 評: 不嘻嘻：膽囊裡長黴菌，夠奇特，而且診斷大概超晚。

docs.title: Metagenomic next-generation sequencing reveals the clinicopathological features of mucormycosis
docs.text: Authors: Yang F et al. | Journal: Microb Pathog | Date: 2026 05 12 DOI: 10.1016/j.micpath.2026.108553 TL;DR: 宏基因體次世代定序揭示毛黴菌感染的臨床病理特徵，有助早期精準診斷。 評: 嘻嘻：mNGS終於讓毛黴菌現形，雖然這個病本身還是非常嚇人。

docs.title: Factors Influencing Tuberculosis Treatment Outcomes in Lalitpur District, Nepal: A Retrospective Cohort Study
docs.text: Authors: Khatri KK et al. | Journal: J Epidemiol Glob Health | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1007/s44197-026-00573-4 TL;DR: 尼泊爾Lalitpur地區結核病治療成效分析，找出影響治療失敗與死亡的危險因子。 評: 不嘻嘻：低收入國家TB治療失敗的危險因子，說來說去都是那些老問題。

docs.title: Primary sternocostal tuberculosis in a young healthcare worker: a case report
docs.text: Authors: Sanchez-Lerma L et al. | Journal: BMC Infect Dis | Date: 2026 05 13 DOI: 10.1186/s12879-026-13307-5 TL;DR: 34歲醫療工作者發生原發性胸骨肋骨關節結核，初始誤診為腫瘤，術後化療後痊癒。 評: 不嘻嘻：結核菌偏偏選在胸骨肋骨這個罕見地方，外科醫師大概愣了一下。

docs.title: Epidemiology and Outcomes of Extrapulmonary Invasive Fungal Infections After Kidney Transplantation in Northern India
docs.text: Authors: Abdullah et al. | Journal: Transpl Infect Dis | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1111/tid.70218 TL;DR: 腎移植受者肺外侵襲性黴菌感染的流行病學與預後分析，死亡率依然居高不下。 評: 不嘻嘻：腎移植後黴菌不只侵肺，全身都成了戰場，預後堪憂。

docs.title: One health approach to management of antifungal resistance in allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis
docs.text: Authors: Falcon RMG et al. | Journal: Mol Biol Rep | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1007/s11033-026-11945-1 TL;DR: 以One Health觀點探討過敏性支氣管肺部麴黴菌病中抗真菌藥物抗藥性的管理策略。 評: 嘻嘻：把ABPA抗藥性問題放進One Health框架，算是給這個老問題一個新視角。

docs.title: Clinical impact and risk prediction of pulmonary barotrauma in non-HIVpneumonia: a 15-year single-center retrospective study
docs.text: Authors: Zhao B et al. | Journal: Front Med (Lausanne) | Date: 2026 04 28 DOI: 10.3389/fmed.2026.1761288 TL;DR: 非HIV患者PJP合併肺氣壓傷的臨床衝擊與風險預測模型，死亡率顯著增加。 評: 不嘻嘻：PJP已夠難治了，再加上barotrauma就真的是雪上加霜。

docs.title: Pulmonary Aspergillosis Treated With Oral Amphotericin B (MAT2203) in a Patient With HIV-Related Cryptococcal Meningitis
docs.text: Authors: Kagimu E et al. | Journal: Clin Case Rep | Date: 2026 05 12 DOI: 10.1002/ccr3.72688 TL;DR: 隱球菌病患者同時合併麴黴菌感染，以口服兩性黴素B（MAT2203）成功治療的案例。 評: 嘻嘻：兩種嚴重黴菌同時感染，口服兩性黴素B是個值得關注的新選擇。

docs.title: Aspergillosis complicating idiopathic lung fibrosis: a multicentric series
docs.text: Authors: Bermudez J et al. | Journal: Respir Med | Date: 2026 05 12 DOI: 10.1016/j.rmed.2026.108885 TL;DR: 多中心研究分析特發性肺纖維化合併麴黴菌感染的盛行率、臨床表現與預後特徵。 評: 不嘻嘻：肺纖維化本身已夠折騰，黴菌再來一腳讓預後更難看。

docs.title: MoS-supported multiepitope protein electrochemical biosensors: A simple and highly selective approach for the diagnosis of systemic mycoses
docs.text: Authors: Maia NG et al. | Journal: Biosens Bioelectron | Date: 2026 05 08 DOI: 10.1016/j.bios.2026.118761 TL;DR: 以MoS材料支撐多抗原電化學生物感測器，簡便快速偵測隱球菌感染的新診斷工具。 評: 嘻嘻：奈米材料加多抗原電化學設計，隱球菌診斷不再只能靠血清學。

docs.title: Follow up of a previous aspergillosis case report treated with oxygen-ozone therapy, reporting clinical remission of the lung fungal infection
docs.text: Authors: Franzini M et al. | Journal: Int Immunopharmacol | Date: 2026 05 12 DOI: 10.1016/j.intimp.2026.116831 TL;DR: 追蹤一例以氧臭氧療法治療麴黴菌感染的病例長期預後，評估非傳統療法的可行性。 評: 不嘻嘻：氧臭氧治aspergillosis聽起來很創新，但這種證據等級讓人難以安心。

docs.title: Cytomegalovirus Induced Infectious Crystalline Keratopathy After Penetrating Keratoplasty
docs.text: Authors: Atighehchian M et al. | Journal: Cornea | Date: 2026 04 23 DOI: 10.1097/ICO.0000000000004167 TL;DR: 報告一例角膜移植後CMV誘發的感染性晶狀角膜病變罕見案例及其診治過程。 評: 不嘻嘻：CMV跑去眼睛搞事，算是意外遭遇戰，診斷想必也不容易。

docs.title: Challenges and therapeutic strategies in nontuberculous mycobacterial infections related to biofilms
docs.text: Authors: Cano-Fernandez M et al. | Journal: Expert Rev Anti Infect Ther | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1080/14787210.2026.2673210 TL;DR: 非結核分枝桿菌生物膜引起的表型耐藥與遺傳性抗藥性機制不同，治療策略需分別應對。 評: 不嘻嘻：NTM本來就很難搞，生物膜讓它更如虎添翼，治療曠日廢時。

docs.title: CMV reactivation post allogeneic stem cell transplantation decreases relapse risk and survival, and increases NRM - a single center analysis
docs.text: Authors: Stavi V et al. | Journal: Leuk Lymphoma | Date: 2026 05 14 DOI: 10.1080/10428194.2026.2668034 TL;DR: CMV再活化雖降低骨髓惡性腫瘤的復發風險，但同時增加死亡率與NRM，臨床意義複雜。 評: 嘻嘻：CMV居然有抗腫瘤效果的暗示？這個發現讓人又驚又怕。

docs.title: Post-transplant diabetes mellitus after kidney transplantation: pathogenesis, risk factors, and management strategies
docs.text: Authors: Long J et al. | Journal: Front Endocrinol (Lausanne) | Date: 2026 04 29 DOI: 10.3389/fendo.2026.1829579 TL;DR: 腎移植後糖尿病涉及「腸道-免疫-代謝軸」，免疫抑制劑以多重機制共同導致血糖失調。 評: 不嘻嘻：好不容易換了一顆腎，又要面對糖尿病，人生真的不容易。

docs.title: Central nervous system tuberculosis in Tunisia: clinical phenotypes from a 14-year cohort
docs.text: Authors: Tritar K et al. | Journal: Infect Dis Now | Date: 2026 05 12 DOI: 10.1016/j.idnow.2026.105285 TL;DR: 突尼西亞14年CNS結核病列隊研究共168例，住院死亡率26%，HIV與疾病嚴重度為獨立死亡預測因子。 評: 不嘻嘻：中樞神經結核病死亡率近三成，這個數字幾十年來沒有太大進步。

docs.title: Letermovir prophylaxis timing in standard-risk and very high-risk adult CMV-seropositive allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant recipients: A systematic literature review
docs.text: Authors: Wang L et al. | Journal: J Clin Virol | Date: 2026 05 04 DOI: 10.1016/j.jcv.2026.105948 TL;DR: 系統性回顧34項研究顯示letermovir在移植後7天內提早啟動，與更低臨床顯著CMV感染率相關。 評: 嘻嘻：早起的鳥兒有蟲吃，越早開始letermovir，CMV就越不敢現身。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Andes hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship - an ESCMID Emerging Infections Subcommittee (EIS) rapid assessment
docs.text: Authors: Mora-Rillo M et al. | Journal: Clin Microbiol Infect | Date: 2026 05 12 DOI: 10.1016/j.cmi.2026.05.016

docs.title: Mind the governance gap: a one health scoping review of national AMR performance indicators
docs.text: Authors: O'Neill ET et al. | Journal: NPJ Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026 05 13 DOI: 10.1038/s44259-026-00213-8 TL;DR: One Health視角的跨部門AMR國家行動計畫系統性回顧，揭示跨部門治理落差與政策缺口。 評: 不嘻嘻：大家都在談One Health，但政策落實的縫隙大到可以跑馬車。

docs.title: Identifying host-specific patterns in viral protein sequences to predict host spillover risk in animal and plant kingdoms
docs.text: Authors: N G V et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 05 13 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-52373-2 TL;DR: 利用病毒蛋白質序列中宿主特異性模式預測跨物種傳播潛力，有助評估新興病毒威脅。 評: 嘻嘻：用蛋白質序列預測哪隻病毒下次會跳物種，這是防疫的超前部署。

docs.title: One Health approach to characterize antimicrobial resistance inin humans, freshwater fish and pigs
docs.text: Authors: Li C et al. | Journal: JAC Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026 05 12 DOI: 10.1093/jacamr/dlag064 TL;DR: One Health研究顯示鮑曼不動桿菌碳青黴烯抗藥性橫跨人、動物與環境三個界面。 評: 不嘻嘻：Acinetobacter到處都是，抗藥性版本更是廣泛散播，讓人頭大。
