docs.title: Rational fabrication of molecularly imprinted polymers based ratiometric fluorescence sensing platform with aggregation-induced emission effect for visual detection of 6PPD-Q in aquatic products
docs.text:
Authors: Li W et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026-05-25 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149806 TL;DR: 以分子印跡聚合物結合比率螢光感測平台偵測水產品中的輪胎抗氧化劑6PPD-Q，檢測下限3.0 ng/mL，回收率95.5–108.0%，具現場快速視覺化檢測潛力。

嘻嘻！輪胎污染物的快速檢測工具問世，食品安全監測範圍再擴大。

docs.title: Membrane-protected carboxylated COF-based micro-SPE coupled with HPLC-MS/MS for simultaneous determination of 16 heterocyclic aromatic amines in Cantonese bakery
docs.text:
Authors: Zhu K et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026-05-25 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149808 TL;DR: 以羧基化共價有機框架（COF）建立膜保護微固相萃取法，同時測定廣東烘焙食品中16種雜環胺（HAA），檢測下限0.04–1.39 μg/kg，回收率72.6–118.7%。

廣東烘焙食品的致癌物HAA檢測再升級，嘻嘻（對食安監測），但知道太多也令人不安。

docs.title: Spermine suppresses Salmonella-induced macrophage innate immune responses via inhibition of the cGAS-STING and TLR4 pathways
docs.text:
Authors: Wang X et al. | Journal: mBio | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1128/mbio.00846-26 TL;DR: Spermine透過促進細菌DNA B→Z構型轉換抑制cGAS-STING活化，並透過TLR4路徑，雙重降低巨噬細胞對Salmonella Typhimurium的先天免疫反應，使胞內菌存活增加。

Salmonella讓宿主polyamine下降以躲避免疫：—不嘻嘻，細菌免疫逃脫的新機制讓人頭皮發麻。

docs.title: Intense Pulsed Light Treatment for Reducing Escherichia coli and Salmonella on Fresh-Cut Romaine Lettuce and Its Effects on Product Quality
docs.text:
Authors: Gyawali R et al. | Journal: J Food Sci | Date: 2026-Jun DOI: 10.1111/1750-3841.71146 TL;DR: 強脈衝光處理生菜可減少Escherichia coli 4.03 log CFU/cm²及Salmonella Typhimurium 4.47 log CFU/cm²，不影響質地與葉綠素，可作為生鮮蔬菜的非加熱去污技術。

嘻嘻！強脈衝光殺菌葉菜類，4個對數減少量又不影響質地，食品安全技術新選項。

docs.title: Study on the Boundary Growth Model of Burkholderia gladioli pv. cocovenenans
docs.text:
Authors: Li S et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026-05-27 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100823 TL;DR: 建立Burkholderia gladioli pv. cocovenenans（bongkrekic acid產毒菌）在pH、NaCl濃度及溫度影響下的生長邊界logistic迴歸模型，concordance index達0.944，可用於食品安全風險評估。

嘻嘻（對預防中毒）：—bongkrekic acid產毒菌終於有了生長預測模型，食品安全監控更精準。

docs.title: Effects and mechanisms of different organic manure on minimizing cadmium concentrations in rice grains
docs.text:
Authors: Liu Y et al. | Journal: Int J Phytoremediation | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1080/15226514.2026.2677688 TL;DR: 不同來源有機肥對鎘污染土壤中水稻的鎘積累有差異影響：鵝糞（GM）與蚓糞（EM）顯著減少水稻鎘吸收，雞糞（CM）過量則增加重金屬生物累積風險。

不嘻嘻：—鎘污染水稻靠有機肥種類選擇來控制，但土壤重金屬污染仍是系統性難題。

docs.title: Food-Type-Driven Detection, Concentration Profiling and Probabilistic Risk Mapping of Pb, Cd and Hg in Foods
docs.text:
Authors: Sirhan A et al. | Journal: Biol Trace Elem Res | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1007/s12011-026-05165-8 TL;DR: 2,114份食品重金屬監測：汞（Hg）偵測率84.5%（以海鮮為主），大量攝取海鮮時汞危害商數超標率達64%；香料/草藥鎘含量偏高，需加強分類風險監測框架。

不嘻嘻：—大量吃海鮮者汞超標風險高達64%，重金屬污染的食品安全警訊仍未解決。

docs.title: Biocontrol of Fusarium culmorum and enhanced wheat seedling growth by Streptomyces sp. D15 from Algerian steppe soil: performance and genome analysis
docs.text:
Authors: Toumatia O et al. | Journal: World J Microbiol Biotechnol | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1007/s11274-026-04965-3 TL;DR: 阿爾及利亞草原土壤分離的Streptomyces lavendofoliae D15可有效抑制Fusarium culmorum（疾病嚴重度降87%），同時促進小麥幼苗生長（芽長增67%），提供永續農業生防選項。

嘻嘻！用Streptomyces對付Fusarium，天然生物防治比化學農藥更eco-friendly，糧食安全好消息。

docs.title: SiOshell-protected magnetic fluorescent tag for on-site ultrasensitive immunodetection of foodborne viruses
docs.text:
Authors: Chen Y et al. | Journal: Mikrochim Acta | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1007/s00604-026-08149-6 TL;DR: SiO₂殼保護磁性量子點螢光標記的側流免疫分析同時偵測norovirus和adenovirus：檢測下限達pg/mL級，75份臨床糞便樣本靈敏度>92%、特異度100%，優於傳統金標記LFA。

嘻嘻！一次偵測兩種食源性病毒，糞便複雜基質難題被SiO₂保護層克服，現場快篩更可靠。

docs.title: Bilobalide attenuates Salmonella typhimurium virulence by repressing the quorum sensing and type III secretion system effectors
docs.text:
Authors: Wang R et al. | Journal: Phytomedicine | Date: 2026-05-22 DOI: 10.1016/j.phymed.2026.158330 TL;DR: 銀杏提取物bilobalide透過與Salmonella typhimurium QseB直接結合，抑制quorum sensing及T3SS效應蛋白，顯著降低biofilm形成，小鼠模型中並強化抗生素療效。

嘻嘻！銀杏成分bilobalide讓Salmonella的毒力基因沉默，植物天然抗毒力策略想像空間大。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-30)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-05-31
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 5、One Health × 10、Food Security × 12，共 27 篇。

docs.title: ⭐ 今日亮點
docs.text:
• Non-HIV Pneumocystis jirovecii pneumonia-associated immune reconstitution inflammatory syndrome: a case report and systematic review Non-HIV PJP-IRIS臨床上嚴重低估；IL-6動態監測與glucocorticoid重啟策略具直接處置指引價值。
  • Addressing the dual-use of antifungals and fungal antimicrobial resistance (fAMR) through a One Health approach 農業與醫療共用azoles驅動fAMR加速，提出One Health整合政策，具即時公衛影響力。
  • High prevalence of carbapenem-resistant Pseudomonas spp. in the pork production chain: a potential reservoir for zoonotic transmission 豬肉生產鏈中carbapenem-resistant Pseudomonas盛行率高，首次確認食品鏈為人畜共通傳播儲菌庫。
  • Evolution of Salmonella Typhimurium under antibiotics from distinct classes reveals variant-dependent cross-protection against food preservation treatments 抗生素暴露使Salmonella對食品保存熱/酸處理產生交叉耐受，顛覆傳統食品加工安全假設。
  • Glycoprotein B genotypes and clinical features in patients with recurrent cytomegalovirus anterior segment infection 台灣本土CMV眼部感染gB基因型追蹤，支持長期抗病毒維持治療的必要性，亞太臨床直接適用。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Recreational drug inhalation and socioenvironmental determinants of pulmonary infection in patients with HIV: a hospital-based case control study
docs.text:
Authors: Blount RJ et al. | Journal: BMC Public Health | Date: 2026-05-30 DOI: 10.1186/s12889-026-27957-2 TL;DR: HIV患者中，吸菸（aOR 6.43）與無家可歸（aOR 3.22）顯著升高肺部感染風險，近期吸大麻者反而風險較低（aOR 0.21）。

不嘻嘻：—貧困、吸菸、無家可歸構成HIV患者的肺部感染三重奏，老問題年年唱，社會決定因子依舊難解。

docs.title: Non-HIV Pneumocystis jirovecii pneumonia-associated immune reconstitution inflammatory syndrome: a case report and systematic review
docs.text:
Authors: Turhon G et al. | Journal: BMC Infect Dis | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1186/s12879-026-13710-y TL;DR: Non-HIV患者PJP治療中快速停用glucocorticoid可誘發IRIS；動態監測IL-6並重啟glucocorticoid後預後改善。

嘻嘻：—終於有系統回顧提醒我們non-HIV PJP停glucocorticoid要小心，IL-6飆升就是IRIS的線索！

docs.title: Determination of the yearly distribution of the incidence of Allergic Bronchopulmonary Aspergillosis (ABPA) in patients registered in the cystic fibrosis patient registry system of Turkey and identification of risk factors for its development
docs.text:
Authors: Demir HI et al. | Journal: Chronic Illn | Date: 2026-05-30 DOI: 10.1177/17423953261452631 TL;DR: 土耳其CF登錄系統分析顯示，低肺功能值、頻繁急性惡化及慢性細菌定殖為ABPA發生的主要危險因子。

不嘻嘻：—CF患者本已千瘡百孔，偏偏低肺功能又是ABPA高危，雙重打擊真的好難過。

docs.title: Convergence of neuroinflammation across major neurotropic viral exposomes in AD and ADRD
docs.text:
Authors: Harmouch J et al. | Journal: J Neuroinflammation | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1186/s12974-026-03876-2 TL;DR: CMV、HIV、SARS-CoV-2等多種嗜神經病毒透過NF-κB等匯聚神經炎症路徑加速阿茲海默症進展，APOE4攜帶者風險尤高。

不嘻嘻：—病毒感染和失智症愈來愈難分難解，感染科醫師的工作又多了一條神經科的尾巴。

docs.title: Glycoprotein B genotypes and clinical features in patients with recurrent cytomegalovirus anterior segment infection
docs.text:
Authors: Hsu HT et al. | Journal: Br J Ophthalmol | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1136/bjo-2025-327910 TL;DR: CMV前房感染復發主要為gB1/gB3株再活化；老年患者可同時出現新株感染，強調長期抗病毒維持治療的必要性。

嘻嘻：—台灣長庚的CMV眼部資料，老年患者gB型別追蹤有助於判斷是再活化還是再感染，臨床實用！

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Genomic characterization of multidrug-resistant monophasic Salmonella 4,[5],12:I:- ST34 circulating along the food chain of Central Italy
docs.text:
Authors: Riaz J et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-13 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119445 TL;DR: WGS分析顯示義大利中部食品鏈中多重抗藥性單相型 Salmonella ST34廣泛流通，帶多種AMR基因且具跨環節傳播能力。

不嘻嘻：—Salmonella ST34橫行食品鏈，AMR基因全配備，歐洲食安形勢再拉警報。

docs.title: From foodborne to environmental Yersinia enterocolitica: Comparative insights into antimicrobial resistance and virulence for food safety
docs.text:
Authors: Lou X et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-14 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119442 TL;DR: WGS分析顯示環境株 Yersinia enterocolitica 帶更多AMR基因，食品株則毒力基因更豐富，兩類族群傳播風險迥異。

不嘻嘻：—Yersinia enterocolitica 一邊在食物裡練毒力、一邊在環境中練抗藥，兩面夾攻真讓人頭疼。

docs.title: Young adults' perceptions and experiences in using mobile apps and wearables for health: a qualitative study with public involvement
docs.text:
Authors: Leuzzi G et al. | Journal: BMC Public Health | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1186/s12889-026-27734-1 TL;DR: 質性研究顯示年輕成人使用健康APP與穿戴裝置的主要障礙為隱私疑慮及演算法透明度不足。

不嘻嘻：—數位健康工具理論上很美好，但年輕人的真實顧慮是「我的資料去哪了」，科技信任赤字難建立。

docs.title: Current advances in antimicrobial feed additives for terrestrial livestock: A systematic review
docs.text:
Authors: Thng AHH et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026-05-07 DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105146 TL;DR: 系統回顧顯示有機酸、植物化學物質等替代性抗菌飼料添加劑可降低牲畜人畜共通病原風險，但各研究間效果差異大。

嘻嘻：—禁用formaldehyde後還有有機酸和植物化合物可用，畜牧業微生物風險管理算是找到幾條出路。

docs.title: Longitudinal surveillance and molecular characterization of methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) from livestock carcasses in South Korea: A 12-year nationwide study (2013-2024)
docs.text:
Authors: Lee YH et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026-05-02 DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105137 TL;DR: 南韓12年全國監測顯示畜牧場MRSA以CC398型為主，多重抗藥性呈持續上升趨勢，人畜共通傳播風險持續存在。

不嘻嘻：—CC398 MRSA 12年居高不下，韓國豬場和台灣豬場的問題其實是一家人。

docs.title: High prevalence of carbapenem-resistant Pseudomonas spp. in the pork production chain: a potential reservoir for zoonotic transmission
docs.text:
Authors: Botelho A et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026-04-05 DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105105 TL;DR: 豬肉生產鏈中carbapenem-resistant Pseudomonas spp.盛行率高，具人畜共通傳播潛力，可能成為臨床難治感染的環境儲菌庫。

不嘻嘻：—豬肉鏈裡的carbapenem-resistant Pseudomonas，從農場到餐桌一路帶著抗藥基因，吃肉多一層風險。

docs.title: One health viral metagenomics for pathogen surveillance: robust mNGS workflows for viral detection and genome recovery from swab and tissue specimens
docs.text:
Authors: Russell T et al. | Journal: BMC Microbiol | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1186/s12866-026-05105-5 TL;DR: 評估兩種宏基因組學（mNGS）工作流程，對多種宿主與樣本類型均有穩健病毒偵測效能，適用於One Health病毒監測。

嘻嘻：—mNGS工作流程通吃拭子和組織，跨宿主監測有了標準化方案，下次大流行提早發現的機會更大了！

docs.title: Addressing the dual-use of antifungals and fungal antimicrobial resistance (fAMR) through a One Health approach
docs.text:
Authors: Weeks S et al. | Journal: NPJ Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1038/s44259-026-00220-9 TL;DR: 農業與醫療共用azoles等抗真菌藥驅動fAMR加速；英國政策案例指出分散治理為主因，呼籲建立One Health整合監控體系。

不嘻嘻：—農田噴的azoles跑進了病人的治療選項縫隙，fAMR問題政策分散、監管破洞，治理難度堪比堵九個洞的堤壩。

docs.title: Ocular adnexal sporotrichosis: case series from a hyperendemic region in southern Brazil
docs.text:
Authors: Poester VR et al. | Journal: Med Mycol | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1093/mmy/myag054 TL;DR: 巴西南部高地病區首批眼附屬器sporotrichosis系列病例，多由 Sporothrix brasiliensis 引起，眼部表現多樣，需早期積極治療。

嘻嘻：—sporotrichosis竟然爬上眼睛！巴西 Sporothrix brasiliensis 疫情持續擴張，臨床表現百變，診斷大考驗。

docs.title: Integrating molecular tools into leishmaniosis surveillance: evaluation of a commercial qPCR kit in sand fly vectors
docs.text:
Authors: Dehesa-García B et al. | Journal: Parasit Vectors | Date: 2026-05-29 DOI: 10.1186/s13071-026-07440-y TL;DR: 商業qPCR套組成功整合入沙蠅媒介監測流程，可提升地中海地區 Leishmania infantum 早期偵測效率。

嘻嘻：—商業qPCR套組直接上陣監測沙蠅，省去自建方法的麻煩，地方性leishmaniosis監測效率大躍進！

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Multiplexed electrochemical biosensors: system-level design frameworks, signal decoding strategies and translational perspectives for food safety
docs.text:
Authors: Zhou S et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-21 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119499 TL;DR: 系統回顧多重電化學生物感測器在食品安全的設計框架與訊號解碼策略，同時偵測多種污染物具商業轉化潛力。

嘻嘻：—一次偵測多種污染物的電化學感測器正在成熟，食品安全快篩未來不再是夢，技術轉化只差臨門一腳。

docs.title: Portulaca Oleracea polysaccharides attenuate zearalenone-induced macrophage activation and Leydig cell dysfunction in testis: A single-cell and multi-omics study
docs.text:
Authors: Huangfu B et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-17 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119481 TL;DR: 馬齒莧多醣於小鼠模型中可透過多組學機制減緩zearalenone真菌毒素誘發的睪丸免疫失調與雄性生殖功能損害。

嘻嘻：—馬齒莧來護睪丸，對抗黴菌毒素的天然解方有了多組學支撐，食品農業交叉研究意外有點萌。

docs.title: Translating Food Biosensing into Practice: Smart Packaging, On-Site Analytics, and AI Integration
docs.text:
Authors: Seyedhosseini-Ghaheh H et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-16 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119473 TL;DR: 回顧生物感測器、智慧包裝與AI整合在食品安全即時監測的應用現況，臨床轉化仍面臨成本與監管挑戰。

嘻嘻：—智慧包裝內建感測器偵測病原，AI協助判讀，食品安全進入科幻時代，期待轉化成現實。

docs.title: Simultaneous determination of N-nitrosamines in ready-to-cook dishes: optimized extraction-purification protocol and comparative quantification by GC-MS/MS versus GC-Q/TOF MS
docs.text:
Authors: Chen J et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-14 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119454 TL;DR: 開發優化萃取方案搭配GC-MS/MS，可同時定量即食料理中多種N-亞硝胺類致癌物，填補加工食品安全分析空缺。

不嘻嘻：—即食料理裡暗藏亞硝胺致癌物，新分析法把它們一網打盡，但知道了又怎樣——還是得吃便利食品。

docs.title: Enhancing microbial safety and enzymatic stability of green peas using sequential sodium hypochlorite washing and continuous in-package DBD plasma treatment
docs.text:
Authors: Muhammad AI et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-12 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119452 TL;DR: 次氯酸鈉洗滌後in-package DBD電漿處理可有效滅活青豆上 Listeria monocytogenes 及 E. coli O157:H7，兼顧微生物安全與品質。

嘻嘻：—電漿技術加氯洗聯手對付青豆上的 Listeria 和 E. coli，非熱加工殺菌又進化一步，保鮮又安全！

docs.title: Digital twin-centered food safety management systems: A review of IoT, AI, and blockchain integration for bacterial pathogen control
docs.text:
Authors: Ismail BB et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-12 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119449 TL;DR: 數位孿生結合IoT、AI及區塊鏈可將食品安全管理從被動事後應對轉為主動即時預防，強化病原菌污染控制效能。

嘻嘻：—數位孿生+區塊鏈監控食品鏈聽起來很酷，如果真能落地，下次 Salmonella 爆發可能早三天被抓到。

docs.title: Microplastic co-pollution in food systems: interaction mechanisms, migration, removal technologies, and environmental linkages
docs.text:
Authors: Feng J et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-14 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119443 TL;DR: 系統回顧微塑膠作為食品系統中共污染物載體，可攜帶微生物、持久性有機物與重金屬，複合毒性機制複雜。

不嘻嘻：—微塑膠帶著細菌、農藥和重金屬一起進入食品鏈，複合毒性還沒搞清楚，但我們每天都在吃。

docs.title: Towards sustainable serum-free media development from alternative sources for cultivated meat
docs.text:
Authors: Sivakumar S et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-13 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119434 TL;DR: 回顧以植物性等永續來源替代動物血清開發無血清培養基用於細胞培養肉，降低成本並改善倫理問題，但規模化仍有挑戰。

嘻嘻：—細胞培養肉走向不用動物血清，永續替代方案百花齊放，未來牛排可能真的不需要牛！

docs.title: Prevalence, plasmid transmission, and chromosomal integration of blaCTX-M genes in Salmonella isolated from retail chicken and pork meats in China
docs.text:
Authors: Sheng H et al. | Journal: Food Res Int | Date: 2026-05-11 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2026.119421 TL;DR: 中國市售雞豬肉 Salmonella 中ESBL基因（bla）陽性率達10.8%，可透過質體水平轉移傳播，食品安全風險顯著。

不嘻嘻：—中國市場雞豬肉裡的 Salmonella 帶著bla基因四處傳播，ESBL問題從醫院延伸到菜市場，防線節節潰退。

docs.title: Intra-seafood strain diversity and temporal dynamics of Vibrio parahaemolyticus in a retail stall
docs.text:
Authors: Wang N et al. | Journal: Int J Food Microbiol | Date: 2026-05-19 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijfoodmicro.2026.111854 TL;DR: 單一零售海鮮攤3個月WGS追蹤顯示 Vibrio parahaemolyticus 菌株高度多樣且持續替換，提示食品鏈中病原傳播動態極為活躍。

不嘻嘻：—一個海鮮攤就藏了多少株 V. parahaemolyticus，換來換去永遠追不完，夏天吃生蠔的後果自負。

docs.title: Analysis of foodborne disease outbreak surveillance in the China Mainland 2014-2023
docs.text:
Authors: Li T et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026-05-07 DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105143 TL;DR: 2014-2023年中國大陸食源性疾病爆發達5萬起、逾1,300死亡，地理差異顯著，夏季高峰，家庭環境為主要發生地。

不嘻嘻：—10年5萬起食源性疾病爆發，中國大陸數字驚人，家庭廚房仍是主戰場，衛教再強也不夠。

docs.title: Evolution of Salmonella Typhimurium under antibiotics from distinct classes reveals variant-dependent cross-protection against food preservation treatments
docs.text:
Authors: García-Penas I et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026-05-04 DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105138 TL;DR: Salmonella Typhimurium接觸抗生素後可對熱處理、酸化等食品保存壓力產生交叉耐受性，提示AMR機制可能削弱食品加工安全性。

不嘻嘻：—Salmonella 練了抗藥術，順帶對食品加工殺菌也產生耐受，AMR問題比我們想的還要複雜深遠。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-05-31)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-06-01
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 3、One Health × 10、Food Security × 11，共 24 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Clinical and analytical evaluation of a commercial Aspergillus fumigatus real-time PCR assay for the diagnosis of invasive pulmonary aspergillosis in patients with hematological malignancies
docs.text:
Authors: Gibert C et al. | Journal: J Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 31 DOI: 10.1093/infdis/jiag280 TL;DR: 153 名 hematological malignancies 成人中，A. fumigatus qPCR 以 1 次陽性診斷 IPA sensitivity 0.73、specificity 0.71；2 次陽性降至 0.31、升至 0.93，且有 cross-reactivity。

不嘻嘻：PCR 也會眼花，IPA 診斷還是要多帶一點懷疑人生。

docs.title: Candidemia in Turkey demonstrates nationwide predominance of non-albicans Candida and Candida auris detection
docs.text:
Authors: Karakoç ZÇ et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-53506-3 TL;DR: 土耳其 20 院 398 例 candidemia 中，NAC 占 65.3%，C. auris 6.5%；30 天死亡率 56.3%，未移除 CVC 與較高死亡率獨立相關。

不嘻嘻：Candida 換班上陣，CVC 還不拔就是幫它加班。

docs.title: Analysis of the efficacy and survival of allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation and nontransplantation treatment in chronic active Epstein-Barr virus infection
docs.text:
Authors: Ming X et al. | Journal: Cell Transplant | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1177/09636897261443609 TL;DR: 75 名 CAEBV 回溯分析顯示，allogeneic HSCT 較 non-HSCT 改善 ORR、3 年 OS 與 EFS；HLH 是較差 survival 的獨立風險因子。

嘻嘻：CAEBV 終於有比較像出口的路，雖然路況仍很硬。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Molecular detection of zoonotic pathogens in fleas collected from dogs and cats in Portugal
docs.text:
Authors: Pereira A et al. | Journal: Parasit Vectors | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1186/s13071-026-07456-4 TL;DR: 葡萄牙犬貓 1261 隻 flea 中，24.7% 帶至少一種 pathogen；Bartonella spp. 8.3%、Rickettsia spp. 16.2%、D. caninum 1.8%，支持 One Health 監測。

不嘻嘻：跳蚤小歸小，帶的麻煩倒是一點都不客氣。

docs.title: Deforestation's Impact On BrazilianCulexMosquitoes And Arboviral Spillover risk
docs.text:
Authors: Hughes A et al. | Journal: Acta Trop | Date: 2026 May 29 DOI: 10.1016/j.actatropica.2026.108161 TL;DR: 巴西亞馬遜 deforestation、畜牧擴張與非管制都市化可能改變 Culex ecology 與 arboviral spillover 風險；現有監測明顯偏向 Aedes、Anopheles。

不嘻嘻：森林一退，vector 生態就開始幫人類寫恐怖劇本。

docs.title: Short Report: Update on CCHFV Seroprevalence in Mauritanian Camels and Cattle Sampled Between 2020 and 2021
docs.text:
Authors: Beyit AD et al. | Journal: Trop Med Int Health | Date: 2026 May 29 DOI: 10.1111/tmi.70175 TL;DR: 茅利塔尼亞 317 份牛與駱駝血清中，CCHFV seroprevalence 達 70%；駱駝 >81%、牛 >60%，年齡增加與 seropositivity 顯著相關。

不嘻嘻：CCHFV 在牲畜圈這麼熱鬧，人類只能安靜冒汗。

docs.title: Trained immunity agonists given to neonatal mice fail to protect against leptospiral infection in adulthood and may cause adverse effects
docs.text:
Authors: Fernandez M et al. | Journal: Innate Immun | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1177/17534259261455983 TL;DR: Neonatal mice 於 7/14 或 14/21 日齡給 CL429、MDP 或 β-glucan，成年後未誘發 protective TI 或防 leptospirosis；MDP 組感染後死亡率達 50%。

不嘻嘻：trained immunity 沒練成，副作用倒是先畢業了。

docs.title: Mapping antimicrobial resistance interventions in ASEAN countries: a scoping review of implementation patterns, One Health integration, and evidence gaps
docs.text:
Authors: Nazari R et al. | Journal: Trop Med Health | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1186/s41182-026-00992-w TL;DR: ASEAN AMR intervention scoping review 篩選 9832 筆、納入 57 篇；70.2% 來自泰國、新加坡、越南，86.0% 聚焦 human health，僅 8.8% 採 One Health。

不嘻嘻：AMR 說要 One Health，結果大家還在各唱各的。

docs.title: Comparative analysis of Pharmaceutical Care practice in rural and urban community pharmacies in Valencia, Spain: a quasi-experimental study
docs.text:
Authors: Gutiérrez-Igual S et al. | Journal: BMC Health Serv Res | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1186/s12913-026-14739-0 TL;DR: 西班牙瓦倫西亞社區藥局 quasi-experimental study 顯示，pharmacist-led intervention 在 urban 與 rural 皆顯著降低 DRPs；介入接受度與地區、DRP 類別及建議型態相關。

嘻嘻：pharmacist 出手有用，城鄉藥局都能少踩 DRP 地雷。

docs.title: Advances in rapid microbiological testing for animal diseases: A review
docs.text:
Authors: Zhen Z et al. | Journal: J Microbiol Methods | Date: 2026 May 29 DOI: 10.1016/j.mimet.2026.107564 TL;DR: 動物疾病 rapid microbiological testing review 指出，LAMP/RPA 合併 CRISPR-Cas 最適合 POC veterinary diagnostics；qPCR/dPCR 仍適用定量監管與疫苗效力監測。

嘻嘻：獸醫 POC 工具越來越快，現場診斷終於不只靠等。

docs.title: Molecular epidemiology and genetic profiling of Anaplasma ovis, Bartonella sp., and Toxoplasma gondii in domestic cats
docs.text:
Authors: Rehman FT et al. | Journal: Comp Immunol Microbiol Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 27 DOI: 10.1016/j.cimid.2026.102488 TL;DR: 巴基斯坦 144 隻家貓 PCR 顯示，A. ovis、T. gondii、Bartonella sp. 感染率分別為 15%、7%、4%；亦偵測雙重 co-infection。

不嘻嘻：貓咪看似淡定，身上 pathogen 名單可不短。

docs.title: Inhibiting horizontal gene transfer to contain antimicrobial resistance: conjugation and plasmid maintenance as druggable targets
docs.text:
Authors: Touati A et al. | Journal: Expert Rev Anti Infect Ther | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1080/14787210.2026.2683605 TL;DR: AMR containment review 指出，抑制 HGT 可補強 stewardship 與 infection control；conjugation、type IV secretion、plasmid replication/partition 與 toxin-antitoxin 是可 druggable targets。

嘻嘻：直接卡住 plasmid 社交，AMR 戰場多了一招。

docs.title: Bioinformatics-based B-cell epitope identification from Leptospira interrogans outer membrane proteins LIC11574 and LIC13411 for the rational development of a multi-epitope anti-Leptospira vaccine
docs.text:
Authors: Porcalla JM et al. | Journal: Arch Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1007/s00203-026-04922-6 TL;DR: Leptospira interrogans LIC11574 與 LIC13411 分別篩得 69/68 與 112/123 個 16-mer/18-mer B-cell epitopes；top epitopes 與 HLA-DRB1*15 docking affinity 為 -12.6 至 -14.9 kcal/mol。

嘻嘻：vaccine 設計先用 in silico 篩牌，至少起手式漂亮。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Dry Cleaning and Post-Cleaning Strategies in Food Processing Facilities: A Scoping Review
docs.text:
Authors: Shahbazi Z et al. | Journal: Compr Rev Food Sci Food Saf | Date: 2026 Jul DOI: 10.1111/1541-4337.70525 TL;DR: 2014–2024 scoping review 納入 91 篇 dry-food facility 清潔研究；cold atmospheric plasma 與 dry steam 在最佳條件下常達 5–7 log CFU microbial reduction。

嘻嘻：乾式清潔也能有狠招，食品廠終於多些選項。

docs.title: Progress in the application of high internal phase emulsions in weight-loss food development: Mechanisms, effects, applications and integration with artificial intelligence
docs.text:
Authors: Du X et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 05 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149533 TL;DR: HIPEs 可藉 gut microbiota modulation、取代 saturated/trans fats、延緩 lipid digestion，改善 weight-loss food 口感、飽足感與熱量控制；AI 可支援個人化設計。

嘻嘻：減重食品若能好吃又聰明，意志力也能少加班。

docs.title: Design of magnetic coral-like mesoporous carbon materials for highly effective solid-phase extraction of bisphenols in food samples
docs.text:
Authors: Li D et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 28 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149854 TL;DR: MPC-600 用於 food bisphenols magnetic solid-phase extraction，2 分鐘達吸附平衡，容量 286.9–693.1 mg/g；LOD 0.02–0.03 ng/mL，回收率 81.2%–114.9%。

嘻嘻：食品檢測抓 bisphenols 越快，消費者越能少猜。

docs.title: Empowering fungal infection research with single-cell RNA sequencing
docs.text:
Authors: Toth R et al. | Journal: Commun Biol | Date: 2026 May 29 DOI: 10.1038/s42003-026-10304-x TL;DR: Fungal infection scRNA-seq review 強調，此技術可解析 host-fungal pathogen interaction 的 cellular heterogeneity、biomarker 與 intervention targets，但 fungal 領域應用仍落後。

嘻嘻：fungal scRNA-seq 補上來，host-pathogen 細節終於開燈。

docs.title: Recent advances in spore-killing technologies: A comprehensive review on killing effect, mechanism and application in food matrices
docs.text:
Authors: Li C et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 Oct DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105157 TL;DR: Bacterial spore non-thermal inactivation review 比較多種食品矩陣技術，指出可兼顧 spore control 與 food quality，但仍需釐清機制、標準化驗證與實廠應用限制。

嘻嘻：spore control 有新工具箱，食品安全不必只靠高溫硬拚。

docs.title: Phenotypic and genomic analysis of Arcobacter cryaerophilus in response to different stress conditions
docs.text:
Authors: Bachus A et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 Oct DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105149 TL;DR: 11 株 Arcobacter cryaerophilus 皆可在 aerobic 與 10°C 生長，對 4 mM citric acid、2.5% NaCl 呈 strain-dependent susceptibility，42°C 則全株易受抑制。

不嘻嘻：Arcobacter 適應力這麼好，冰箱也沒那麼像安全區。

docs.title: Incidence of foodborne viruses in Crassostrea virginica oysters cultured in the Magdalen Islands region of Eastern Canada
docs.text:
Authors: Manseau-Ferland K et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 Oct DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105150 TL;DR: 加拿大東部馬德蓮群島 52 份 Crassostrea virginica oyster 樣本中，HuNoV GI RNA 6 份、GII RNA 1 份陽性；HAV、HEV RNA 皆未偵測。

不嘻嘻：生蠔又提醒我們，浪漫海味常附贈病毒焦慮。

docs.title: Genomic and transcriptomic analysis of biofilm formation in foodborne Listeria monocytogenes isolates under combined environmental stress
docs.text:
Authors: Liu Z et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 Oct DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105148 TL;DR: 中國 70 株 foodborne Listeria monocytogenes 中，85.7% 屬 lineage II、以 CC8 為主；pH 6 促進 biofilm，pH 5 或 5% NaCl 則降低形成。

不嘻嘻：Listeria biofilm 看環境長臉色，清潔班真的辛苦。

docs.title: Survival and genomic adaptation of Listeria monocytogenes in long-term culture
docs.text:
Authors: Benetti S et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 Oct DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105147 TL;DR: Listeria monocytogenes long-term culture 顯示，4°C 可維持 culturability 且 mutation/VBNC 較少；30°C 部分培養於 180–365 天失去培養能力並累積更多 mutation。

不嘻嘻：Listeria 在低溫慢慢撐，食品保存又被上一課。

docs.title: Inactivation mechanisms of cold plasma on Bacillus cereus biofilms and its application in simulated meat processing environments
docs.text:
Authors: Wu X et al. | Journal: Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 Oct DOI: 10.1016/j.fm.2026.105134 TL;DR: APPJ 處理 240 秒可使玻璃表面 Bacillus cereus biofilm 降低 3.77 log CFU；模擬牛肉屠宰與加工 biofilm 則降 5.92、6.35 log CFU。

嘻嘻：cold plasma 打 biofilm 有感，肉品環境清潔多一把刀。

docs.title: Development, functional profiling, and probiotic evaluation of indigenous LAB from Nigerian fermented foods: Antimicrobial mechanisms, in vivo validation, and applications in food preservation and mycotoxin risk reduction
docs.text:
Authors: Mafe AN et al. | Journal: World J Microbiol Biotechnol | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1007/s11274-026-05051-4 TL;DR: 奈及利亞發酵食品 isolates 中，L. fermentum、W. confusa 具 in vivo host protection；L. fermentum 可延長 zobo beverage 保存 17–21 天，並抑制多種 foodborne pathogens。

嘻嘻：local LAB 不只好吃，還能順手守住食品安全。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-06-01)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-06-02
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 12、One Health × 12、Food Security × 12，共 36 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Glucocorticoid use and candidemia: results from a nationwide case-control study
docs.text:
Authors: Leding C et al. | Journal: Clin Microbiol Infect | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1016/j.cmi.2026.05.033 TL;DR: 丹麥2010–2024年case-control納入6,179例candidemia；oral glucocorticoid暴露aOR 2.17，高劑量達5.23，IBD最高4.62。

不嘻嘻：steroid救火，也順手幫Candidia開派對。

docs.title: Post-Viral Aspergillosis: A Systematic Review of Incidence, Clinical Manifestations, and Outcomes
docs.text:
Authors: Akhavan M et al. | Journal: Rev Med Virol | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1002/rmv.70163 TL;DR: systematic review顯示PVA主要見於SARS-CoV-2、influenza與CMV後，重症、immunocompromised或corticosteroids使用者死亡風險高，需早期診斷與antifungal therapy。

不嘻嘻：viral後場還有Aspergillus補刀，ICU真的很忙。

docs.title: Metformin exerts a dual effect on Mucorales virulence by altering oxidative metabolism through the regulation of rhizoferrin levels
docs.text:
Authors: Patiño-Medina JA et al. | Journal: Med Mycol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1093/mmy/myag053 TL;DR: metformin對Mucorales virulence呈濃度雙相效應：低濃度增強mitochondrial activity與•OH，高濃度則經AMPK/mitophagy降低virulence。

嘻嘻：metformin連Mucorales都能被玩出雙面劇本。

docs.title: Drug-Resistant Tuberculosis Outcomes in South Kivu Province, Democratic Republic of Congo, During a Humanitarian Crisis (2018-2024)
docs.text:
Authors: Musafiri EM et al. | Journal: Open Forum Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1093/ofid/ofag303 TL;DR: 南基伍2018–2024年277名DR-TB患者全用bedaquiline regimen，成功率77.6%、死亡13.4%；rural residence保護，非relapse retreatment預後較差。

嘻嘻：humanitarian crisis裡DR-TB還能有這成績，值得多看一眼。

docs.title: Development and Internal Validation of a Nomogram Model to Predict Invasive Pulmonary Aspergillosis Occurrence Risk in ICU Patients with Sepsis
docs.text:
Authors: Li H et al. | Journal: Infect Drug Resist | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.2147/IDR.S603823 TL;DR: 單中心574名sepsis ICU患者中86例(15.0%)發生IPA；nomogram含corticosteroid、viral coinfection、MV時間、NRS 2002與SOFA，validation AUC 0.844。

嘻嘻：sepsis ICU若能早抓IPA，值班少一點玄學。

docs.title: Atomically Precise Polyanionic Boron Cluster Agents with Broad-Spectrum Antiviral Activity
docs.text:
Authors: Wang Y et al. | Journal: Precis Chem | Date: 2026 May 25 DOI: 10.1021/prechem.6c00019 TL;DR: dodecaborate-based polyanionic clusters在mammalian cells細胞毒性低，部分結構對HIV-1與CMV具antiviral activity，可作結構活性研究scaffold。

嘻嘻：boron cluster看起來像抗病毒工具箱新零件。

docs.title: Advances in cryptococcal infections-associated immunopathology and potential therapeutic strategies
docs.text:
Authors: Sachivkina N et al. | Journal: Front Pharmacol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fphar.2026.1776489 TL;DR: cryptococcal infections治療仍受5-flucytosine、fluconazole、amphotericin B選項有限、毒性、resistance與blood-brain barrier限制，需新策略。

不嘻嘻：cryptococcosis治療選項少到像在翻舊抽屜。

docs.title: Acetylation and accessibility of Cryptococcus neoformans cell wall chitosans influence the strength of host immune responses
docs.text:
Authors: Hellmann MJ et al. | Journal: Cell Surf | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.tcsw.2026.100175 TL;DR: Cryptococcus neoformans cell wall chitosan的acetylation與accessibility受chitin deacetylase與生長條件影響，決定host immune response強弱。

嘻嘻：C. neoformans cell wall也有免疫音量旋鈕。

docs.title: CMV-specific T-cell receptor-engineered T-cell therapy as first-line treatment for CMV reactivation after haploidentical hematopoietic stem cell transplantation: a phase 2 trial
docs.text:
Authors: Tang J et al. | Journal: Front Immunol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fimmu.2026.1820399 TL;DR: phase 2試驗25例haplo-HSCT中13例CMV reactivation接受TCR-T；4週CR 92.3%，中位追蹤1011天，僅2例grade 1 CRS。

嘻嘻：CMV TCR-T一出手，transplant ward眼睛亮了。

docs.title: Cost Impact of a Novel Pre-transplant Risk Assessment Tool for Early Acute Rejection in Kidney Transplant Patients
docs.text:
Authors: Cooper JT et al. | Journal: J Health Econ Outcomes Res | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.36469/001c.146282 TL;DR: PTRA用於standard-risk kidney transplant模型可省每人90天358美元、2年13,234美元；若納入14,468人，2年可省1.91億美元。

嘻嘻：transplant前先算風險，錢包和graft都開心。

docs.title: Managing Azole Resistance in Aspergillus
docs.text:
Authors: Kushima H et al. | Journal: Med Mycol J | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3314/mmj.26.008 TL;DR: azole-resistant Aspergillus fumigatus上升威脅aspergillosis治療，常見cyp51A mutation與azole cross-resistance；susceptibility testing不足使管理更困難。

不嘻嘻：azoles越用越心虛，susceptibility又常缺席。

docs.title: Plasmablastic lymphoma through clonal expansion 17 years after EBV-positive DLBCL: case report and review
docs.text:
Authors: Ishii K et al. | Journal: J Clin Exp Hematop | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.3960/jslrt.26012 TL;DR: 67歲男EBV-positive DLBCL緩解17年後發生PBL；NGS immunoglobulin repertoire顯示PBL可能源自原先minor subclone的長期clonal expansion。

不嘻嘻：17年後subclone回來打招呼，真的很會等。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Community zoonoses prioritization (CZP): A One Health tool integrating participatory epidemiology and multicriteria decision analysis
docs.text:
Authors: Mumin FI et al. | Journal: One Health | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.onehlt.2026.101450 TL;DR: CZP結合Participatory Epidemiology與MCDA，以六步驟在單次session完成zoonoses prioritization，低識字社群也能產生可分析排序與行動規劃。

嘻嘻：One Health工具若能進社區，排序就不只在會議室。

docs.title: Antimicrobial resistant E. coli in animals, humans and the environment within household and compound settings: A scoping review
docs.text:
Authors: Gutema FD et al. | Journal: One Health | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.onehlt.2026.101452 TL;DR: scoping review納入40篇，household/compound中AMR E. coli盛行率AH 63%、AHE 36.5%、AE 46%，13篇AH研究見動物與人類genetic relatedness。

不嘻嘻：AMR E. coli在家戶流動，門檻比想像低。

docs.title: Investigating a Skin Disease in Guinea Baboons (Papio papio) Using Non-invasive Methods
docs.text:
Authors: Ramon M et al. | Journal: Ecohealth | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s10393-026-01799-1 TL;DR: 幾內亞比索野生Guinea baboons以107點位、2224 camera trap days與272樣本偵測皮膚病；至少7隻有病灶，PCR未確認M. leprae或T. pallidum。

不嘻嘻：非侵入式查皮膚病，答案仍很害羞。

docs.title: Governance of antimicrobial resistance in Central Africa (2015-2025): a systematic review of policies, One Health coordination and funding
docs.text:
Authors: Kamsu GT et al. | Journal: JAC Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1093/jacamr/dlag093 TL;DR: 中非AMR governance systematic review納入27份文件；6國有NAPs，但One Health落實、surveillance、laboratory capacity與國內financing仍薄弱。

不嘻嘻：AMR policy有了，落地還是一路卡關。

docs.title: The WHO costing and budgeting tool for national action plans on antimicrobial resistance-a review and assessment of impact in Africa
docs.text:
Authors: Mazengiya YD et al. | Journal: JAC Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1093/jacamr/dlag094 TL;DR: WHO AFRO 15國使用AMR NAP costing tool後，11國以costed data募資，7國影響政策；主要瓶頸仍是國內financing不足與donor priority不合。

不嘻嘻：costed NAP會算錢，但錢不一定會來。

docs.title: Commercial determinants of health: an approach for strengthening One Health interventions
docs.text:
Authors: Ebata A et al. | Journal: Front Public Health | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fpubh.2026.1787079 TL;DR: CDoH lens可補強One Health，分析intensified animal production中非公部門誘因、市場動態與zoonotic risk、AMR、環境衝擊間的取捨。

嘻嘻：把市場誘因算進One Health，終於比較像現實。

docs.title: A comparison of antibiotic resistance reports in pharmacovigilance databases and conventional surveillance across "One Health"
docs.text:
Authors: Mitchell J et al. | Journal: Front Public Health | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fpubh.2026.1758180 TL;DR: pharmacovigilance資料庫抓到VigiBase 26,086件、EudraVigilance Veterinary 1,010件抗生素抗藥性報告，與傳統surveillance的ATC分布顯著不同。

嘻嘻：pharmacovigilance也能挖AMR訊號，雷達多一支。

docs.title: Trichinella spiralis HSP70 Mediates Mice Immune Responses via TLR2/MyD88/ERK Signaling Pathway
docs.text:
Authors: Feng J et al. | Journal: Transbound Emerg Dis | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1155/tbed/5533482 TL;DR: Trichinella spiralis Ts-HSP70可經TLR2/MyD88/ERK活化macrophage，增加NO、ROS與cytokine mRNA；PLGA nanoparticle疫苗使小鼠muscle larvae降28%。

嘻嘻：parasite HSP70拿來當疫苗線索，頗有戲。

docs.title: First report of traumatic myiasis in the wild Komodo dragon (Varanus komodoensis Ouwens, 1912) from Indonesia
docs.text:
Authors: Winarso A et al. | Journal: Vet Res Commun | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s11259-026-11310-4 TL;DR: 2025年印尼Komodo National Park首次記錄野生Komodo dragon traumatic myiasis；幼蟲皆為Chrysomya rufifacies，推估infestation後2–3天。

不嘻嘻：wound myiasis連野外大個體也不放過。

docs.title: The Role of ES&T in Advancing Environmental Toxicology and Chemical Risk Assessment: Past, Present, and Future
docs.text:
Authors: Escher BI et al. | Journal: Environ Sci Technol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1021/acs.est.6c03315 TL;DR: 回顧ES&T 60年environmental toxicology指出，整合ecotoxicology、human toxicology、exposomics與NAMs，可將risk assessment推向mechanism-based One Health模式。

嘻嘻：toxicology走向mechanism-based，One Health更有骨架。

docs.title: New strains, new threats: the rise of atypical non-typhoidal Salmonella serovars and what it means for global health
docs.text:
Authors: Campbell A et al. | Journal: Crit Rev Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1080/1040841X.2026.2668055 TL;DR: atypical non-typhoidal Salmonella serovars因全球貿易、政策與globalization增加，具新host adaptation、AMR profile與infection sources，需One Health監測。

不嘻嘻：Salmonella serovars換新招，食安又加班。

docs.title: Establishment of an indirect ELISA method for detecting Salmonella infection based on Sptp protein in poultry
docs.text:
Authors: Xie L et al. | Journal: J Microbiol Methods | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1016/j.mimet.2026.107560 TL;DR: 以SptP protein建立poultry Salmonella indirect ELISA，可偵測1:1600稀釋serum，intra/inter-assay CV均<10%，與commercial ELISA結果完全一致。

嘻嘻：poultry Salmonella篩檢若更順，防線就早一點。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Emergence and genomic characterization of Listeria monocytogenes causing human listeriosis in Pakistan, 2017-2023
docs.text:
Authors: Ahmed I et al. | Journal: BMC Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1186/s12866-026-05236-9 TL;DR: 巴基斯坦2017–2023年Listeria monocytogenes臨床分離增至142例，90例bloodstream、47例CNS；24株WGS多屬CC1、serogroup 4b、lineage I。

不嘻嘻：L. monocytogenes在臨床冒頭，食安警鈴很響。

docs.title: Native rhizobia nodulating soybean (Glycine max (L.) Merr.) performs better than commercial strain across locations in South Ethiopia Region
docs.text:
Authors: Dalo DD et al. | Journal: Sci Rep | Date: 2026 May 30 DOI: 10.1038/s41598-026-55131-6 TL;DR: 南衣索比亞44株native rhizobia中SB19表現最佳，田間soybean產量2.39–3.10 tons/ha，顯著高於commercial strain 2.25–2.40 tons/ha。

嘻嘻：native rhizobia贏commercial strain，土壤也有地主優勢。

docs.title: Prevalence and Genetic Diversity of Toxoplasma gondii in Foods: A Global Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
docs.text:
Authors: Shamsi L et al. | Journal: Foodborne Pathog Dis | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1177/15353141261451633 TL;DR: global meta-analysis納入34研究、142 datasets，食品中Toxoplasma gondii pooled prevalence 8.2%；raw meats最高11.9%、non-leafy vegetables 11.4%。

不嘻嘻：T. gondii藏進食物鏈，沙拉和肉都要小心。

docs.title: A Review of Reclaimed Water Use for Irrigation of Produce Crops and Food Safety Aspects in the United States
docs.text:
Authors: Reyes GA et al. | Journal: J Food Prot | Date: 2026 May 29 DOI: 10.1016/j.jfp.2026.100824 TL;DR: 美國reclaimed water灌溉produce缺乏一致聯邦規範；病原如Cyclospora cayetanensis與emerging chemical hazards處理效能仍不確定，影響採用與食安評估。

不嘻嘻：reclaimed water想上桌，規範和風險還在拉扯。

docs.title: High thermal resistance and inactivation behaviour of Clostridioides difficile spores in milk
docs.text:
Authors: Taylan Yalçın G et al. | Journal: Braz J Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s42770-026-01975-z TL;DR: 牛奶中Clostridioides difficile spores熱抗性高，85°C約7-log reduction，但≤77.5°C 60分鐘仍<2.2-log；常規pasteurization不足以完全清除。

不嘻嘻：C. difficile spores泡牛奶，熱處理也不太怕。

docs.title: Characterization of Lactiplantibacillus plantarum IM3, a Salmonella-antagonistic strain isolated from garbage enzyme: genome analysis, mechanism of action, and mRNA transcription kinetics
docs.text:
Authors: Ngo TPN et al. | Journal: World J Microbiol Biotechnol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s11274-026-05040-7 TL;DR: Lactiplantibacillus plantarum IM3對S. enterica Typhimurium抑制圈8.10 mm，co-culture抑制率99.44%，CFS 24小時可降低lettuce上可回收菌量。

嘻嘻：friendly bacteria幫忙壓S. enterica，生菜有救援感。

docs.title: Evaluating Toxoplasmosis Molecular Prevalence in Slaughtered Sheep using PCR Assay in Northern Palestine
docs.text:
Authors: Qash H et al. | Journal: Acta Parasitol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s11686-026-01316-y TL;DR: 北巴勒斯坦346隻屠宰羊PCR顯示Toxoplasma gondii DNA盛行率25.7%；ewe 52%高於ram 21.3%，tongue tissue最高21.8%。

不嘻嘻：slaughterhouse一篩就不少T. gondii，烹調別偷懶。

docs.title: A MXene@GQDs hybrid fluorescent array for rapid identification and quantification of foodborne pathogens
docs.text:
Authors: Zhang X et al. | Journal: Mikrochim Acta | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s00604-026-08142-z TL;DR: MXene@GQDs fluorescence array可於3分鐘辨識6種foodborne pathogens，最低驗證濃度1.0×10^3 CFU/mL，在自來水、牛奶與mixed-bacteria樣本維持100% accuracy。

嘻嘻：3分鐘抓foodborne pathogens，檢驗室會想加購。

docs.title: Aflatoxin B1 and food safety: Mechanisms of action associated to Hepatocellular Carcinoma
docs.text:
Authors: Zamudio MC et al. | Journal: Arch Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s00203-026-04978-4 TL;DR: AFB1經CYP3A4/CYP1A2 bioactivation產生AFBO，形成DNA adducts並促進p53、ras G-to-T transversions；需整合HBV vaccination與biocontrol降低暴露。

不嘻嘻：AFB1到HCC這條路，食品安全不能裝沒事。

docs.title: Functional characterization of iucC and iucD in iron acquisition and virulence of Cronobacter sakazakii
docs.text:
Authors: Meng X et al. | Journal: Braz J Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1007/s42770-026-01978-w TL;DR: Cronobacter sakazakii iucC/iucD在iron-limited條件顯著上調；knockout降低siderophore、intracellular iron，並削弱Caco-2 adhesion與invasion。

嘻嘻：抓到C. sakazakii iron路徑，virulence有新把柄。

docs.title: Diversity and selected functional traits of microbiota associated with traditional dried plant foods from South African informal markets
docs.text:
Authors: Wassermann B et al. | Journal: FEMS Microbes | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1093/femsmc/xtag026 TL;DR: 南非51件傳統乾燥植物食品16S分析顯示microbiota差異大；baobab richness最高1460 ASVs，leafy greens bacterial load最高達10^9 copies/g。

不嘻嘻：傳統乾燥食品microbiota豐富到有點緊張。

docs.title: Production optimization and in vitro evaluation of the biofunctional potential of folate from Lactiplantibacillus plantarum-MGKMVIT11
docs.text:
Authors: Megala G et al. | Journal: Front Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmicb.2026.1811272 TL;DR: Lactiplantibacillus plantarum MGKMVIT11最佳化後folate產量364.35 μg/mL、較未最佳化增1.64倍，並具antioxidant與anti-inflammatory activity。

嘻嘻：L. plantarum順手產folate，functional food很會包裝。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-06-02)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-06-03
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 10、One Health × 10、Food Security × 10，共 30 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Experiences and understanding of diagnosis and treatment among drug-resistant extrapulmonary tuberculosis patients: A qualitative study from Central India
docs.text:
Authors: Bhagwat G et al. | Journal: PLOS Glob Public Health | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgph.0006383 TL;DR: 印度18名 drug-resistant EPTB 患者訪談顯示，照護歷程充滿不確定性：疾病與 drug resistance 認知不足、診斷延遲、治療副作用與溝通不足，並伴隨財務壓力與 stigma。

不嘻嘻：TB 照護像迷宮，病人還得自備導航。

docs.title: Pediatric candidemia epidemiology and antifungal susceptibility profiles reported by the ISPED program in China, 2016-2024
docs.text:
Authors: Xu J et al. | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1128/aac.00031-26 TL;DR: 中國13家兒童醫院527例 pediatric candidemia 中，NACs占74.0%；C. parapsilosis 2019至2024由21.2%升至51.9%，且 fluconazole susceptibility 2022–2024降至63.6%。

不嘻嘻：Candida 又換打法，兒科病房先冒冷汗。

docs.title: Change in plasma cryptococcal antigen titers in Uganda among outpatients with advanced HIV disease from 2017 to 2022 with rollout of national cryptococcal screening
docs.text:
Authors: Poeschla A et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0349854 TL;DR: 烏干達436名 advanced HIV disease 且 CrAg 陽性成人中，2017–2022年 plasma CrAg titer 未下降；2022年58%從未使用 ART，顯示 late presentation 仍持續。

不嘻嘻：screening 有了，late presentation 還是很會遲到。

docs.title: Optimizing Pneumocystis jirovecii Prophylaxis in Immunocompromised Patients: Defining the Clinical Role of Atovaquone
docs.text:
Authors: Pham TN et al. | Journal: Transpl Infect Dis | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1111/tid.70255 TL;DR: 2015–2022年149名使用 atovaquone 進行 PJP prophylaxis 患者中，2020後占84%，使用時間由2.3延至6.0個月；67人改藥後多數回到 cotrimoxazole，無 breakthrough PJP。

嘻嘻：atovaquone 當備援，至少沒有 PJP 破門。

docs.title: Pneumocystis jirovecii Infection in children with solid tumors: Incidence and clinical characteristics in a retrospective cohort (2010-2023)
docs.text:
Authors: Vera García JM et al. | Journal: Arch Argent Pediatr | Date: 2026 Jun 04 DOI: 10.5546/aap.2025-10972.eng TL;DR: 2010–2023年251名兒童 solid tumors 患者中，PJP 累積發生率2.4%（95% CI 0.9–5.1），incidence rate 8.4/1000 person-years，感染距癌症診斷中位2.7個月。

不嘻嘻：solid tumors 小孩的 PJP，低調但不能忘。

docs.title: The black aspergilli (Aspergillus niger complex) and their role in human, animal, and plant diseases
docs.text:
Authors: Bongomin F et al. | Journal: Clin Microbiol Rev | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1128/cmr.00158-25 TL;DR: A. niger complex 可致 otomycosis、keratitis、chronic pulmonary aspergillosis 與少數 invasive aspergillosis；常見 triazoles MIC 偏高，itraconazole、isavuconazole 療效可能受限。

不嘻嘻：黑色 Aspergillus 看起來也不太好惹。

docs.title: Predictors of viral non-suppression among key populations in Lagos, Nigeria: a retrospective matched case-control study
docs.text:
Authors: Madubueze RE et al. | Journal: AIDS Care | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1080/09540121.2026.2679506 TL;DR: 拉哥斯520名 ART-experienced key populations 的 matched case-control 顯示，baseline VL >1000 copies/mL 強烈預測 viral non-suppression（aOR 6.85），TB coinfection 亦增加風險（aOR 2.34）。

不嘻嘻：viral load 一高，ART 劇本就開始歪。

docs.title: Real-World Efficacy and Safety of Liposomal Amphotericin B for Invasive Fungal Disease in Patients with Hematologic Malignancies: A Multicenter Retrospective Study
docs.text:
Authors: Lu T et al. | Journal: Drug Des Devel Ther | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.2147/DDDT.S605938 TL;DR: 中國100名 hematologic malignancies 合併 IFD 患者接受 L-AmB，中位療程12天，treatment success 71.0%；hypokalemia 52.0%最常見，51%達成療效且無 severe AEs。

嘻嘻：L-AmB 還能打，只是鉀離子要顧好。

docs.title: Multimorbidity and the risk of post-tuberculosis lung disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis
docs.text:
Authors: Hill KJ et al. | Journal: BMJ Glob Health | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1136/bmjgh-2025-020365 TL;DR: 41篇 LMICs 研究的 meta-analysis 顯示，PTLD 定義差異大且58.5%高 bias；HIV 與較低 PTLD odds 相關（OR 0.68），undernutrition 則增加 abnormal spirometry（OR 1.99）。

不嘻嘻：PTLD 證據很亂，肺也很難收尾。

docs.title: Adaptation of a Smartphone-Based Mobile Health Program to Support Person-Centered Treatment of Tuberculosis in Kilimanjaro, Tanzania: Preimplementation Qualitative Needs Assessment
docs.text:
Authors: Ngowi K et al. | Journal: JMIR Form Res | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.2196/92051 TL;DR: 坦尚尼亞吉力馬札羅25人質性訪談顯示，provider 端 smartphone access 達100%，TB 患者僅36%；網路穩定性與 data bundle 成本是 mHealth 導入主要障礙。

不嘻嘻：mHealth 很潮，但 data bundle 不買單。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Cryo-EM reveals multiple mechanisms of ribosome inhibition by doxycycline
docs.text:
Authors: Stuart WS et al. | Journal: Nat Commun | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1038/s41467-026-73421-5 TL;DR: cryo-EM 顯示 doxycycline 除 A site 外也結合 ribosome exit tunnel；在 C. burnetii 有3個分子堆疊阻塞，在 E. coli 則誘發 PTC 構形改變並阻斷 tRNA binding。

嘻嘻：doxycycline 竟有多重卡位，ribosome 很忙。

docs.title: Rab11B is required for binding and entry of recent H3N2, but not H1N1, influenza A isolates
docs.text:
Authors: Turner AH et al. | Journal: J Virol | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1128/jvi.02111-25 TL;DR: Rab11B depletion 使2022年 H3N2 binding 約降50%，並減少 infected cells，但不影響 H1N1；缺陷定位至 HA gene，提示近期 H3N2 entry 依賴特定 sialylated surface proteins。

嘻嘻：H3N2 entry 又多一個可盯的門把。

docs.title: Molecular detection of relapsing fever Borrelia puertoricensis in migratory Mexican free-tailed bats
docs.text:
Authors: Becker DJ et al. | Journal: mSphere | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1128/msphere.00085-26 TL;DR: 奧克拉荷馬近400隻 Mexican free-tailed bats 的2022–2023年調查首次在蝙蝠偵測 Borrelia puertoricensis，prevalence 低但支持其可能參與北美 tick-borne pathogen dispersal。

不嘻嘻：bats 帶線索飛過來，ticks 又加戲。

docs.title: OmpU elicits cross-protective bactericidal activity against Vibrio species: a surface-exposed antigen with vaccine potential
docs.text:
Authors: Yuan S et al. | Journal: J Appl Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1093/jambio/lxag129 TL;DR: OmpU 免疫可誘發高 titer antisera（最高1:243,000），對多種 Vibrio species 具 cross-reactivity 與 bactericidal activity（titer 1:512），優於 VP0802 的1:32。

嘻嘻：OmpU 這張 vaccine 牌，看起來有點香。

docs.title: Silent carriage of mcr-9 on IncHI2 plasmid in an Enterobacter hormaechei strain causing a urinary tract infection in a dog from Portugal
docs.text:
Authors: Menezes J et al. | Journal: Vet Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.vetmic.2026.111104 TL;DR: 葡萄牙犬 UTI 分離的 Enterobacter hormaechei 帶 mcr-9 IncHI2 plasmid 但仍 colistin susceptible；缺 qseC/qseB 可能解釋 silent carriage，凸顯 companion animals 的 One Health surveillance 需求。

不嘻嘻：mcr-9 安靜搭便車，狗狗也進 One Health。

docs.title: High Burden of Intestinal Protozoan Infections Revealed by Molecular Diagnostics among Schoolchildren in the Marshall Islands: Species Diversity, Genotyping, and Risk Factors
docs.text:
Authors: Too YX et al. | Journal: Int J Infect Dis | Date: 2026 May 31 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijid.2026.108846 TL;DR: 馬紹爾群島215名學童 PCR 顯示 E. histolytica 97.2%、G. lamblia 87.0%、Cryptosporidium spp. 2.8%；PCR 分別比 microscopy 多偵測13倍與35倍感染。

不嘻嘻：PCR 一開，腸道 protozoa 直接開派對。

docs.title: Expanding diversity of tick-borne phleboviruses (Phlebovirus mukawaense, Mudanjiang phlebovirus, Gomselga Virus, and Onega tick phlebovirus) in Russia
docs.text:
Authors: Kartashov MY et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0349564 TL;DR: 亞洲俄羅斯143地點1078隻 Ixodes persulcatus ticks 中偵測27株 tick-borne phleboviruses，Gomselga virus prevalence 1.5%最高，並見 MKWV 與 Borrelia miyamotoi 等 coinfections。

不嘻嘻：ticks 的病毒名單，又默默加長一頁。

docs.title: Dynamics of zoonotic soil-transmitted helminth infections in wild African green monkey (Chlorocebus aethiops sabaeus)
docs.text: Authors: Teng Y et al. | Journal: Parasitology | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1017/S0031182026102212

docs.title: Hydroxamate Siderophores Drive Persistent Free Radical Generation to Suppress Antibiotic Resistance Gene Dissemination and Enhance Humification during Composting
docs.text:
Authors: Yi S et al. | Journal: Environ Sci Technol | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1021/acs.est.6c00828 TL;DR: 40天 rice straw/pig manure composting 中，HDS 使 humification 加速24.7%、SQ•- 增加2.1–7.4倍，plasmid-mediated conjugative transfer 降65.3–84.4%，mid/high-risk ARGs 降11.6–26.6%。

嘻嘻：composting 也能壓 ARGs，環保突然很硬派。

docs.title: Brucellosis Surveillance - United States, 2010-2024
docs.text:
Authors: Locke NS et al. | Journal: MMWR Surveill Summ | Date: 2026 Jun 04 DOI: 10.15585/mmwr.ss7502a1 TL;DR: 美國2010–2024年通報1796例 brucellosis，878例有補充 CRF，其中503例符合 CSTE 定義；61%有旅遊史，國際旅遊者73%暴露於未殺菌乳品或未熟肉品。

不嘻嘻：brucellosis 老派但穩，未殺菌乳品再補刀。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
A lack of clean drinking water is associated with lacking food and experiencing food safety threats in 121 countries across the globe
docs.text:
Authors: Bruine de Bruin W et al. | Journal: Nat Food | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1038/s43016-026-01363-8 TL;DR: 121國124,003人 World Risk Poll 顯示，過去一年缺食逾1天與缺 clean drinking water 逾1天相關；兩者共存或任一存在皆增加 food safety threats 與擔憂。

不嘻嘻：沒水又缺食，感染風險地基先塌一半。

docs.title: Bimetallic Ce/Zr-MOF nanozyme for integrated colorimetric detection and degradation of tetracycline in foods
docs.text:
Authors: Du L et al. | Journal: Food Chem | Date: 2026 May 27 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2026.149834 TL;DR: Ce/Zr-MOF nanozyme 可用 colorimetric assay 偵測食品 tetracycline，0–40 μM 線性、detection limit 0.368 μM；同時產生 •OH radicals 促進 TC degradation。

嘻嘻：食品 tetracycline 可偵測又可降解，很划算。

docs.title: Molecular typing and genomic characterization of persistent Listeria monocytogenes clones in a bakery production facility
docs.text:
Authors: Almeida G et al. | Journal: Int J Food Microbiol | Date: 2026 May 25 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijfoodmicro.2026.111874 TL;DR: 烘焙廠68株 L. monocytogenes 分為3個 molecular serotypes、17種 PFGE types、10種 cgMLST types；CC2與CC9兩個 persistent clones 占86%，但未能連結特定 genomic determinants。

不嘻嘻：Listeria 在烘焙廠住太久，像有門牌。

docs.title: Novel N'-Phenyl Benzyl Carbazate Derivatives with Potent Multiple Antifungal Activity: Design, Structure-Activity Relationship, and Action Mode
docs.text:
Authors: Wang Y et al. | Journal: J Agric Food Chem | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1021/acs.jafc.6c02545 TL;DR: 30個 N'-phenyl benzyl carbazates 中26個對6種 phytopathogenic fungi 的平均 EC50 為0.316–4.617 μg/mL；2f 在番茄 A. solani 第7天 control efficacy 96.3%。

嘻嘻：新 antifungal 骨架冒頭，植物病害先期待。

docs.title: Food purchase patterns in Nairobi before, during, and after the COVID-19 pandemic lockdown measures
docs.text:
Authors: Momanyi R et al. | Journal: PLOS Glob Public Health | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgph.0006544 TL;DR: 奈洛比2家超市2018–2023年11,105,974筆交易的 interrupted time series 顯示，COVID lockdown 短期降低 UPF、增加 minimally processed foods，但 post-COVID 多數改變反轉。

不嘻嘻：lockdown 飲食短暫變好，之後又被打回原形。

docs.title: Isolation and characterization of a novel lytic phage Artin targeting typhoidal and nontyphoidal Salmonella and evaluation of its antibacterial efficacy in food
docs.text:
Authors: Ramezannia Z et al. | Journal: Virol J | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1186/s12985-026-03204-3 TL;DR: phage Artin 具 strictly lytic、耐4–70°C與pH 2–12，宿主含 S. Enteritidis、S. Typhimurium、S. Typhi 與 E. coli；4°C下在雞胸與牛奶可降 Salmonella 1.3–3.1 log10 CFU/mL。

嘻嘻：phage Artin 低溫也能清 Salmonella，很務實。

docs.title: Seasonal impacts on Salmonella prevalence and antimicrobial resistance in the pork food chain of northeastern Thailand
docs.text:
Authors: Liu H et al. | Journal: Appl Environ Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1128/aem.00057-26 TL;DR: 泰國東北897件豬肉鏈樣本中，retail pork Salmonella prevalence 最高（夏75.4%、雨季75.3%、冬54.7%）；雨季與 AMR 強相關（OR 11.9），冬季由 S. Rissen 主導。

不嘻嘻：豬肉鏈 Salmonella 太熱鬧，雨季還加抗藥性。

docs.title: Microbiological quality assessment of potential pathogenic bacteria and multidrug resistance patterns in commercial electrolyte drinks in Dhaka, Bangladesh
docs.text:
Authors: Saha S et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0336888 TL;DR: 達卡40件 electrolyte drinks 全數有 bacteria，40% aerobic plate count 超 FDA 限值、55%有 fecal contamination；分離 K. pneumoniae、E. coli、A. baumannii、Vibrio spp. 等且多為 MDR。

不嘻嘻：electrolyte drinks 變菌湯，喝前先深呼吸。

docs.title: miR408-5p and miR408-3p cooperatively reduce cadmium uptake and accumulation in rice
docs.text:
Authors: Rong F et al. | Journal: PLoS Biol | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3003811 TL;DR: MIR408 產生的 miR408-5p 與 miR408-3p 分別抑制 HIPP19 與 UCL7，降低水稻根部 Cd uptake；HIPP19/UCL7 knockout 與 MIR408 overexpression 均可降 rice grains Cd 而不影響 essential metals。

嘻嘻：rice Cd 能降，還不太傷 essential metals。

docs.title: Associations Between Social Determinants of Health and Epilepsy Prevalence in U.S. Adults: NHANES1999-2018
docs.text:
Authors: Li B et al. | Journal: Neuroepidemiology | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1159/000552729 TL;DR: NHANES 1999–2018年36,458名成人中，epilepsy 加權盛行率1.1%；整體 SDoH index 與 epilepsy odds 增3倍相關（OR 3.03），food security 貢獻最大（weight 0.39）。

不嘻嘻：epilepsy 也照見 SDoH，食物安全最扎心。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-06-03)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-06-04
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 16、One Health × 11、Food Security × 14，共 41 篇。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Wickerhamomyces anomalus Fungemia during Healthcare-Associated Outbreak, Pereira, Colombia, 2025
docs.text:
Authors: Ordoñez KM et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.3201/eid3206.251980 TL;DR: 哥倫比亞佩雷拉2025年healthcare-associated outbreak共10例Wickerhamomyces anomalus bloodstream infection，9例為兒童、8例新生兒；6株STR顯示clonal transmission，所有病人存活。

嘻嘻：clonal outbreak還全員存活，今天先小聲加薪給感控。

docs.title: TIME TO POSITIVITY AS A DIAGNOSTIC TOOL FOR CATHETER-RELATED CANDIDEMIA: A SPECIES-SPECIFIC ANALYSIS
docs.text:
Authors: Albanell-Fernández M et al. | Journal: Int J Infect Dis | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.ijid.2026.108847 TL;DR: 407例candidemia中，TTP可預測catheter-related來源：C. albicans ≤27小時OR 5.1、C. parapsilosis ≤35小時OR 3.1，表現優於DTP。

嘻嘻：blood culture時鐘也會抓source，微生物室又帥一次。

docs.title: Post-Transplantation Hairy Cell Leukemia with Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis in an Adult Kidney Transplant Recipient: A Case of Rare Occurrence
docs.text:
Authors: Ghazizadeh M et al. | Journal: Iran J Kidney Dis | Date: 2025 Sep 27 PMID: 42234896 TL;DR: 腎臟移植成人發生late-onset EBV-positive hairy cell leukemia合併HLH，臨床可類似sepsis；HLH與PTLD同時出現極罕見，診斷與處置困難。

不嘻嘻：transplant後連診斷都玩變裝秀，值班醫師先跪。

docs.title: Indolent Localized Orbital Aspergillosis Mimicking Breast Cancer Metastasis
docs.text: Authors: Wu X et al. | Journal: Ophthalmology | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1016/j.ophtha.2026.05.004

docs.title: Helminth seropositivity in allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis: Co-exposure, misdiagnosis, or cross-reactivity?
docs.text:
Authors: Mewara A et al. | Journal: Trop Doct | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1177/00494755261456517 TL;DR: ABPA與helminth infections有相似clinical與immunologic特徵；回溯cross-sectional資料提示，helminth-endemic地區ABPA若反應不全或表現 atypical，應評估寄生蟲暴露。

不嘻嘻：ABPA遇到helminth，免疫反應開始玩你猜我猜。

docs.title: Proportions of M. Intracellulare and M. Avium among non-tuberculous mycobacteria isolates in China: A Systematic review and Meta-Analysis
docs.text:
Authors: Hou Y et al. | Journal: J Clin Tuberc Other Mycobact Dis | Date: 2026 Aug DOI: 10.1016/j.jctube.2026.100600 TL;DR: 中國190項研究顯示NTM isolates中M. intracellulare占39.30%、M. avium占13.18%；HIV陽性者反轉為M. avium較常見39.46%，異質性I2>95%。

不嘻嘻：NTM版圖又亂又異質，統合分析也只能苦笑。

docs.title: Are CD4+ T-Cell Counts Associated with Pneumocystis jirovecii Detection in Hospitalized Patients with Liver Disease? A Retrospective Exploratory Pilot Analysis
docs.text:
Authors: Katsounas A et al. | Journal: Livers | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.3390/livers6030040 TL;DR: 455名肝病住院者院內死亡率22.6%；22名immunological risk病人中8人做P. jirovecii PCR、3人陽性，但0例死於PJ pneumonia，死亡主因為hepatic decompensation與bacterial infections。

不嘻嘻：肝病住院者問題很多，P. jirovecii倒像配角。

docs.title: Fourth-generation chemiluminescence QuantiFERON-TB Plus assay versus T-SPOT.TB semi-automated assay: a case for the use of both assays in immunosuppressed patients
docs.text:
Authors: Palacios-Penedo S et al. | Journal: ERJ Open Res | Date: 2026 May DOI: 10.1183/23120541.01257-2025 TL;DR: 3748名immunosuppressed病人中，任一IGRA陽性13.4%、不確定結果2%上下；QFT-Plus CLIA與T-SPOT.TB整體一致率93.0%，但HIV等族群discordance較高。

嘻嘻：IGRA雙軌並行，immunosuppressed族群少一點盲猜。

docs.title: Comparative proteome analyses of human natural killer cells from patients after allogeneic stem cell transplantation and healthy individuals challenged with Aspergillus fumigatus
docs.text:
Authors: Springer J et al. | Journal: Microlife | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1093/femsml/uqag020 TL;DR: alloSCT後NK cells面對Aspergillus fumigatus刺激，day 90有1652個proteins差異、day 180降至77個；STAT1-IL27RA與GZMA、IFNg、NCAM1軸可能參與反應。

嘻嘻：NK cells術後慢慢回神，proteome把過程拍給你看。

docs.title: Community-based health screening and all-cause mortality in rural South Africa: a longitudinal cohort study
docs.text:
Authors: Magut F et al. | Journal: BMJ Public Health | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1136/bmjph-2025-003803 TL;DR: 南非夸祖魯-納塔爾農村18041人參與Vukuzazi health fair，追蹤中位4.0年；參與者all-cause mortality hazard降25%（HR 0.75），5年絕對死亡率降1.5%。

嘻嘻：community screening有救命感，公共衛生今天很有面子。

docs.title: Lead Optimization of TgCDPK1 Inhibitors for the Treatment of Toxoplasmosis
docs.text:
Authors: Mannino MP et al. | Journal: J Med Chem | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1021/acs.jmedchem.6c00065 TL;DR: 以X-ray structure-based design開發Toxoplasma gondii TgCDPK1 inhibitors，多個化合物具良好oral bioavailability、brain exposure與24小時PK；16c在急性感染小鼠最具preclinical潛力。

嘻嘻：toxoplasmosis新藥苗頭不錯，腦部曝露聽起來很香。

docs.title: Common and Rare Emerging and Re-Emerging Infectious Diseases in Pediatric Transplant Recipients: A Comprehensive Review
docs.text:
Authors: Verma A | Journal: Pediatr Transplant | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1111/petr.70365 TL;DR: pediatric transplant recipients除CMV、EBV與bacterial bloodstream infections外，SARS-CoV-2、MDR bacteria/fungi、measles、pertussis與arboviruses等emerging pathogens負擔上升。

不嘻嘻：pediatric transplant名單越看越長，疫苗牆也要補滿。

docs.title: Virologic and Immunological Failure and Associated Factors Among Adults Living With HIV on HAART at Jimma Medical Center, Southwest Ethiopia
docs.text:
Authors: Teshome RT et al. | Journal: J Int Assoc Provid AIDS Care | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1177/23259582261453642 TL;DR: 衣索比亞272名HIV成人接受HAART中，immunologic failure 8.1%、virologic failure 10.3%；poor adherence與tuberculosis co-infection或baseline viral load ≥1000 copies/mL相關。

不嘻嘻：HIV治療失敗多半不新奇，但每次都很扎心。

docs.title: Real-world experience with gilteritinib maintenance following allogeneic transplantation in relapsed/refractory AML patients harboring FLT3 mutations
docs.text:
Authors: Lin YT et al. | Journal: Blood Res | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1007/s44313-026-00144-3 TL;DR: 亞洲FLT3-mutated R/R AML cohort中，gilteritinib術前salvage後接allo-HSCT與maintenance，CR率76.2%；追蹤46.2個月，maintenance與較低1年relapse及較佳生存相關。

嘻嘻：gilteritinib接棒maintenance，AML賽後防守有亮點。

docs.title: Long-term spectrum and outcomes of post-transplant malignancy following liver transplantation: A comprehensive single-center study
docs.text:
Authors: Megaly MG et al. | Journal: Surg Oncol | Date: 2026 May 28 DOI: 10.1016/j.suronc.2026.102457 TL;DR: 1841名成人肝臟移植者追蹤中位10.6年，25年non-HCC solid organ malignancy 18%、skin malignancy 29%、PTLD 4%；malignancy占死因20%，僅次於infection 23%。

不嘻嘻：liver transplant活久了，malignancy也來收長期帳。

docs.title: Azole-resistant Aspergillus fumigatus and related species in Japan
docs.text:
Authors: Tashiro M et al. | Journal: Respir Investig | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1016/j.resinv.2026.101458 TL;DR: 日本azole-resistant Aspergillus fumigatus呈異質分布，區域監測55株中7株resistant；CPA cohort isolate-based resistance 8.3%，azole-treatment failure subgroup達46.2%。

不嘻嘻：azole-resistant Aspergillus不均勻冒出，治療又要抖。

docs.title: 🟢 One Health / Zoonoses
Yellow Fever Virus Surveillance in Callithrix spp. Marmosets during Epizootic Outbreak, Brazil, 2024-2025
docs.text:
Authors: Siconelli MJL et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.3201/eid3206.251388 TL;DR: 巴西聖保羅州2024–2025年epizootic outbreak期間，9隻Callithrix penicillata marmosets檢出YFV，高viral load且有典型器官病灶，支持納入multispecies surveillance。

不嘻嘻：YFV監測連marmosets都上工，人類真的別裝沒事。

docs.title: Assessing Evidence to Guide Primary Prevention of Pathogen X
docs.text:
Authors: Holmes I et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.3201/eid3206.260293 TL;DR: Pathogen X primary prevention可借鏡常見但人傳人差的zoonotic viruses spillover證據；在pandemic events稀少下，precautionary approach是較可行的empirical foundation。

嘻嘻：Pathogen X還沒登場，prevention劇本先寫起來。

docs.title: In Vitro Antifungal Drug Susceptibility of Feline Sporothrix schenckii Complex Isolates, Thailand, 2023-2025
docs.text:
Authors: Yurayart C et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.3201/eid3206.260135 TL;DR: 泰國2023–2025年1178株貓Sporothrix schenckii complex isolates中，687株對itraconazole reduced susceptibility，含321株single-drug、270株co-reduced、96株multidrug-reduced。

不嘻嘻：貓源Sporothrix對itraconazole冷感，毛孩也讓ID焦慮。

docs.title: Cerebrospinal Fluid Findings among Patients with Anaplasmosis and Central Nervous Involvement, Minnesota and Wisconsin, USA
docs.text:
Authors: Dumic I et al. | Journal: Emerg Infect Dis | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.3201/eid3206.260240 TL;DR: 美國明尼蘇達與威斯康辛10名anaplasmosis合併CNS症狀住院者，5人CSF正常、4人mild lymphocytic pleocytosis；CSF異常與嚴重度不相關，皆對doxycycline快速改善。

嘻嘻：CNS anaplasmosis看似嚇人，doxycycline還是很罩。

docs.title: Regional heterogeneity of spatial-temporal characteristics and meteorological-environmental driving factors of hemorrhagic fever with renal syndrome in China
docs.text:
Authors: Cheng C et al. | Journal: One Health | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.onehlt.2026.101454 TL;DR: 中國2005–2022年HFRS呈秋冬與春季雙峰；monthly mean temperature 7.5°C時RR 1.85、relative humidity 38%時RR 1.21，風險受host與環境區域異質性驅動。

不嘻嘻：HFRS跟天氣一起起伏，老鼠與環境都不放假。

docs.title: CEIRR Risk Assessment Pipeline executive reports on H5N1 highly pathogenic avian influenza 2.3.4.4b, swine H1 1B.2, and H9N2 low pathogenicity avian influenza B4.7.2
docs.text:
Authors: | Journal: J Virol | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1128/jvi.00545-26 TL;DR: CEIRR RAP整合六中心surveillance、phenotypic analysis與computational modeling，評估H5N1 2.3.4.4b、swine H1 1B.2與H9N2 B4.7.2之pandemic potential。

嘻嘻：influenza風險評估變成流水線，pandemic焦慮稍微有工具。

docs.title: AMR in wild animals and plants: global trends and future priorities in wildlife-associated antimicrobial resistance research
docs.text:
Authors: Tipper HJ et al. | Journal: NPJ Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1038/s44259-026-00226-3 TL;DR: 866篇wildlife-associated AMR研究顯示明顯taxonomic與geographic偏差，mammals與birds占多數，plants僅14篇、amphibians 10篇；resistant fungi僅2%，Escherichia占microbial targets 33%。

不嘻嘻：wildlife AMR研究偏到不行，One Health還在補地圖。

docs.title: Metagenomic profiling reveals shared resistome signatures between humans and pigs in Vietnamese smallholder farms
docs.text:
Authors: Linh LTK et al. | Journal: NPJ Antimicrob Resist | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1038/s44259-026-00223-6 TL;DR: 越南50個小農場 paired fecal metagenomics檢出10270個ARGs、550型；人與豬共享52% ARGs，含mcr、blaOXA-58、optrA，並見近緣E. coli strains共享。

不嘻嘻：人豬共享resistome，小農場的ARGs很會串門子。

docs.title: Age-driven shifts of the camel gut microbiome and resistome in extensively reared dromedary camels
docs.text:
Authors: Wang W et al. | Journal: Microbiol Spectr | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1128/spectrum.03183-25 TL;DR: 未記錄therapeutic antibiotic暴露的dromedary camels中，6月齡幼駱駝gut microbiome較不穩且ARGs較多；6歲成駱駝ARG richness與diversity較低，resistome隨年齡收斂。

嘻嘻：camel resistome會隨年齡收斂，至少不是一路放飛。

docs.title: Polyunsaturated fatty acid and oxylipin profiles of Angiostrongylus cantonensis during cerebral-to-pulmonary migration illuminate parasite and host microenvironmental lipid signatures
docs.text:
Authors: Tang Z et al. | Journal: Parasit Vectors | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1186/s13071-026-07469-z TL;DR: Angiostrongylus cantonensis缺乏Δ6 desaturase與canonical COX/LOX/CYP；L5自腦移行至肺時累積n-6 PUFAs與anti-inflammatory oxylipins，反映host microenvironment差異。

嘻嘻：寄生蟲lipid路線圖展開，host環境被看得更清楚。

docs.title: Antimicrobial resistance in Enterobacteriaceae across the human-animal-environment interface at the lower catchment area of Akaki River, Ethiopia
docs.text:
Authors: Weldo BF et al. | Journal: One Health Outlook | Date: 2026 Jun 02 DOI: 10.1186/s42522-026-00220-9 TL;DR: 衣索比亞Akaki River下游720件human-animal-water samples分離1042株Enterobacteriaceae，MDR占62.7%，水樣最高且見Ertapenem resistance，凸顯One Health surveillance需求。

不嘻嘻：河水也成AMR倉庫，One Health不是口號是欠債。

docs.title: 🟡 Food Security / Food Safety
Exploring the biochemical and biological functions of copper radical oxidases in the vascular wilt phytopathogen Verticillium dahliae
docs.text:
Authors: Fong JK et al. | Journal: Appl Environ Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1128/aem.00790-26 TL;DR: Verticillium dahliae JR2中AA5_2主要呈aryl-alcohol oxidase活性、AA5_1呈aldehyde oxidase活性；knockout未支持其直接參與phytopathogenesis，與foliar phytopathogens機制不同。

嘻嘻：phytopathogen enzyme拆清楚，負結果也能省大家時間。

docs.title: Apigenin decreases the pathogenicity of Aeromonas hydrophila infection by inhibiting aerolysin activity and interfering with quorum sensing
docs.text:
Authors: Li S et al. | Journal: J Appl Microbiol | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1093/jambio/lxag131 TL;DR: apigenin在低於MIC濃度抑制Aeromonas hydrophila AerA與QS-regulated virulence factors，結合Pro347/Pro395並降低channel catfish challenge死亡率，支持anti-virulence策略。

嘻嘻：anti-virulence策略有戲，不殺菌也能讓病原變乖。

docs.title: Research on an improved RT-DETR-based model for rice disease detection
docs.text:
Authors: Zhang Y et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0349237 TL;DR: ECL-RTDETR用EfficientViT、CARAFE與LDConv改善rice disease detection；相較RT-DETR，mAP@0.5增0.7%、速度增22.2 FPS，GFLOPs降81.8、參數減22.12M。

嘻嘻：rice disease AI又快又瘦，田間偵測更像能落地。

docs.title: Effect of plastic composition in the combustion material on the Persistent Organic Pollutant content in smoked chicken meat
docs.text:
Authors: Hoang GD et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0350345 TL;DR: 越南smoked chicken實驗顯示塑膠混入燃料使POPs上升，污染梯度為wood<PE<PS<PVC；PVC造成12種PCDD/Fs、21種PCBs與多種carcinogenic PAHs，組間差異p<0.01。

不嘻嘻：拿塑膠燻雞，這食品安全劇情真的自己寫悲劇。

docs.title: Sentinel Surveillance-Based Epidemiological Analysis of Foodborne Diseases in Shengsi County, China, 2019-2024
docs.text:
Authors: Chen J et al. | Journal: Infect Drug Resist | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.2147/IDR.S594651 TL;DR: 中國浙江嵊泗2019–2024年2173例FBD中，夏季占38.93%、家庭場域76.44%、海產相關34.74%；V. parahaemolyticus持續endemic，2024年Salmonella陽性升至9.32%。

不嘻嘻：海產加夏天老組合，foodborne disease永遠準時打卡。

docs.title: Two decades of human- and climate-induced groundwater storage shifts in Brazil
docs.text:
Authors: Getirana A et al. | Journal: Sci Adv | Date: 2026 Jun 05 DOI: 10.1126/sciadv.aee0266 TL;DR: 巴西2002–2023年aquifer outcrop zones平均groundwater recharge為223±16 mm/year，約占降雨12%、總通量1900±136 km3/year；東部過度開採區出現持續depletion或無recharge。

不嘻嘻：groundwater被抽到透支，氣候帳本也開始催收。

docs.title: Integrated study of sediments and fish from Croatian rivers: potentially toxic elements and human health concerns
docs.text:
Authors: Miličić L et al. | Journal: Environ Geochem Health | Date: 2026 Jun 03 DOI: 10.1007/s10653-026-03270-0 TL;DR: 克羅埃西亞河川sediments多數PTEs低於指引，但Cd常超標且為主要ecological risk；魚體Pb與Cr構成food safety concern，HI>1、CR>1×10^-6提示不宜長期無管制食用。

不嘻嘻：河魚重金屬超標，長期吃下去真的不太妙。

docs.title: Enterobacteriaceae contamination in raw chicken meat from Amazonas, Brazil: implications for food hygiene
docs.text:
Authors: Amorim ABA et al. | Journal: Braz J Biol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1590/1519-6984.305490 TL;DR: 巴西亞馬遜Manaus 88件raw chicken meat中，Salmonella spp. 32.9%、E. coli 42.0%、其他Enterobacteriaceae 11.4%；室溫販售與街市污染較高，冷鏈與衛生缺失明顯。

不嘻嘻：raw chicken冷鏈破功，Salmonella直接出來開會。

docs.title: Classification of food security status in disaster-prone areas: a comparative analysis of machine learning models using Support Vector Machine, Random Forest, and Logistic Regression
docs.text:
Authors: Sukmawani R et al. | Journal: Braz J Biol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1590/1519-6984.305154 TL;DR: 災害易發區food security status分類中，SVM表現最佳，accuracy 92–96%、precision 0.93、recall 0.94、F1 0.93；錯誤多集中於FSI約1的threshold邊界案例。

嘻嘻：food security分類準度不錯，災區決策多一把尺。

docs.title: Evaluation of land suitability and potential production of sorghum (Sorghum bicolor L.) as a biomass energy crop in West Sumatra, Indonesia
docs.text:
Authors: Juniarti et al. | Journal: Braz J Biol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.1590/1519-6984.297938 TL;DR: 印尼西蘇門答臘sorghum land suitability為S1，適合25–27°C、降雨<200 mm、濕度<75%、土深>60 cm與pH 4.4–6.1；actual production potential估5 t/ha。

嘻嘻：sorghum適地評估清楚，bioenergy至少先有地圖。

docs.title: Effects of combinatorial hurdles on a non-alcoholic beer matrix challenged with Salmonella Javiana, Escherichia coli, Listeria monocytogenes, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, and Bacillus cereus
docs.text:
Authors: Maust A et al. | Journal: Front Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmicb.2026.1835393 TL;DR: non-alcoholic beer matrix中，pH是pathogen control關鍵；1.50 volumes CO2可控制Salmonella Javiana與E. coli，多種處理使菌量降至<10 CFU/mL、>3 log reduction。

嘻嘻：non-alcoholic beer也能控菌，pH這次很有存在感。

docs.title: The SPI-6 T6SS gene cluster from Salmonella Tennessee encodes a new antibacterial nuclease effector protein
docs.text:
Authors: Vargas-Del Río C et al. | Journal: Front Microbiol | Date: 2026 DOI: 10.3389/fmicb.2026.1794835 TL;DR: Salmonella Tennessee SPI-6 T6SS具antibacterial activity；VR3中新E/I module之RhsA-HNHc造成E. coli growth inhibition，immunity protein可完全救回，並證實DNase activity。

嘻嘻：Salmonella T6SS新武器曝光，細菌內戰真精彩。

docs.title: Advanced biosensing strategies for high-risk foodborne pathogens: a comprehensive review of Salmonella and Listeria monocytogenes
docs.text:
Authors: Gumush SE et al. | Journal: Food Chem (Oxf) | Date: 2026 Jun DOI: 10.1016/j.fochms.2026.100417 TL;DR: 此review聚焦Listeria monocytogenes與Salmonella spp. biosensors，整合bioreceptor、transducer與AI-driven design，並評估scalability、portability與食品產業routine use可行性。

嘻嘻：biosensor加AI，食品病原檢測越來越像現場可用。

docs.title: Detection of viable and VBNC Salmonella in retail meat using optimized PMAxx real-time PCR
docs.text:
Authors: Pham HT et al. | Journal: J Microbiol Methods | Date: 2026 Jun 01 DOI: 10.1016/j.mimet.2026.107568 TL;DR: PMAxx real-time PCR可去除10^8 CFU/mL死菌訊號，18小時pre-enrichment後LOD為10 CFU/g；33件零售肉品23件陽性，與ISO 6579-1:2017 culture 100%一致。

嘻嘻：VBNC Salmonella也抓得到，PCR這次很懂食品現場。

資料來源：PubMed (articles retrieved 2026-06-04)

docs.title: Daily Journal Digest — 2026-06-05
docs.text: 過去 24 小時新增：Transplant ID × 27、One Health × 10、Food Security × 10，共 47 篇。

docs.title: ⭐ 今日亮點
docs.text:
• Use of tocilizumab for severe hantavirus pulmonary syndrome: a MEURI case series with contextual comparisons Lancet ID首篇 tocilizumab MEURI 系列：治療組存活4/5、未治療組0/5存活，IL-6 抑制有望改變 hantavirus 肺炎治療決策。
  • Does early letermovir initiation delay engraftment? 314例異體HSCT顯示 letermovir 預防期間植入顯著延遲，廣泛使用藥物出現意外造血影響訊號。
  • Genomic and phylogenetic characterization of severe fever with thrombocytopenia syndrome virus in companion animals in Korea, 2023-2024 韓國寵物犬貓 SFTSV 基因組與人類病例高度相關，東亞伴侶動物的人畜共通傳播風險值得台灣關注。
  • High Burden of Multidrug-Resistant Candidozyma (formerly Candida) auris in a Tertiary Care Haematology Unit: Diagnostic Pitfalls and Identification of High-Risk Clinical Areas 印度血液科病房 C. auris 高負擔，自動化藥敏有陷阱，對血液科及 BMT 中心的感控有直接警示。
  • WHO estimates of the global, regional, and national burden of 42 foodborne infectious and chemical hazards, 2000-21: an updated data synthesis WHO 更新全球食源性疾病負擔：2021年152萬死亡，媲美TB與HIV/AIDS，非傷寒型Salmonella列最重要病原。

docs.title: 🔴 Transplant & Opportunistic Infections
Tadagaki K, Tudor D, Gbahou F, et al. Human cytomegalovirus-encoded UL33 and UL78 heteromerize with host CCR5 and CXCR4 impairing their HIV coreceptor activity. Blood. 2012;119(21):4908-4918
docs.text: Authors: | Journal: Blood | Date: 2026-Jun-04 DOI: 10.1182/blood.2026034416

docs.title: Comparative impacts and cost-effectiveness of tuberculosis systematic screening strategies in prisons in Brazil, Colombia, and Peru: A mathematical modeling study
docs.text:
Authors: Liu YE et al. | Journal: PLoS Med | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pmed.1004739 TL;DR: 以巴西、哥倫比亞及秘魯動態傳播模型比較監獄結核病系統性篩檢策略的全人口健康衝擊與成本效益，結果顯示定期篩檢可顯著降低結核病負擔，但最佳策略（頻率與篩檢演算法）因國情不同而有差異。

把監獄變成結核病防治的切入點，數學模型幫你算好最划算的策略：—嘻嘻。

docs.title: Kinetics and Clinical Outcomes of EBV DNAemia in Whole Blood and Plasma Among Pediatric Liver Transplant Recipients: A Single-center Experience
docs.text:
Authors: Kasztelewicz B et al. | Journal: Transplantation | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1097/TP.0000000000005767 TL;DR: 回顧237名接受肝臟移植兒童的EBV DNAemia動力學，分析全血與血漿的病毒載量走勢及PTLD發生率與危險因子，為小兒肝臟移植後EBV監測策略提供單中心實證資料。

237個小病人的EBV追蹤資料，不容易收到，謝謝大家獻出的抽血紀錄。嘻嘻。

docs.title: New Perspectives on Antimicrobial Agents: Fosmanogepix
docs.text:
Authors: Lamoth F | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1128/aac.00324-26 TL;DR: 回顧新型一線抗真菌藥 fosmanogepix（manogepix 前藥）的作用機制、廣效抗菌譜及臨床試驗進展，此藥物靶向 Gwt1 酵素，對包括 azoles 及 echinocandin 抗藥菌株在內的多種真菌具活性，有望填補現有治療缺口。

fosmanogepix 終於要正式加入抗真菌武器庫，azoles 和 echinocandins 抗藥的黴菌有救了：—嘻嘻。

docs.title: ZfpA-regulated chitin synthesis in Aspergillus fumigatus hyphae determines fungicidal tip lysis by FksA-targeting antifungals
docs.text:
Authors: Calise DG et al. | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1128/aac.01769-25 TL;DR: 研究 Aspergillus 菌絲中 ZfpA 調節的幾丁質合成機制，發現靶向 FksA 的 echinocandins 可誘發菌絲頂端真菌性溶解（fungicidal tip lysis），有望將對 Aspergillus 原本僅具抑菌效果的 echinocandins 轉化為殺真菌策略。

Echinocandins 對 Aspergillus 從抑菌變殺菌，只要搞清楚 ZfpA 的工作：—嘻嘻，機制黨大勝利。

docs.title: Does early letermovir initiation delay engraftment?
docs.text:
Authors: Royston L et al. | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1128/aac.00371-26 TL;DR: 回顧性分析314名CMV血清陽性異體造血幹細胞移植受者，發現 letermovir 預防期間植入時間顯著延遲，即便排除已知干擾因素後仍然顯著，提示 letermovir 可能對造血恢復具超出CMV預防範疇的額外影響。

Letermovir 防CMV有功，但順便讓造血慢下來，天下沒有白吃的午餐：—不嘻嘻。

docs.title: Targeting reactivated toxoplasmosis: therapeutic efficacy of the green-synthesized copper nanoparticles combined with pyrimethamine
docs.text:
Authors: Alnomasy SF et al. | Journal: Antimicrob Agents Chemother | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1128/aac.00019-26 TL;DR: 以地塞米松免疫抑制小鼠建立 Toxoplasma gondii ME49 株再活化模型，評估綠色合成銅奈米粒子（CNPs）單獨或與 pyrimethamine 聯用的療效，聯合治療可降低寄生蟲負荷並延緩疾病進展。

銅奈米粒子配 pyrimethamine 打弓形蟲，煉丹術轉型現代版：—嘻嘻，但還在動物模型。

docs.title: Clinical performance of the fully automated quantitative LeaDEA Pneumocystis PCR Kit for the diagnosis of Pneumocystis jirovecii pneumonia
docs.text:
Authors: Matsumura Y et al. | Journal: Med Mycol | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1093/mmy/myag058 TL;DR: 回顧性佇列研究評估全自動 LeaDEA Pneumocystis PCR Kit 在免疫抑制患者呼吸道檢體中的診斷效能，qPCR 較顯微鏡檢查更敏感，並可依真菌負荷區分 PJP 與定植狀態。

自動化 PCR 機器幫你判斷 PJP 還是定植，少一點主觀，多一點安心：—嘻嘻。

docs.title: Endocarditis Due to Scedosporium spp and Lomentospora prolificans: Case Series and Literature Review
docs.text:
Authors: Vignals C et al. | Journal: Open Forum Infect Dis | Date: 2026-06-02 DOI: 10.1093/ofid/ofag123 TL;DR: 法國黴菌心內膜炎登錄（SOS）30例案例系列，60%（18/30）由 Scedosporium 複合群引起，37%（11/30）由 Lomentospora prolificans 引起，外傷為主要侵入途徑；並結合文獻回顧描述危險因子、治療與預後。

*Scedosporium* 和 Lomentospora 心內膜炎三十例，很罕見、很難治、預後很差**：—不嘻嘻，希望你永遠不要遇到。

docs.title: Invasive Fungal Sinusitis in Patients With Hematological Malignancies: A 20-Year Study From a Tertiary Academic US Hospital System
docs.text:
Authors: Athni TS et al. | Journal: Open Forum Infect Dis | Date: 2026-05-15 DOI: 10.1093/ofid/ofag304 TL;DR: 美國三級醫學中心20年回顧性研究，描述血液惡性腫瘤合併侵襲性真菌鼻竇炎（IFS）患者的臨床特徵、治療及預後，在不斷演進的抗真菌治療環境下重新評估此高危族群的結果。

20年 IFS 資料說明它依然很兇：—不嘻嘻，血液科的老問題沒有變成老朋友。

docs.title: High Burden of Multidrug-Resistant Candidozyma (formerly Candida) auris in a Tertiary Care Haematology Unit: Diagnostic Pitfalls and Identification of High-Risk Clinical Areas
docs.text:
Authors: Kundu S et al. | Journal: Med Mycol | Date: 2026-06-03 DOI: 10.1093/mmy/myag055 TL;DR: 印度加爾各答血液科病房前瞻性橫斷面研究（2024-2025年），3,894份血液培養中發現高負擔 multidrug-resistant Candidozyma auris（前稱 Candida auris），評估自動化藥敏測試與微量肉湯稀釋法的一致性，並識別高風險臨床區域。

C. auris 在血液科病房占山為王，自動化藥敏還有陷阱：—不嘻嘻，抗黴菌防線繃緊。

docs.title: Clinical outcomes and prognostic factors in hematologic malignancy patients with probable CMV pneumonia
docs.text:
Authors: Aydın Güçlü Ö et al. | Journal: BMC Infect Dis | Date: 2026-06-03 DOI: 10.1186/s12879-026-13708-6 TL;DR: 回顧性佇列研究納入61名血液惡性腫瘤合併可能性CMV肺炎患者，分析臨床特徵與實驗室參數，評估與30天及90天死亡率相關的預後因子，為此高危族群的CMV肺炎管理提供臨床依據。

61例 CMV 肺炎在血液惡性腫瘤族群，找到預後因子才能早點出手：—不嘻嘻，死亡率依然不低。

docs.title: TBSure: an ESGMYC survey of pediatric TB management practices in high-income countries
docs.text:
Authors: Uka A et al. | Journal: Front Public Health | Date: 2026-05-19 DOI: 10.3389/fpubh.2026.1829612 TL;DR: TBSure 跨國橫斷面問卷調查歐洲臨床微生物及感染症學會（ESGMYC），了解多個高收入國家兒童結核病診斷與管理的現況差異，識別臨床實踐缺口並形成實證建議。

高收入國家的兒童 TB 管理原來這麼不一致：—不嘻嘻，有錢不等於有標準。

docs.title: Tuberculosis in households with infectious cases in Kampala city: Harnessing health data science for new insights on an ancient disease with persistent, unresolved problems
docs.text:
Authors: Nasinghe E et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0348823 TL;DR: 以機器學習分析烏干達坎帕拉市結核病家戶接觸者資料，針對30%以上無症狀TB病例識別傳播驅動因素及治療失敗預測指標，有望改善HIV/TB共感染高流行環境中的早期偵測效率。

用 AI 挖出坎帕拉的隱形 TB 傳播鏈，讓三分之一無症狀病例無所遁形：—嘻嘻。

docs.title: Comparison between enzyme-linked immunospot assay and intracellular cytokine flow cytometry assay of cytomegalovirus-specific T-cell response in healthy participants
docs.text:
Authors: Klinmalai C et al. | Journal: PLoS One | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0349292 TL;DR: 於健康受試者中比較 ELISPOT 與胞內細胞激素染色（ICS）流式細胞術偵測 CMV 特異性T細胞反應的方法學差異與一致性，有助選擇免疫抑制患者 CMV 細胞免疫監測的最適工具。

ELISPOT vs ICS 誰更好偵測 CMV 免疫？現在有答案了：—嘻嘻，選對工具事半功倍。

docs.title: Host and Pathogen Pharmacogenetics in Pneumocystis jirovecii Pneumonia After Kidney Transplantation: A Retrospective Cohort and Case-Control Study
docs.text:
Authors: Henskens N et al. | Journal: Transpl Infect Dis | Date: 2026-06-03 DOI: 10.1111/tid.70257 TL;DR: 配對1:2病例對照研究探討腎臟移植受者 Pneumocystis jirovecii 肺炎（PJP）的宿主與病原藥物基因體學，分析影響 mycophenolic acid 代謝及藥效動力學的基因多型性是否經由淋巴球低下途徑增加PJP風險。

腎移植後 PJP 跟 MPA 藥物基因有關，個人化預防策略的方向更明朗了：—嘻嘻。

docs.title: A rare case of primary lingual mucormycosis in an uncontrolled diabetic patient
docs.text:
Authors: Jain A et al. | Journal: IDCases | Date: 2026-05-24 DOI: 10.1016/j.idcr.2026.e02615 TL;DR: 報告一例血糖控制不佳糖尿病患者發生原發性舌部 mucormycosis（罕見部位），組織切片見寬無隔直角分枝菌絲，早期清創、血糖控制及 liposomal amphotericin B 治療後恢復良好，強調免疫功能低下者應警覺非典型口腔壞死性病灶。

舌頭長 mucormycosis，全因糖尿病控制太爛：—不嘻嘻，但早清創加 amphotericin B 還是救回來了。

docs.title: Decreased Natural Killer Cells in Mucormycosis
docs.text:
Authors: Albarrán-Sánchez A et al. | Journal: Arch Med Res | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1016/j.arcmed.2026.103453 TL;DR: 橫斷面研究納入34例 mucormycosis 患者（85%合併糖尿病），發現周邊血NK細胞數量顯著下降（中位數 0.11 vs 參考值 0.15-0.43 ×10³/µL），但NK細胞數與死亡率或新冠肺炎病史無關，提示此為免疫失調特徵而非因果或預後標誌。

Mucormycosis 患者 NK 細胞低，描述了免疫圖像但還不能預測死亡：—嘻嘻，至少多了個免疫標記。

docs.title: Primary Cutaneous Cryptococcosis in Immunocompetent Patients: Recognition and Management
docs.text:
Authors: Almatroud L et al. | Journal: Am J Clin Dermatol | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1007/s40257-026-01045-y TL;DR: 回顧原發性皮膚 cryptococcosis（PCC）的臨床特徵、診斷與治療，此症常發生於免疫功能正常者的皮膚直接接種，以 Cryptococcus neoformans 為主（亦有 C. gattii），與免疫抑制者的播散性 cryptococcosis 不同，預後通常較佳。

免疫正常人長了 Cryptococcus 皮膚感染，原來多半是直接接種、不會散播：—嘻嘻，預後比想像中好。

docs.title: Cost-Savings Realized Using Rabbit Anti-Thymocyte Globulin Ideal Body Weight Dosing for Kidney Transplantation Induction Immunosuppression
docs.text:
Authors: Ilia C et al. | Journal: Prog Transplant | Date: 2026-06-04 DOI: 10.1177/15269248261456512 TL;DR: 單中心回顧性研究比較腎臟移植誘導免疫抑制中兔抗胸腺細胞球蛋白（rATG）依「理想體重」vs「實際體重」給藥的藥費節省及移植結果，評估以體重為基礎之給藥策略的成本效益。

換個體重基準開 rATG 就省了不少藥費，腎移植也沒變差：—嘻嘻，小改動大節省。

docs.title: Trans-Kingdom dsRNA Sensing: Aspergillus fumigatus Mycovirus Activates MDA5/MAVS Immunity and Limits Allergic Bronchopulmonary Aspergillosis
docs.text:
Authors: Rapp AW et al. | Journal: bioRxiv | Date: 2026-05-18 DOI: 10.64898/2026.05.18.725120 TL;DR: Aspergillus 感染的 mycovirus（真菌病毒）所產生的雙股RNA可活化宿主 MDA5/MAVS 訊號路徑，觸發干擾素反應並限制過敏性支氣管肺麴菌病（allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis）的進展，揭示跨界 dsRNA 感應的抗真菌免疫新機制。

Aspergillus 自帶的病毒反過來幫宿主激活免疫：—嘻嘻，大自然的弔詭精妙。
